1b57f6df.title: Sales Engineer/Sr. Sales Engineer / Territory Manager- AIF
1b57f6df.description:
Our solutions are a key part of most industries \- electronics, medical research, renewable energy, food production, infrastructure and many more. Working with us means working with the latest technologies and groundbreaking, sustainable innovations.
   

  

**Join us on our journey for a better tomorrow.**
 Your role
   

  

 Responsible for driving sales, market expansion, and customer engagement for Oil\-Free Products and Size II Oil Injected Screw Compressors in the Central South region. The role manages direct sales, channel partners, and technical\-commercial support to achieve revenue goals.
   

  

* Promoting \& Selling the Oil free Products (Oil Injected Screw Compressor)
* Focus on replacement business on Oil Injected Screw, Dryer, Filters
* Improving the Sales and increasing the Market Share in given Territory.
* Business from Channel Partners to be handled.
* Interacting and collaborating intensely with other business lines, Zonal Team. Training of indirect distribution sales channels


 and keep track on Indirect business in given Territory.
   

  

* Supporting with project specification, Product Positioning and pricing based on segments for green field and Brown field


 projects in given Territory.
   

  

* Conducting market analysis to identify new opportunities, market price and competitor activities to increase market share.
* Keeping Existing Customers Satisfies and focus on retaining the customers.
* Manage channel partners, including training and indirect sales monitoring.
* Prepare proposals, conduct presentations, and support project specifications.
* Identify new opportunities via market analysis and competitor tracking.
* Coordinate installation and handover with CTS team.
* Maintain accurate reporting: monthly reports, II Track, Air Scan updates.


 To succeed, you will need
   

  

* Technical Degree \- B.E, Master’s degree in business is an added advantage\* Should have relevant minimum 3\-6 years of sales experience in Hyderabad Region / Compressor Product / Capital Goods and having good product / Application knowledge on compressed air solutions\* Good IT skills, and desire to learn and adopt new systems.
* Knowledge areas/Skills: Value selling, Negotiation skills, Building Relationships, Self\-motivated, Sales execution skills.
* Good commercial and technical competence.
* High motivation to win business and high sensitivity to customer needs
* Self\-motivation and Ability to work as part of a team.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills in English and Local Language.
* Self\-starter and motivator with a committed approach to meeting the goals of the division
* Strong business understanding and good knowledge of competitors products and activities.
* High level of initiative in problem solving solution provider to the customer and post\-sale support.


 In return, we offer
   

  

* Culture of trust and accountability
* Lifelong learning and career growth
* Innovation powered by people
* Comprehensive compensation and benefits
* Health and well\-being


 Job location
   

  

 On\-Site
   

  

 This role requires you to work on\-site at our office in Hyderabad, India. You will be part of a dynamic team and enjoy the benefits of face\-to\-face collaboration.
   

  

**Diverse by nature and inclusive by choice**
 Bright ideas come from all of us. The more unique perspectives we embrace, the more innovative we are. Together we build a culture where difference is valued and we share a deep sense of purpose and belonging.

9bf80467.title: Solution Consultant - Presales
9bf80467.description:
Chargebee provides a global revenue growth management platform that delivers fast time\-to\-value with exceptional service and support. Our mission is to empower businesses of all sizes to maximize their growth potential and revenue by adapting quickly and increasing customer loyalty.
 



  





 The role of the Solution Consultant is essential to helping Chargebee achieve our mission by providing subscription consulting expertise, designing effective subscription billing and revenue management solutions, and supporting our customers' growth goals and business outcomes through the use of our powerful platform.
 



  





***Role Overview:***




 Chargebee is looking for an exceptional Solution Consultant in the
 **NAMER Startup segment** 
 who is passionate about subscriptions, revenue growth, and recurring business models across all verticals and industries. You will work with the Sales team during the evaluation process, to handhold prospects and provide them guidance on understanding Chargebee.
 


* As a Solution Consultant, you will become an industry expert in Subscriptions and own the solution design and strategy for all your clients.
* Your growth mindset and entrepreneurial focus will help you consistently innovate and strive to help our customers accelerate their recurring revenue growth through the use of our powerful Revenue Growth Management product suite.
* You will be working in the AMER Solution Consulting Startup team partnering with 2 Account Executives to deliver success.



  





***What are we looking for?***



* BS or equivalent degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, Statistics, related fields or equivalent practical experience
* Typically 3 or more years of total experience in SaaS, technology, consulting, customer success, or support roles
* Someone with a solid grasp of SaaS fundamentals, HTTP/API concepts, and Chargebee core configuration patterns.
* Fast learner with clear curiosity about SaaS, billing, and revenue workflows.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills; able to simplify complex ideas.
* Early signs of customer empathy and active listening.
* Comfortable working with ambiguity and iterating quickly.
* Demonstrated bias for action in prior roles.
* Strong business acumen and experience working with C\-level executives translating how technology solutions can solve their business challenges.



  





***Core Responsibilities:***




 Technical Mastery
 


* Learn core Chargebee architecture, key integrations (CRM, payment gateways, ERPs, checkout, reporting), and foundational API concepts (what APIs are, how they are used, and common limits).
* Configure and demo standard Chargebee workflows confidently.



 Product Mastery
 


* Achieve working proficiency in core Chargebee modules relevant to their segment (subscriptions, invoicing, payments, dunning).
* Deliver both scripted and lightly customized demos aligned to common use cases.



 Consulting Skills
 


* Run foundational discovery to understand customer context, pain points, and basic processes.
* Map simple customer scenarios to relevant Chargebee capabilities.
* Build a coherent product story tailored to the customer use case rather than delivering a feature tour.



 Expanded Scope \& Responsibility
 


* Own technical success for complex deals end\-to\-end, with coaching on structure and strategy.
* Support Account Executives on opportunities through research, environment setup, demo builds, value selling, ROI narratives and documentation.
* Own deal hygiene including notes, demo assets, internal handovers, and structured follow\-ups.



 Alignment with Chargebee Values
 


* **Curiosity:** 
 Asks why customer processes exist and how product behavior works.
* **Bias for Action:** 
 Moves deals forward without waiting for perfect information.
* **Empathy:** 
 Reflects customer concerns and reframes solutions in the customer’s language.
* **Customer Centricity:** 
 Optimizes for long\-term solution fit rather than immediate deal closure.

b393e8c5.title: Bid Manager
b393e8c5.description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

**Your Role**
* Provide end\-to\-end bid management support for large and strategic deals, working closely with sales, pursuit teams, and solution experts.
* Collaborate with the Sales team to deliver effective presales and bid management support for client opportunities.
* Bid Planning \- Prepare a sound plan for the pursuit and ensure that the bid is run in line with bid plan and drive it to closure on time.
* Ensure all proposal components are well integrated and all aspects of the RFP/RFI requirements are fulfilled in the proposal.
* Coordinate with cross\-functional stakeholders (solution teams, finance team, functional experts etc.).
* Manage stakeholder expectations and drive issue resolution among stakeholders.
* Prepare bid budget and manage the bid in accordance with the approved bid budget.
* Run special initiatives like Value Reports, Knowledge Management, Win Loss Analysis etc.
* Ensure all bid responses and proposals are properly planned, coordinated and completed in line with agreed timelines.
* Leverage research and industry networking to bring in latest trends and competitor practices.


**Your Profile**
* 2\-6 years of experience in Bid Management.Experience in Account Management / Client Management.
* Strong Stakeholder Management and coordination skills.
* Exposure to Delivery Leadership and People Management.
* Strong research aptitude and awareness of industry trends and competitor practices.
* Understanding of Business Leadership, Service and Delivery.Ability to manage multiple bids and priorities effectively.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills.


**What You'll Love About Working Here**
* You can shape your career with us. We offer a range of career paths and internal opportunities within Capgemini group. You will also get personalized career guidance from our leaders.
* You will get comprehensive wellness benefits including health checks, telemedicine, insurance with top\-ups, elder care, partner coverage or new parent support via flexible work.
* At Capgemini, you can work on cutting\-edge projects in tech and engineering with industry leaders or create solutions to overcome societal and environmental challenges.


 Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\-to\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion.
   

  

 Make it real \| www.capgemini.com

19aa50b6.title: Sr. Sales Engineer
19aa50b6.description:
**Company Description:** 
 R\&D Therm India Pvt Ltd (RDT) is a specialized manufacturing company based in Nashik, focused on distillation columns, heat exchangers, pressure vessels, reactors, tanks, chimneys, and related equipment. The organization works with a wide range of materials including stainless steel (SS 304, SS 316\), Hastelloy, titanium, carbon steel SA 515/516, and mild steel IS 2062\. RDT operates from a state\-of\-the\-art facility on a 1\-acre site in Satpur Industrial Area, featuring a 25,000 sq. ft. workshop with a 13\-meter shed height and reliable access to utilities and skilled labor. Significant investments in automated machinery enable faster delivery and high\-quality output. The company is U Stamp certified by ASME and collaborates with leading consultants and third\-party inspectors such as Lloyd's, Bureau Veritas, Tata Consulting Engineers Ltd, EIL, and others to maintain stringent quality standards.
 



**Role Description** 
 The
 **Sr. Sales Engineer is a full\-time, on\-site role based** 
 in the
 **Mumbai Division,** 
 responsible for driving technical sales and supporting customers across assigned territories. The position involves identifying business opportunities, preparing and presenting technical proposals, and explaining product capabilities related to process equipment and engineered systems. The Sr. Sales Engineer will engage with clients to understand their requirements, coordinate with internal engineering and production teams, and ensure accurate quotations and timely order execution. Daily activities include conducting technical discussions, providing pre\- and post\-sales technical support, maintaining detailed sales reports and forecasts, and building long\-term customer relationships. The role also includes visiting customer sites, participating in meetings with consultants and third\-party inspectors, and representing RDT at industry events when required.
 



**Qualifications** 



* Demonstrated expertise in Sales Engineering and technical solution selling for industrial equipment or process engineering applications.
* Strong Technical Support capabilities, including troubleshooting, application engineering, and guiding customers on product selection and specifications.
* Proven Sales and Customer Service skills, with the ability to manage accounts, negotiate contracts, and ensure high levels of client satisfaction.
* Excellent Communication skills, including clear technical writing, confident presentations, and effective collaboration with internal and external stakeholders.
* Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical, Chemical, or related Engineering discipline; an advanced degree or relevant certifications are an advantage.
* Experience in pressure vessels, heat exchangers, or related fabrication industries, preferably working with ASME or similar standards.
* Ability to read and interpret technical drawings, specifications, and industry codes; familiarity with MS Office and CRM tools.
* Self\-motivated, organized, and comfortable working in an on\-site industrial environment with regular customer visits.

d39bc829.title: Senior Sales Engineer
d39bc829.description:
**The opportunity**
 General Sales \& Marketing work focuses on a combination of general sales and marketing work including: Face\-to\-face and/or remote sales to new or existing customers. Assessing customer needs and suggesting appropriate products, services and/or solutions. Planning, developing, and delivering the marketing strategy for products/services and associated brand(s). Evaluating, measuring, and managing the product/brand P\&L (e.g., budgeting, expenditures, profitability, return\-on\-investment, etc.) Incumbents in this specialization may also provide customer service and support in the form of information on product/price and resolution to issues related to billing, shipping, delivery, complaints, etc. Incumbents matching to this specialization are compensated based on achievement of sales targets. A Specialist Professional (P4\) is a recognized subject matter expert in job area typically obtained through advanced education and work experience. Responsibilities typically include: Managing large projects or processes with limited oversight from manager. Coaching, reviewing and delegating work to lower level professionals. Problems faced are difficult and often complex
 **.**
**How You’ll Make An Impact**
* Supports the local Sales organization/customers in determining the most technically appropriate and cost\-effective solutions to meet their power quality requirements. Provides technical support during the technical meeting, product presentations and negotiations.
* Prepares \& supports preparation of technical \& commercial offers based on customers expectations in terms of power quality, Local Business Unit and Sales organization directives.
* Defines \& estimates cost for the proposed solution and communicates to Sales organization
* Participates in the kick off meeting organized by the project team.
* Provides information to the risk review process in accordance with organization policy and sometimes participates in the risk review assessment.
* Analyzes customer needs and competitor offers through general market information and information provided by the Sales organization.
* Performs lost proposal analysis, identifies potential cause, and recommends future actions in cooperation with Sales/Local Business Unit to obtain better future results.
* Work on improving current sales process and have a continuous learning mindset.
* Work on the assigned sales targets and ensures sales achievement.
* Responsible to ensure compliance with applicable external and internal regulations, procedures, and guidelines.
* Living Hitachi Energy’s core values of safety and integrity, which means taking responsibility for your own actions while caring for your colleagues and the business.


**Your background**
* Having university degree in electrical engineering combined with a minimum of 8\-10 years of experience in Power Quality \& harmonic studies, knowledge on power systems.
* Previous experience in Capacitors, value\-based selling, technical solution sales will be preferred.
* To be successful in this role you must be a self\-starter, a continuous learner, having good communication skills, power quality and systems knowledge and hold a strong customer focus. Preferably, you have a proven track record of managing and facilitating change.
* Proficiency in both spoken \& written English language is required


 Publication date : 2026\-06\-03

fff2f1a4.title: Field Sales Engineer
fff2f1a4.description:
**Company Description** 
 At Retouch Conveyor Solution, we design and deliver reliable, innovative conveyor systems for sectors such as mining, manufacturing, logistics, and pharmaceuticals across India. Based in Dewas, Madhya Pradesh, the company combines strong technical expertise with modern engineering to improve efficiency, safety, and productivity for industrial clients. The team focuses on customized conveyor designs, supplier outreach, and technical presentations that align with the company’s values of precision and reliability. Retouch Conveyor Solution is committed to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction, building long\-term partnerships that help businesses streamline operations and move forward with confidence.
   

**Role Description** 
 This is a full\-time Field Sales Engineer role in a hybrid work model, based in Dewas, Madhya Pradesh, with some flexibility for work from home. The Field Sales Engineer will identify and pursue sales opportunities for conveyor solutions, conduct site visits, and collaborate with clients to understand technical requirements and propose suitable system designs. The role includes preparing and delivering technical and commercial presentations, supporting tenders and quotations, and negotiating terms to close deals. Day\-to\-day responsibilities involve managing key accounts, coordinating with engineering and production teams to ensure project feasibility and timely delivery, and providing post\-sales support to maintain high levels of customer satisfaction. The Field Sales Engineer will also monitor market trends, contribute to sales strategies, and maintain accurate records of leads, opportunities, and customer interactions.
   

**Qualifications**
  

* Candidates should possess strong skills in Sales Engineering and Electrical Engineering to understand technical requirements and propose appropriate conveyor solutions.
* Candidates should possess skills in Sales and Sales Management to generate leads, manage pipelines, and achieve revenue targets.
* Candidates should possess Account Management skills to maintain long\-term relationships, handle customer queries, and ensure repeat business.
* Relevant qualifications such as a diploma or degree in Electrical, Mechanical, or Industrial Engineering, or a related technical field.
* Proven experience in industrial or B2B sales, preferably in conveyor systems, material handling, or related engineering products.
* Ability to interpret technical drawings and specifications, and communicate technical concepts clearly to diverse stakeholders.
* Strong negotiation, presentation, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to work independently and in cross\-functional teams.
* Willingness to travel for client meetings and site visits, and proficiency in basic office and CRM software.

ab528751.title: Inside Sales Manager -Solution Architect (RCM & Healthcare Automation)
ab528751.description:
Key responsibilities
 



  
 



 1\.
 **Prospect intelligence \& qualification** 



* Conduct deep research on every inbound inquiry: practice/organization profile, specialty mix, size, payer mix, current RCM setup, likely pain points, and buying signals.
* Review and validate the full interaction history with each prospect across marketing and sales touches before re\-engagement, so no prior context is lost.
* Reconstruct and prioritize the backlog of dropped, stalled, and “too complex” prospects, and build a revival plan for the highest\-value accounts.



  





 2\.
 **Solution architecture** 



* Map each prospect’s needs to the organization’s full capability set: End\-to\-End, Partial, Co\-Managed, and FTE service models, plus proprietary tooling and the AI suite.
* Extend solutions with partner\-network products, AI voice/patient engagement, RPA, and automation positioning them as the differentiated, defensible layer of the proposal.
* Sit with RCM Delivery Managers to pressure\-test feasibility, scope, and staffing before anything is promised, so pitched solutions are deliverable.
* Design solutions for both contingency engagements with small physician groups and enterprise FTE / staff\-augmentation models for large groups, hospitals and white\-label billing companies.



  





 3\.
 **Sales content \& enablement** 



* Build compelling, prospect\-specific solution pitches, presentations, and proposals.
* Develop white papers, case studies, and sales engagement content that address real prospect requirements and objections.
* Maintain a reusable library of solution narratives, ROI models, and proof points (including flagship client stories) that the whole sales team can draw on.



  





 4\.
 **Deal re\-engagement \& co\-selling** 



* Re\-open conversations with old and dropped prospects at a deeper, more consultative level than the original outreach.
* Pair with Account Executives on re\-engaged and complex opportunities: co\-run discovery, shape the solution, handle technical and delivery questions, and support negotiation through to close.
* Own solution proposal creation and disciplined follow\-up cadence; hand deal ownership and commercial close mechanics to the AI while remaining the solution lead.



  





 5\.
 **Cross\-functional feedback loop** 



* Feed intelligence back to Marketing on lead quality, segment fit, and messaging gaps by channel.
* Flag recurring capability or partner gaps to leadership and delivery so the solution catalogue keeps pace with demand.

409c0e70.title: Technology Consultant III
409c0e70.description:
Technology Consultant III  



This role has been designed as ‘’Onsite’ with an expectation that you will primarily work from an HPE office.**Who We Are:**


Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge\-to\-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.

**Job Description:**

  



**HPE Operations** is our innovative IT services organization. It provides the expertise to advise, integrate, and accelerate our customers’ outcomes from their digital transformation. Our teams collaborate to transform insight into innovation. In today’s fast paced, hybrid IT world, being at business speed means overcoming IT complexity to match the speed of actions to the speed of opportunities. Deploy the right technology to respond quickly to market possibilities. Join us and redefine what’s next for you.**What you will do:**

***Responsibilities:***

* Responsible for implementing part or all of the technical solution to the client, in accordance with an agreed technical design.
* Occasionally responsible for providing a detailed technical design for enterprise solutions.
* Understands a broad spectrum of company technology in order to provide part or all of a detailed technical design which meets customer requirements.
* Often leads small to medium technical projects.
* Works with and under the direction of the Project/Technical Manager and with customer nominated representatives.
* Liaises with Solutions Architect as appropriate.
* Provides technical support and input on the application of technology to a defined business segment.
* Provides advice on solution and integration opportunities to defined segments.
* Provides technical leadership on specific integration activities that are part of an engagement.
* Provides planning and design support for the development of solution architectures that will be implemented in a multiple system environment.
* Communicates across client community, and is viewed as adding value.
* Demonstrates execution of the company strategy.
* Contributes to knowledge tools and communities, and ensures project learnings are documented and shared.
* Role models Knowledge sharing and re\-use within practice or profession.
* Proactively encourages membership and contributions of others to professional community. Uses professions to meet the relevant certification and professional standards.
* Produces internally published material such as knowledge briefs, service delivery kit components or modules, etc.
* Participates in the selling process in C\&I and works with sales/principals on pre\- sales activities.

**What you need to bring :**

***Education and Experience Required:***

* 5\+ years of professional experience and a Bachelor of Arts/Science or equivalent degree in computer science or related area of study; without a degree, three additional years of relevant professional experience (8\+ years in total).

***Knowledge and Skills:***

* Has sufficient depth and breadth of technical knowledge to be individually responsible for the design and scope of deliverables within a field of expertise.
* Has led small team in delivery of a specific deliverable.
* Has mastered at least one technical discipline with strong knowledge in at least three major technology areas.
* Possesses advanced level of business, technical, or functional knowledge.
* Has ability to perform/drive resolution of problems on combinations and interactions of products.
* Ability to apply technology and consulting to solve a client business problem.
* Able to communicate and present complex issues with assurance and confidence.Demonstrates the use of consulting skills including: questioning, listening, ideas development, permission and rapport, and influencing.
* Ability to conduct/lead oral status/technical interchange meetings with clients on small to medium sized engagements.
* Owns and produces customer documentation. Ability to translate technical details into concise and easy to understand written form. Ability to write relevant components of a proposal document (e.g. answer specific RFP questions). Ability to translate verbal requirements from face to face client meetings into requirements documents, statements of work, and proposals.
* Able to discuss (within own area of expertise) requirements with a customer, and to challenge and clarify when appropriate. From the requirements, able to develop a high level design or plan, and then estimate the amount of effort required to deliver. Able to advise the engagement owner about the risks associated with this work package.
* Ability to work with a team to provide written responses to technical proposals and /or reports/documentation for delivery.

**Additional Skills:**


Accountability, Accountability, Active Learning, Active Listening, Bias, Business Growth, Client Expectations Management, Coaching, Creativity, Critical Thinking, Cross\-Functional Teamwork, Customer Centric Solutions, Customer Relationship Management (CRM), Design Thinking, Empathy, Follow\-Through, Growth Mindset, Information Technology (IT) Infrastructure, Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS), Intellectual Curiosity (Inactive), Long Term Planning, Managing Ambiguity, Process Improvements, Product Services, Relationship Building {\+ 5 more}**What We Can Offer You:**

**Health \& Wellbeing**


We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.

**Personal \& Professional Development**


We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.

**Unconditional Inclusion**


We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.

**Let's Stay Connected:**


Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.


**Job:**


Services**Job Level:**


TCP\_03  



HPE is an Equal Employment Opportunity/ Veterans/Disabled/LGBT employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, or any other protected category, and all decisions we make are made on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. Our goal is to be one global team that is representative of our customers, in an inclusive environment where we can continue to innovate and grow together. Please click here: Equal Employment Opportunity.

**Hewlett Packard Enterprise is EEO Protected Veteran/ Individual with Disabilities.**

  



HPE will comply with all applicable laws related to employer use of arrest and conviction records, including laws requiring employers to consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories.

  



**Recruitment Fraud Alert**


We have become aware of an increase in fraudulent recruitment activities in which individuals impersonate our company or authorized recruitment agencies to offer fake employment opportunities. These scams may occur through false websites, emails, social media, or chat\-based applications and often aim to obtain personal information or money. Please note that Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), its direct and indirect subsidiaries and affiliated companies, and its authorized recruitment agencies/vendors will never charge a candidate a registration fee, hiring fee, or any other fee in connection with its recruitment and hiring process. We also never request personal information such as back account details, Social Security numbers, or national IDs via social media or chat applications.


All legitimate job opportunities will come through official company channels, and candidates are responsible for verifying the credentials of any third party claiming to represent the company. Any reliance on fraudulent communication is at the individual’s own risk, and HPE disclaims legal liability for any resulting damages. If you suspect recruitment fraud, do not share personal information or make any payments and report the incident to your local authorities immediately.

264efe70.title: Business Development Manager (West Region) - Fire Detection Products
264efe70.description:
**Who we are?**

***About Johnson Controls***


Johnson Controls, a global leader in thermal management, mission\-critical building systems, energy efficiency, and decarbonization, helps customers use energy more productively, reduce carbon emissions, and operate with the precision and resilience required in rapidly expanding industries such as data centers, healthcare, pharmaceuticals, advanced manufacturing, and higher education.


For more than 140 years, Johnson Controls has delivered performance where it really matters. Backed by advanced technology, lifecycle services, and an industry\-leading field organization, we elevate customer performance, turn goals into real\-world results, and help move society forward.


Visit johnsoncontrols.com for more information and follow @Johnsoncontrols on social platforms.

**Why JCI:** **https://www.youtube.com/watch?v\=nrbigjbpxkg**

**Asia\-Pacific LinkedIn:** **https://www.linkedin.com/showcase/johnson\-controls\-asia\-pacific/posts/?feedView\=all**

**Career:** **The Power Behind Your Mission**

**OpenBlue:** **This is How a Space Comes Alive**

**Job Summary :**


As a Business Development Manager, you will be responsible for driving business growth and enhancing brand awareness for Fire Detection products in West, India. You will work closely with the sales team, consultants, developers, and end users to generate demand from the specification stage of relevant projects.

  

The main goal of this role is to identify and develop solutions for vertical markets, uncover new business opportunities, and develop strategic sales with prestigious customers such as end users, consultants, and contractors. You will establish and maintain long\-term relationships with clients to promote the sales of Fire Detection products across various sectors.


Part of your daily activities will involve expanding brand awareness in the territory. You will prepare and deliver high\-quality technical seminars, presentations, and product demonstrations to stakeholders, while recommending viable solutions for their project requirements. A strong technical background in Fire Detection is essential.

 **What will you do?**

* Utilize in\-depth technical knowledge of Fire Detection products to support sales teams, consultants, and end users in design and specification.
* Liaise with R\&D, Training, Product Management, and Technical Support to ensure proposals include technical solutions that meet customer needs according to Johnson Controls product strategies.
* Develop necessary design, technical, and marketing tools to support clients on existing and new products.
* Maintain records of target opportunities, quotes, projects, contacts, and correspondence in company\-approved databases to improve forecast accuracy.
* Demonstrate a self\-motivated and proactive attitude, driving territory growth through exceptional planning, organization, and time management skills.

 **What we look for?**

* Bachelor's degree in Engineering or a related field.
* 10\-15 Years of work experience in technical sales or business development related to fire detection products.
* Excellent presentation and persuasion skills, capable of influencing at all levels.
* Strong technical knowledge of Fire Detection brands.
* High level prospecting skills and proactive behavior.
* Good command of the English language.
* Excellent presentation and persuasion skills, with well\-developed communication skills, able to influence at all levels.
* High level prospecting skills. Capability to identify decision makers and stakeholders.
* Very proactive behavior. Work independently as a 100% individual contributor, collaborating cross\-functionally with internal teams
* Drive early engagement with all key stakeholders (End users, Consultants, Architects, PMC’s etc..) in identified opportunities to influence product specifications and build strong mindshare.
* Conduct seminars, demonstrations, etc. in order to generate, develop, and qualify leads for prospective customers.
* Participate in trade shows, special product demonstrations and other events with the objective of increasing sales and enhancing the company’s image.
* Willingness to travel as required.
* Unquestionable integrity and ethics.
* A results\-driven mentality with a can\-do attitude and ability to provide out\-of\-the\-box solutions.
* Knowledge of NFPA 72/IBC \& relevant codes and standards is desirable

**What we offer:**


We offer an exciting and challenging position. Joining us you will become part of a leading global multi\-industrial corporation defined by its stimulating work environment and job satisfaction. In addition, we offer outstanding career development opportunities which will stretch your abilities and channel your talents

***Diversity \& Inclusion*** *Our dedication to diversity and inclusion starts with our values. We lead with integrity and purpose, focusing on the future and aligning with our customers’ vision for success. Our High\-Performance Culture ensures that we have the best talent that is highly engaged and eager to innovate. Our D\&I mission elevates each employee’s responsibility to contribute to our culture. It’s through these contributions that we’ll drive the mindsets and behaviors we need to power our customers’ missions. You have the power. You have the voice. You have the culture in your hands.*

cfebad41.title: SAP PPQM consultant
cfebad41.description:
Job Summary
  
Contribute as a Developer specializing in SAP production planning with focus on demand management long term planning and variant configuration within a hybrid work model. Collaborate with planners and business stakeholders to design configure and enhance SAP solutions that improve forecast accuracy optimize capacity usage and speed product configuration across global operations while ensuring stable day shift support.
  
  

Responsibilities
  
Collaborate with planning and supply chain teams to gather detailed requirements for SAP demand management scenarios and translate them into robust configuration that strengthens forecast driven planning across plants and distribution centers.
  
Configure SAP demand management processes including planned independent requirements creation consumption strategies and planning time fences so that material availability aligns closely with realistic sales expectations and production capabilities.
  
Design and maintain long term planning models in SAP that simulate future capacity material and resource needs enabling decision makers to evaluate multiple demand and supply options before committing to operational plans.
  
Build and optimize variant configuration models including characteristics classes and dependencies so that configurable products can be quoted produced and delivered accurately with minimal manual intervention and rework.
  
Analyze existing PP processes and technical setups to identify inefficiencies or data quality gaps and implement targeted improvements that reduce planning cycle time stockouts and excess inventory.
  
Develop functional specifications for ABAP enhancements user exits and reports related to demand management long term planning and variant configuration ensuring that each development supports clear business outcomes.
  
Perform unit testing integration testing and user acceptance support for new SAP PP solutions documenting test evidence and resolving defects to secure reliable and predictable system behavior in day shift operations.
  
Provide day to day application support for SAP PP demand management long term planning and variant configuration incidents analyzing root causes and implementing sustainable fixes that prevent recurrence and minimize planning disruptions.
  
Coordinate with cross functional teams such as SD MM and FI to ensure that demand signals master data and configuration settings remain consistent across modules which supports end to end process integrity.
  
Prepare clear user guides and process documentation that explain planning scenarios variant configuration usage and key transactions helping business users adopt system capabilities with confidence and autonomy.
  
Advise stakeholders on best practices for forecast consumption planning strategies and configurable product setup so that strategic planning objectives align with system design and data governance standards.
  
Monitor key performance indicators such as forecast accuracy capacity utilization and planning adherence and propose configuration or process changes that steadily improve the organization planning maturity.
  
Support periodic system upgrades and enhancement projects by validating PP related changes adapting configurations where required and ensuring a smooth transition without disrupting regular production planning activities.
  
  

Qualifications
  
Demonstrate hands on experience of at least three years in SAP production planning demand management including configuration of planning strategies consumption modes and planning calendars within a manufacturing environment.
  
Show proven practical exposure to long term planning in SAP by designing planning scenarios running simulations and interpreting planning results to guide capacity and material decisions for business partners.
  
Exhibit strong skills in SAP variant configuration by building and maintaining dependency logic characteristics and configuration profiles that manage product complexity while keeping maintenance effort reasonable.
  
Apply working knowledge of integration between SAP PP and modules such as SD and MM so that demand sales orders material availability and production plans stay synchronized from order entry to execution.
  
Use analytical and problem solving abilities to resolve planning and configuration issues quickly by interpreting logs tracing configuration impacts and collaborating with technical colleagues where needed.
  
Communicate clearly with nontechnical stakeholders in workshops defect reviews and training sessions by explaining planning concepts and system behavior in accessible business language.
  
Adapt effectively to hybrid work arrangements by managing time documentation and remote collaboration tools so that project outcomes and production planning support remain reliable and timely.

f28bcf72.title: Senior Consultant - People
f28bcf72.description:
**Location: Mumbai**
**Tenure: 1\-year contract (Convert basis performance) / Full\-time**  

  

  

**About Sattva**  

  

**We** **Partner** **to deliver social impact at scale**  

  

Sattva Consulting is a global impact consulting firm from India. Since 2009 we have been engaging with communities, business and government to achieve societal impact at scale.  

  

We believe that Civil society, Business and Government all have a critical role to play in building an equitable and sustainable world, and we actively partner with all stakeholders to enable impact through our advisory \& orchestration services, knowledge and data platforms which we have built as public goods for the ecosystem and collaborative solutions and partnerships.  

Our teams are based in India, Singapore, Denmark and UK, but as a global organization our work has spanned 25 countries and 5 continents. For more information, please visit: www.sattva.co.in  

  

**About People's Team**  

  

The People function at Sattva owns all people aspects at Sattva, right from talent acquisition to engagement to learning \& development. The team partners with Business Units to ensure people's well\-being at Sattva.  

  

**The Opportunity**  

  

We are looking for a seasoned HR Business Partner who thrives in fast\-paced, consulting\-led environments. This role will partner closely with Business Unit Leaders to build high\-performing teams, strengthen leadership capability, drive talent decisions, and enable business growth. The ideal candidate is comfortable challenging leaders, using data to influence decisions, and balancing strategic thinking with execution excellence.  

  

**Key Responsibilities**  

  

*Strategic Business Partnering*
\- Partner with Business Unit Heads to understand business priorities, workforce needs, and organizational challenges.
\- Translate business strategy into people strategy and execute initiatives that drive business outcomes.
\- Act as a trusted advisor to leaders on organization design, workforce planning, productivity, and change management.
\- Participate in leadership reviews and provide people insights to support decision\-making.  

  

*Talent Management*
\- Drive end\-to\-end talent reviews, succession planning, and high\-potential identification.
\- Partner with leaders to build robust development plans for critical talent.
\- Ensure timely and quality performance conversations, calibration, and differentiation.
\- Support promotion and career progression discussions based on business readiness and talent potential.  

  

*Employee Engagement \& Culture*
\- Foster a high\-performance culture grounded in accountability, feedback, and continuous learning.
\- Diagnose engagement trends and implement targeted interventions.
\- Coach managers on employee experience, retention strategies, and conflict resolution.
\- Actively identify organizational health risks and proactively recommend solutions.  

  

*Talent Development*
\- Partner with business leaders to identify critical capability gaps and define talent development priorities.
\- Drive talent reviews, succession planning, and individual development planning across the business.
\- Build robust development pathways for high\-potential and critical talent to strengthen the leadership pipeline.
\- Partner with Learning \& Development to deliver capability\-building interventions aligned to business needs.
\- Enable managers to own development conversations, career planning, and continuous feedback.
\- Track development outcomes through readiness, internal mobility, promotions, and capability growth.  

  

*Performance Management*
\- Drive the annual and quarterly performance management processes.
\- Partner with managers on performance improvement plans where required.
\- Ensure consistency, fairness, and data\-backed talent decisions across the business.  

  

*Talent Acquisition Partnership*
\- Collaborate with Talent Acquisition to forecast hiring needs and improve quality of hires.
\- Support leadership hiring and critical role closures.
\- Drive onboarding effectiveness to accelerate productivity.  

  

*People Analytics*
\- Analyze key HR metrics including attrition, productivity, engagement, promotions, diversity, and hiring.
\- Convert data into actionable insights and present recommendations to business leaders.
\- Track and improve key people KPIs across the assigned business.  

  

*HR Projects \& Change Initiatives*
\- Lead organization\-wide HR initiatives including capability building, organizational restructuring, policy implementation, and change programs.
\- Drive continuous improvement in HR processes and employee experience.  

  

  

**Ideal Candidate**  

\- 6\-8 years of progressive HR Business Partnering experience.
\- Experience partnering with consulting, professional services, technology consulting, GCC, or knowledge\-based organizations.
\- Demonstrated experience supporting senior leadership teams and influencing business decisions.  

  

**Skills**  

\- Strong business acumen with the ability to connect people strategy to business outcomes.
\- Excellent stakeholder management and executive presence.
\- Proven experience in performance management, succession planning, talent reviews, and leadership coaching.
\- Strong analytical mindset with proficiency in interpreting HR metrics and workforce data.
\- Exceptional communication, facilitation, and influencing skills.
\- Ability to navigate ambiguity and manage multiple priorities in a fast\-paced environment.  

  

**Preferred Qualifications**  

\- MBA/PGDM in Human Resources or related field.
\- Experience in high\-growth or matrix organizations.
\- Exposure to competency frameworks, leadership development, and organizational design.
\- Familiarity with HRIS and people analytics tools.  

  

  

**Why Sattva?**  

  

It's not about us really \- Because IMPACT is everybody’s business.  

\- Create Impact: Make an impact with the work you do and the solutions you design
\- Work Environment: Thrive in a diverse, inclusive, and collaborative environment
\- Learn \& Grow: Challenge yourself to learn, grow, and deliver the best you can
\- Future Ready: Work on critical issues of today that will affect our collective tomorrow  

  

**How to Prepare?**  

  

This is your opportunity to showcase not only your qualifications but also your unique personality and passion for making a meaningful impact. Approach your application with intentionality, ensuring that each word reflects your commitment to excellence and aligns seamlessly with the values of Sattva.  

  

**FAQs on the Hiring Process**
**Next Steps**  

  

*Sattva is an equal opportunity employer and considers qualified applicants regardless of race, religion, caste, creed, gender, sexual orientation, physical or mental disability, or any other legally protected and/or marginalized characteristics. Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion are essential to our business and we foster an environment of respect and a culture that celebrates diversity and promotes equity and inclusion. We are committed to providing all employees with education, training, and development opportunities to create a workplace where everyone feels safe, respected, and included.*  

  

**Please note: The organization follows a Bring Your Own Device (BYOD) policy, under which employees are required to use their personal laptops for work purposes, subject to compliance with the company’s information security and IT policies. Necessary tools for operating, like MS office etc, will be provided.**

edfc1bae.title: Business Execution Consultant – Market Data
edfc1bae.description:
* **Corporate \& Investment Bank (CIB)** delivers a comprehensive suite of banking, capital markets and advisory solutions, including a full complement of sales, trading and research capabilities, to corporate, government and institutional clients. We focus on our clients' overall financial needs, with consideration and respect for their total relationship with Wells Fargo.

**The Chief Operating Office (COO)** supports the business by delivering platforms, processes and systems across a wide range of disciplines. This includes LOB business management, business solutions \& enablement, client lifecycle management, data management, strategy \& transformation, and innovation.

**About this role:**


Wells Fargo is seeking a Business Execution Consultant to serve as a strategic partner between CIB stakeholders and enterprise Supply Chain Management (SCM), driving Market Data vendor relationship optimization, governance compliance, and timely execution of complex SCM tasks. Learn more about the career areas and lines of business at wellsfargojobs.com.

**In this role, you will:**
* **Stakeholder Engagement:** Act as primary liaison for CIB’s Market Data / Market Research engagements with enterprise and Third\-Party activities; summarize portfolio performance, influence senior stakeholders and present insights
* **Enterprise Interface:** Provide a consistent engagement model between CIB and Enterprise Supply Chain Management (SCM), supporting intake/triage, demand review, sourcing execution, invoicing coordination, third\-party risk activities, and reporting. Ensure Markets’ leaders have clear visibility, ownership, and escalation paths
* **Market Data Portfolio Governance (End\-to\-End Lifecycle):** Drive disciplined governance across the market data lifecycle (intake; due diligence; contracting; onboarding / access provisioning; payment; utilization and ongoing monitoring), improving metadata consistency, inventory integrity, and decision\-grade visibility for renewals, rationalization, and controls.
* **Comparison / Benchmarking:** Lead comparison benchmarking to identify optimal providers (peers/competitors), determine equivalent competencies, and support budgeting/forecasting cycles
* **Access Provisioning \& Entitlements Oversight:** Partner with entitlement teams and relevant workflow owners to ensure requests are fulfilled through the appropriate controlled processes, with clear handoffs and closure discipline
* **Spend Analysis:** Identify cost\-saving opportunities, perform variance analysis, and support budgeting and forecasting cycles
* **SCM Task Ownership:** Oversee completion of Inherent Risk Questionnaires, compliance assessments, and remediation activities
* **Vendor Portfolio Governance:** Lead recurring vendor portfolio reviews; ensure SLA adherence and performance optimization
* **Risk \& Compliance Oversight:** Ensure adherence to regulatory standards and contractual compliance; proactively surface emerging risks, track remediation, and coordinate stakeholder decisions and escalations
* **Process Optimization:** Drive automation initiatives and leverage procurement tools for efficiency (e.g., Ariba, ProcessUnity), improving cycle times, transparency, and data quality across the Market Data portfolio
* **Required Qualifications:**
* 4\+ years of Business Execution, Implementation, or Strategic Planning experience, or equivalent demonstrated through one or a combination of the following: work experience, training, military experience, education
* **Desired Qualifications:**
* Prior experience in an organization related to Market Data or within a Markets organization (sell\-side or buy\-side) with strong understanding of the front\-to\-back trading lifecycle and how vendor services impact trading, risk, operations, and controls
* Comprehensive understanding of market data products and industry vendor dynamics to drive well\-informed, strategic decisions
* Ability to engage and influence senior CIB and Technology stakeholders, translate business needs into execution steps, and communicate clearly under time pressure
* Strong communication, executive interaction and presentation skills
* Analytical mindset with experience in SLA governance and vendor management
* Ability to synthesize portfolio data into actionable insights
* Basic financial acumen for cost analysis and business case development
* Advanced stakeholder management and negotiation skills
* Experience / Familiarity with supply chain management / third party risk frameworks, compliance standards, and procurement tools (Ariba, ProcessUnity)

**Posting End Date:**


9 Jul 2026* ***Job posting may come down early due to volume of applicants.***

**We Value Equal Opportunity**


Wells Fargo is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, status as a protected veteran, or any other legally protected characteristic.


Employees support our focus on building strong customer relationships balanced with a strong risk mitigating and compliance\-driven culture which firmly establishes those disciplines as critical to the success of our customers and company. They are accountable for execution of all applicable risk programs (Credit, Market, Financial Crimes, Operational, Regulatory Compliance), which includes effectively following and adhering to applicable Wells Fargo policies and procedures, appropriately fulfilling risk and compliance obligations, timely and effective escalation and remediation of issues, and making sound risk decisions. There is emphasis on proactive monitoring, governance, risk identification and escalation, as well as making sound risk decisions commensurate with the business unit’s risk appetite and all risk and compliance program requirements.


Candidates applying to job openings posted in Canada: Applications for employment are encouraged from all qualified candidates, including women, persons with disabilities, aboriginal peoples and visible minorities. Accommodation for applicants with disabilities is available upon request in connection with the recruitment process.

**Applicants with Disabilities**


To request a medical accommodation during the application or interview process, visit Disability Inclusion at Wells Fargo.

**Drug and Alcohol Policy**

  

Wells Fargo maintains a drug free workplace. Please see our Drug and Alcohol Policy to learn more.

**Wells Fargo Recruitment and Hiring Requirements:**


a. Third\-Party recordings are prohibited unless authorized by Wells Fargo.


b. Wells Fargo requires you to directly represent your own experiences during the recruiting and hiring process.

d557e6f6.title: Associate, Client Support
d557e6f6.description:
**Associate, Client Support**
=============================


JOB\_DESCRIPTION.SHARE.HTML
CAROUSEL\_PARAGRAPH


JOB\_DESCRIPTION.SHARE.HTML
* Gurgaon, India
* Customer Success \& Support Group
* 327479
**Job Description**
-------------------

  

  

**About the Role:**
===================


**Grade Level (for internal use):**


07
**Work** **Shift:** This is a Night shift position. You should be flexible to work on any other shift depending on the business need.

  

**The** **Team:** The Client Operations team is responsible for providing client support on our business intelligence tool by holding investigative conversations \& driving product usage and revenue. Being present in the US, Philippines \& Pakistan makes it a truly global team. As a member of the Client Services team, you will serve as a product generalist for the Capital IQ and Capital IQ Pro platforms. Working as a team is essential in this role. Additionally, Client Services interact with many internal teams, including Sales, Content, Product, and Technical Support.

  

**The** **Impact:** As the face of the organization, your regular day requires you to answer client queries while showcasing your vast knowledge of our tools, data, and the industries we cover. Additionally, you’ll help to accelerate the quality and timeliness of the data, improve operational efficiency to reduce error rates, and improve support survey scores to help maintain retention rates and drive revenue increases.

  

**What’s** **in** **it** **for** **you:**


* Your communication will further improve as you speak to various client partners.
* You will learn how to critically see problems and identify solutions to give the first\-class support to our clients.
* Sharpen your professional and social skills while interacting with leaders from different industries.
* Develop your industry knowledge by working with our diverse client base at various financial institutions, government organizations \& Universities located across the globe.
* Be part of a company that is a results\-focused meritocracy. We set high standards and value accountability. We seek to identify and reward extraordinary performance with growth opportunities.
* We pride ourselves in helping our employees attain their career dreams and reach their potential. We value employee development and provide training that will hone both soft and hard skills as you go along with your career with us.
  

**Responsibilities:** As a Product Consultant within the Capital IQ Client Services Team Gurgaon, your day\-to\-day responsibilities will be to:


* Deliver the best client experience while providing support and finance\-related research.
* Be the client’s advocate in getting the best possible solution to their inquiries. We partner with our clients to ensure that their issues are fully resolved, and they are improving our products’ potential.
* Be a channel for client feedback. We coordinate with our Content and Product Management team to resolve client inquiries. We also help our content teams develop accuracy by providing real\-time client feedback. We echo our clients’ ideas and feedback to our team to make sure that we stay substantial to the market.
  

**What we’re looking for:**


**Basic** **Qualifications:**


* Master’s degree in Marketing, Finance, ACCA Finalist or Affiliate
* Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal
* Attention\-to\-detail and possess strong critical thinking skills
* Exhibit interest in learning
* Basic knowledge of finance, the financial market, and our company.
  

**Preferred Qualifications:**


* Finance background
* Adaptable to rapid change
* Provide and accept constructive feedback
* Willing to lead projects and stretch assignments

**About S\&P Global Market Intelligence**
  

  

At S\&P Global Market Intelligence, a division of S\&P Global we understand the importance of accurate, deep and insightful information. Our team of experts delivers unrivaled insights and leading data and technology solutions, partnering with customers to expand their perspective, operate with confidence, and make decisions with conviction.
  

  

For more information, visit www.spglobal.com/marketintelligence.


**What’s In It For** **You?**


**Our Mission:**

Advancing Essential Intelligence.


**Our People:**


We're more than 35,000 strong worldwide—so we're able to understand nuances while having a broad perspective. Our team is driven by curiosity and a shared belief that Essential Intelligence can help build a more prosperous future for us all.From finding new ways to measure sustainability to analyzing energy transition across the supply chain to building workflow solutions that make it easy to tap into insight and apply it. We are changing the way people see things and empowering them to make an impact on the world we live in. We’re committed to a more equitable future and to helping our customers find new, sustainable ways of doing business. Join us and help create the critical insights that truly make a difference.


**Our Values:**


**Integrity, Discovery, Partnership**

  

  

Throughout our history, the world's leading organizations have relied on us for the Essential Intelligence they need to make confident decisions about the road ahead. We start with a foundation of integrity in all we do, bring a spirit of discovery to our work, and collaborate in close partnership with each other and our customers to achieve shared goals.
  

  

**Benefits:**

We take care of you, so you can take care of business. We care about our people. That’s why we provide everything you—and your career—need to thrive at S\&P Global.
  

  

Our benefits include:


* Health \& Wellness: Health care coverage designed for the mind and body.
* Flexible Downtime: Generous time off helps keep you energized for your time on.
* Continuous Learning: Access a wealth of resources to grow your career and learn valuable new skills.
* Invest in Your Future: Secure your financial future through competitive pay, retirement planning, a continuing education program with a company\-matched student loan contribution, and financial wellness programs.
* Family Friendly Perks: It’s not just about you. S\&P Global has perks for your partners and little ones, too, with some best\-in class benefits for families.
* Beyond the Basics: From retail discounts to referral incentive awards—small perks can make a big difference.

For more information on benefits by country visit: https://spgbenefits.com/benefit\-summaries


**Global Hiring and Opportunity at S\&P Global:**


At S\&P Global, we are committed to fostering a connected and engaged workplace where all individuals have access to opportunities based on their skills, experience, and contributions. Our hiring practices emphasize fairness, transparency, and merit, ensuring that we attract and retain top talent. By valuing different perspectives and promoting a culture of respect and collaboration, we drive innovation and power global markets.


**Recruitment Fraud Alert:**


If you receive an email from a spglobalind.com domain or any other regionally based domains, it is a scam and should be reported to reportfraud@spglobal.com. S\&P Global never requires any candidate to pay money for job applications, interviews, offer letters, “pre\-employment training” or for equipment/delivery of equipment. Stay informed and protect yourself from recruitment fraud by reviewing our guidelines, fraudulent domains, and how to report suspicious activity here.


\-


**Equal Opportunity Employer**


S\&P Global is an equal opportunity employer and all qualified candidates will receive consideration for employment without regard to race/ethnicity, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, marital status, military veteran status, unemployment status, or any other status protected by law. Only electronic job submissions will be considered for employment.

  

If you need an accommodation during the application process due to a disability, please send an email to: EEO.Compliance@spglobal.com and your request will be forwarded to the appropriate person.
  

  

**US Candidates Only:** Know Your Rights: Workplace discrimination is illegal


\-
