12283fd4.title: Business Analyst- Procurement Data Analytics
12283fd4.description:
Business Analyst – Procurement Data Analytics
 



  





 📍 Location: India
 



 💼 Experience: 5–8 Years
 



  





 We are looking for a Business Analyst – Procurement Data Analytics to join our team and drive data\-driven procurement transformation initiatives. The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in procurement analytics, business intelligence, and data visualization, with the ability to translate business requirements into actionable insights.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



 Analyze procurement data to identify spend trends, supplier performance, and cost optimization opportunities.
 



 Develop interactive dashboards and reports using Power BI and Tableau.
 



 Perform data extraction, analysis, and reporting using SQL and Advanced Excel.
 



 Collaborate with Procurement, Supply Chain, Finance, and IT teams to gather business requirements and deliver analytical solutions.
 



 Monitor procurement KPIs and provide insights to support strategic decision\-making.
 



 Drive process improvements and reporting automation across procurement operations.
 



 Work with procurement platforms such as SAP Ariba, Coupa, Oracle Procurement, or similar ERP systems.
 



 Required Skills
 



 5\+ years of experience in Business Analysis, Procurement Analytics, or Data Analytics.
 



 Hands\-on experience with Power BI, Tableau, SQL, and Advanced Excel.
 



 Experience with procurement applications such as SAP Ariba, Coupa, Oracle Procurement, or SAP MM.
 



 Knowledge of procurement processes, spend analysis, supplier performance, and reporting.
 



 Exposure to Python or KNIME is an added advantage.
 



 Excellent analytical, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
 



 Qualifications
 



 Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, Data Analytics, Engineering, or a related field.
 



 Skills
 



  





 Procurement Analytics \| Business Analysis \| Power BI \| Tableau \| SQL \| Advanced Excel \| SAP Ariba \| Coupa \| Oracle Procurement \| Procurement Reporting \| Spend Analysis \| Supplier Performance \| Business Intelligence \| Data Analytics \| Stakeholder Management
 



  





 If you're passionate about leveraging data to transform procurement and drive business value, we'd love to hear from you!

20cdff13.title: Business Analyst – Logistics & Shipping
20cdff13.description:
**Company Description** 
 Yoda Tech Pte. Ltd., headquartered in Singapore, specializes in delivering practical, modular digital solutions for organizations seeking to optimize operations. Instead of large, disruptive transformations, the company focuses on small, logical micro\-initiatives powered by ready\-to\-use micro\-bots. Yoda Tech’s approach emphasizes automation, robotization, and power application development to streamline business processes and reduce IT operations costs. The team also provides infrastructure, maintenance, and support services to ensure clients’ systems remain efficient, reliable, and scalable. This combination of innovation and operational focus creates a dynamic environment for professionals who want to work at the intersection of technology and process improvement.
 


 Job Summary
 
 We are seeking an experienced Business Analyst with a strong background in the Logistics and Shipping industry. The ideal candidate will work closely with business stakeholders and technology teams to analyze business processes, gather requirements, identify improvement opportunities, and support the successful delivery of business and technology initiatives across logistics and shipping operations.
 


 Key ResponsibilitiesBusiness Analysis \& Requirements Gathering
 * Collaborate with business stakeholders to understand operational challenges and business objectives.
* Gather, analyze, and document business, functional, and system requirements.
* Prepare Business Requirement Documents (BRDs), Functional Requirement Specifications (FRS), process flows, and user stories.
* Conduct stakeholder interviews, workshops, and requirement review sessions.


 Logistics \& Shipping Operations
 * Analyze end\-to\-end logistics and shipping processes, including transportation, freight forwarding, warehouse operations, inventory management, shipment tracking, and customer service.
* Identify process gaps, inefficiencies, and opportunities for operational improvements.
* Support business transformation and process optimization initiatives.
* Work closely with logistics providers, carriers, and internal operational teams.


 Project Management \& Delivery Support
 * Coordinate with project managers, developers, QA teams, and business users throughout the project lifecycle.
* Assist in solution design discussions and ensure business requirements are accurately translated into system solutions.
* Support User Acceptance Testing (UAT), test case preparation, defect tracking, and issue resolution.
* Facilitate change management activities and end\-user training.


 Reporting \& Process Improvement
 * Monitor key business and operational metrics.
* Develop reports, dashboards, and performance tracking mechanisms.
* Conduct data analysis to support business decision\-making.
* Recommend process improvements to enhance efficiency, service quality, and cost optimization.


 Required Qualifications
 * Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, Logistics, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field.
* 5\+ years of experience as a Business Analyst.
* Proven experience in Logistics, Shipping, Transportation, Freight Forwarding, or Supply Chain domains.
* Strong experience in requirement gathering, documentation, and stakeholder management.
* Knowledge of Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) and Agile methodologies.


 Preferred Qualifications
 * MBA or equivalent postgraduate qualification.
* Certifications such as CBAP, PMI\-PBA, CSCP, or Agile certifications.
* Experience working with Transportation Management Systems (TMS), Warehouse Management Systems (WMS), ERP systems, or Supply Chain platforms.


 Required SkillsFunctional Skills
 * Business Analysis
* Requirements Gathering \& Documentation
* Process Mapping \& Gap Analysis
* Stakeholder Management
* Supply Chain \& Logistics Operations
* Business Process Improvement


 Technical Skills
 * SQL (preferred)
* Microsoft Excel (Advanced)
* Power BI or Tableau
* JIRA and Confluence
* ERP/TMS/WMS Systems


 Key Competencies
 * Strong analytical and problem\-solving abilities
* Excellent communication and presentation skills
* Ability to manage multiple stakeholders and priorities
* Detail\-oriented with strong documentation skills
* Ability to work independently and in cross\-functional teams


 Success Metrics
 * Timely and accurate delivery of business requirements
* Improved operational efficiency and process effectiveness
* Successful implementation of business and technology initiatives
* Enhanced stakeholder satisfaction and user adoption
* Reduction in operational issues and process bottlenecks

d00c9c2e.title: Business Analyst
d00c9c2e.description:
We're looking for
 **Business Analysts (India)!**
**Responsibilities**
* Requirements Gathering: Work closely with business stakeholders to elicit and document clear, comprehensive requirements for AI and digital transformation projects. Understand core business processes, identify pain points, and align with strategic objectives.
* Business Process Analysis: Analyze current business processes to identify opportunities for optimization and automation through AI and digital technologies.
* AI Solution Scoping: Collaborate with the AI and Digital Transformation Officer and technical teams to define the scope and feasibility of AI projects, considering factors like resource requirements and potential impact.
* Data Analysis: Analyze data sources and assess data quality to ensure that AI projects have access to reliable and relevant data for model training and decision\-making.
* Use Case Prioritization: Evaluate and prioritize AI use cases based on their potential business value and alignment with organizational goals.
* Change Management: Support change management efforts during AI and digital transformation initiatives, including user training and communication strategies.
* User Acceptance Testing (UAT): Coordinate UAT activities, ensuring that AI solutions and digital transformations meet defined business requirements and expectations.
* Project Documentation: Maintain detailed documentation of business requirements, process workflows, and all project\-related artifacts.
* Collaboration: Work closely with cross\-functional teams, including AI engineers, data scientists, developers, and various stakeholders, to ensure smooth project delivery.
* Research Support: Conduct essential research to support CAIDO/AIDO in preparing AI Strategy Roadmaps or providing advisory on specific AI projects.


**Qualifications**
* A Bachelor's or Master's degree in Business Administration, Computer Science, Data Science, or a related field.
* Expertise working on projects related to AI, digital transformation, or broader technology initiatives.
* Familiarity with the industry or domain in which the AI and digital transformation projects will be implemented.
* A solid understanding of AI technologies, core machine learning concepts, and digital transformation frameworks.
* Familiarity with data concepts, data modeling, and various data analysis techniques.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills to effectively identify business needs and recommend suitable AI solutions.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills to interact effectively with stakeholders at all levels and convey complex technical concepts to non\-technical audiences.


 (
 **\*Note:** 
 Scoutit is an independent candidate sourcing partner for this hiring. All applications, candidate screening, and hiring\-related actions are conducted directly by the respective employer’s authorized recruitment team. Relevant candidates will be contacted via email and asked to fill in additional details as part of the next stage of the application process.)
   

  

 Skills: projects,communication,business requirements

63cc95e1.title: Business Analyst
63cc95e1.description:
**Job description** 




  





**Job Title: Business Analyst** 




**Location: Mumbai, Andheri** 




**Experience: 2\-5 Years** 




**Type: Full\-time \| On\-site** 




  





**Kindly share your resume at careers@fatakpay.com** 




  





**About the Company** 




 FDPL Finance Pvt. Ltd. is a Mumbai\-based Non\-Banking Financial Company (NBFC) operating in the BFSI and digital lending space. The company relies on strong cross\-functional collaboration between business, product, risk, and technology teams to continuously improve processes and products across the lending lifecycle.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 The Business Analyst will bridge business needs and data\-driven solutions, gathering requirements, analysing processes, and working with cross\-functional teams to improve efficiency and decision\-making across lending operations. The role combines process analysis, data analysis, and stakeholder management.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




 · Gather and document business requirements from stakeholders across credit, operations, product, and technology teams.
 



 · Analyse existing business processes across the loan lifecycle and identify opportunities for efficiency and improvement.
 



 · Use SQL (MySQL / PostgreSQL / BigQuery) to extract and analyse data supporting business cases and process reviews.
 



 · Prepare business requirement documents (BRDs), process flows, and impact assessments for new initiatives.
 



 · Work with technology and product teams to translate business requirements into actionable specifications.
 



 · Track the implementation of process and system changes, and measure impact against defined success metrics.
 



 · Build reports and presentations that communicate findings and recommendations clearly to leadership.
 



  





**Eligibility / Qualification** 




 · Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Business Administration, Commerce, Engineering, or a related field.
 



 · Certifications in business analysis (e.g., CBAP) or SQL / BI tools are an added advantage.
 



  





**Experience Required** 




 · 2 – 5 years of relevant experience in business analysis, process improvement, or related roles within BFSI / lending.
 



 · Industry Preference: NBFC / Fintech / Banking / Financial Services.
 



  





**Required Skills** 




 · Strong requirement\-gathering and documentation skills (BRDs, process flows, user stories).
 



 · Proficiency in SQL for data\-driven analysis and validation of business cases.
 



 · Working knowledge of BI tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau) for reporting.
 



 · Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills with a structured approach to process analysis.
 



 · Excellent stakeholder management and cross\-functional coordination skills.
 



 · Clear written and verbal communication for presenting findings to leadership.

b76c8284.title: Director, Software Engineering - Data Platform, Hyderabad
b76c8284.description:
***Welcome to Warner Bros. Discovery… the stuff dreams are made of.***

**Who We Are…**

When we say, “the stuff dreams are made of,” we’re not just referring to the world of wizards, dragons and superheroes, or even to the wonders of Planet Earth. Behind WBD’s vast portfolio of iconic content and beloved brands, are the *storytellers* bringing our characters to life, the *creators* bringing them to your living rooms and the *dreamers* creating what’s next…


From brilliant creatives, to technology trailblazers, across the globe, WBD offers career defining opportunities, thoughtfully curated benefits, and the tools to explore and grow into your best selves. Here you are supported, here you are celebrated, here you can thrive.

**Director****, Software****Engineering \- Data Platform, Hyderabad**

**About Warner Bros. Discovery:**


Warner Bros. Discovery, a premier global media and entertainment company, offers audiences the world's most differentiated and complete portfolio of content, brands and franchises across television, film, streaming and gaming. The new company combines Warner Media’s premium entertainment, sports and news assets with Discovery's leading non\-fiction and international entertainment and sports businesses.


For more information, please visit www.wbd.com

**Meet our Team:**


The Data Platform team at Warner Bros. Discovery powers data\-driven experiences across global products like Max, Discovery\+, Sports, Studios, and News. The team builds and operates a scalable, multi\-tenant data ecosystem that enables analytics, real\-time insights, and machine learning use cases across the organization. Positioned at the core of the data journey, the team is responsible for ingesting, processing, and transforming large volumes of client and server\-side data into reliable and high\-quality datasets. Operating at the intersection of data and platform engineering, the team focuses on building robust pipelines, ensuring data quality and governance, and driving innovation in real\-time processing, observability, and modern data infrastructure. The team collaborates closely with product, analytics, and engineering stakeholders to enable data\-driven decision\-making at scale.

**Role Summary**

* Warner Bros. Discovery is looking for a Director of Engineering to lead critical Data Platform capabilities across data infrastructure, data processing, self\-service enablement, governance, metadata, access, reliability, and operational excellence.
* This is a senior engineering leadership role for a leader who can manage engineering managers and senior technical teams, drive platform strategy, improve execution discipline, and operate large\-scale systems with strong reliability and cost awareness.
* The role does not require deep expertise in one specific technology or deep machine learning specialization. However, the candidate must be well versed in modern data platform concepts, distributed systems, cloud platforms, engineering operations, and enterprise\-grade governance.
**Role Scope**

* Lead engineering teams responsible for foundational Data Platform capabilities used across analytics, data engineering, business intelligence, operational workflows, and AI/ML enablement.
* Own execution across platform infrastructure, data collection, batch and streaming data processing, metadata, access governance, FinOps, observability, and self\-service platform capabilities.
* Drive platform maturity with a focus on reliability, automation, governance, developer experience, security, cost efficiency, and operational readiness.
* Partner closely with engineering, product, program management, analytics, data science, operations engineering, security, and business stakeholders.
**Key Responsibilities**

**Engineering Leadership**

* Lead multiple engineering teams and managers responsible for critical Data Platform services.
* Build a strong engineering culture focused on ownership, customer impact, reliability, inclusion, and high standards.
* Coach managers and senior engineers to improve technical judgment, execution quality, stakeholder communication, and operational discipline.
* Create clear operating mechanisms for roadmap planning, prioritization, delivery tracking, risk management, and leadership updates.
* Hire, develop, and retain strong engineering managers, staff engineers, senior engineers, and emerging technical leaders.
**Platform Strategy and Delivery**

* Translate business and platform strategy into clear engineering roadmaps, milestones, and measurable outcomes.
* Drive modernization of data platform capabilities across storage, compute, orchestration, ingestion, access, metadata, governance, and self\-service workflows.
* Balance near\-term delivery needs with long\-term architecture quality, operational simplicity, and cost efficiency.
* Partner with peer leaders to align priorities across overlapping platform workstreams and reduce duplication of effort.
* Ensure platform investments improve developer productivity, data trust, business velocity, governance, and operational scale.
**Operational Excellence**

* Establish strong operational practices across owned systems, including SLIs/SLOs, dashboards, alerts, runbooks, incident response, RCAs/COEs, and post\-incident learning.
* Improve alert quality, reduce manual toil, and increase automation across platform operations.
* Ensure major launches have clear readiness criteria, monitoring, rollback strategy, ownership, support model, and communication plan.
* Drive a culture of proactive reliability engineering, cost\-aware design, and continuous improvement.
* Partner with operational tooling and platform teams to improve observability, cost transparency, anomaly detection, and self\-service support.
**Governance, Metadata, and Data Trust**

* Ensure platform systems support secure, compliant, and auditable access to data.
* Drive adoption of metadata, lineage, ownership, classification, data quality, access review, and lifecycle management practices.
* Improve the discoverability and trustworthiness of data assets through cataloging, documentation, schema management, and data product standards.
* Partner with governance, privacy, and security stakeholders to embed controls into platform workflows rather than treating them as manual afterthoughts.
**Self\-Service and Developer Experience**

* Lead initiatives that reduce manual engineering dependency through self\-service onboarding, automated access workflows, reusable templates, and standard platform patterns.
* Improve developer experience for teams building, deploying, operating, and governing data products.
* Create consistent platform standards that help teams move faster while staying within reliability, privacy, security, and cost guardrails.
**Cross\-Functional Collaboration**

* Work closely with product, TPM, analytics, data science, operations engineering, security, finance, and business teams.
* Drive alignment on roadmap priorities, launch readiness, ownership boundaries, operational support, and business impact.
* Represent Data Platform in architecture reviews, roadmap discussions, leadership forums, and executive updates.
* Communicate complex platform topics in a clear, practical, and outcome\-focused manner.
**Required Qualifications**

* 15\+ years of professional software engineering experience.
* 5\+ years of experience leading engineering managers and large engineering teams.
* Experience operating large\-scale distributed systems, data platforms, cloud platforms, or infrastructure platforms.
* Strong understanding of modern data platform concepts such as batch and stream processing, data lakehouse architecture, metadata, governance, access control, orchestration, observability, and cost management.
* Proven ability to lead platform programs across multiple teams and stakeholders.
* Strong operational excellence mindset, including incident management, monitoring, SLOs, runbooks, RCA/COE practices, and production readiness.
* Experience driving self\-service platforms, automation, developer productivity, and scalable engineering workflows.
* Ability to make sound technical trade\-offs without needing to be the deepest expert in every technology.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to simplify complex topics for senior leadership and cross\-functional partners.
* Proven track record of hiring, coaching, and developing managers and senior technical talent.
* Experience working in Agile or continuous delivery engineering environments.
**Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience with large\-scale data platforms using technologies such as Databricks, Snowflake, Apache Flink, Kafka, Airflow, Apache Iceberg, Spark, Kubernetes, AWS, or similar platforms.
* Experience with metadata, catalog, lineage, governance, and data quality platforms such as DataHub, Unity Catalog, Monte Carlo, or similar tools.
* Experience with FinOps, cloud cost optimization, and cost attribution for large\-scale data workloads.
* Exposure to AI/ML or GenAI platform enablement, including governance, observability, model or prompt lifecycle, or data readiness for AI use cases.
* Experience leading platform migrations, modernization, or vendor\-lock\-in reduction efforts.
* Experience supporting data products, semantic layers, data certification, and self\-service onboarding.
* Experience working in media, streaming, advertising, consumer product, or high\-scale digital platform environments.
**What Success Looks Like**

* Engineering teams deliver faster with clearer ownership, stronger execution discipline, and fewer escalations.
* Platform capabilities become easier for internal teams to adopt through self\-service workflows, automation, and clear standards.
* Production reliability improves through stronger monitoring, runbooks, launch readiness, and incident learning.
* Data assets become easier to discover, trust, govern, and operate.
* Platform costs become more visible, attributable, and actively optimized.
* Cross\-team launches have better readiness, rollback planning, and stakeholder alignment.
* Engineering managers and senior engineers grow into stronger leaders.
**What we offer**

* A Great Place to work
* Equal opportunity employer
* Fast track growth opportunities
**How We Get Things Done…**


This last bit is probably the most important! Here at WBD, our guiding principles are the core values by which we operate and are central to how we get things done. You can find them at www.wbd.com/guiding\-principles/ along with some insights from the team on what they mean and how they show up in their day to day. We hope they resonate with you and look forward to discussing them during your interview.

**Championing Inclusion at WBD**


Warner Bros. Discovery embraces the opportunity to build a workforce that reflects a wide array of perspectives, backgrounds and experiences. Being an equal opportunity employer means that we take seriously our responsibility to consider qualified candidates on the basis of merit, regardless of sex, gender identity, ethnicity, age, sexual orientation, religion or belief, marital status, pregnancy, parenthood, disability or any other category protected by law.
If you’re a qualified candidate with a disability and you require adjustments or accommodations during the job application and/or recruitment process, please visit our accessibility page for instructions to submit your request.

* Translate business and platform strategy into clear engineering roadmaps, milestones, and measurable outcomes.
* Drive modernization of data platform capabilities across storage, compute, orchestration, ingestion, access, metadata, governance, and self\-service workflows.
* Balance near\-term delivery needs with long\-term architecture quality, operational simplicity, and cost efficiency.
* Partner with peer leaders to align priorities across overlapping platform workstreams and reduce duplication of effort.
* Ensure platform investments improve developer productivity, data trust, business velocity, governance, and operational scale.
**Operational Excellence**

* Establish strong operational practices across owned systems, including SLIs/SLOs, dashboards, alerts, runbooks, incident response, RCAs/COEs, and post\-incident learning.
* Improve alert quality, reduce manual toil, and increase automation across platform operations.
* Ensure major launches have clear readiness criteria, monitoring, rollback strategy, ownership, support model, and communication plan.
* Drive a culture of proactive reliability engineering, cost\-aware design, and continuous improvement.
* Partner with operational tooling and platform teams to improve observability, cost transparency, anomaly detection, and self\-service support.
**Governance, Metadata, and Data Trust**

* Ensure platform systems support secure, compliant, and auditable access to data.
* Drive adoption of metadata, lineage, ownership, classification, data quality, access review, and lifecycle management practices.
* Improve the discoverability and trustworthiness of data assets through cataloging, documentation, schema management, and data product standards.
* Partner with governance, privacy, and security stakeholders to embed controls into platform workflows rather than treating them as manual afterthoughts.
**Self\-Service and Developer Experience**

* Lead initiatives that reduce manual engineering dependency through self\-service onboarding, automated access workflows, reusable templates, and standard platform patterns.
* Improve developer experience for teams building, deploying, operating, and governing data products.
* Create consistent platform standards that help teams move faster while staying within reliability, privacy, security, and cost guardrails.
**Cross\-Functional Collaboration**

* Work closely with product, TPM, analytics, data science, operations engineering, security, finance, and business teams.
* Drive alignment on roadmap priorities, launch readiness, ownership boundaries, operational support, and business impact.
* Represent Data Platform in architecture reviews, roadmap discussions, leadership forums, and executive updates.
* Communicate complex platform topics in a clear, practical, and outcome\-focused manner.
**Required Qualifications**

* 15\+ years of professional software engineering experience.
* 5\+ years of experience leading engineering managers and large engineering teams.
* Experience operating large\-scale distributed systems, data platforms, cloud platforms, or infrastructure platforms.
* Strong understanding of modern data platform concepts such as batch and stream processing, data lakehouse architecture, metadata, governance, access control, orchestration, observability, and cost management.
* Proven ability to lead platform programs across multiple teams and stakeholders.
* Strong operational excellence mindset, including incident management, monitoring, SLOs, runbooks, RCA/COE practices, and production readiness.
* Experience driving self\-service platforms, automation, developer productivity, and scalable engineering workflows.
* Ability to make sound technical trade\-offs without needing to be the deepest expert in every technology.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to simplify complex topics for senior leadership and cross\-functional partners.
* Proven track record of hiring, coaching, and developing managers and senior technical talent.
* Experience working in Agile or continuous delivery engineering environments.
**Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience with large\-scale data platforms using technologies such as Databricks, Snowflake, Apache Flink, Kafka, Airflow, Apache Iceberg, Spark, Kubernetes, AWS, or similar platforms.
* Experience with metadata, catalog, lineage, governance, and data quality platforms such as DataHub, Unity Catalog, Monte Carlo, or similar tools.
* Experience with FinOps, cloud cost optimization, and cost attribution for large\-scale data workloads.
* Exposure to AI/ML or GenAI platform enablement, including governance, observability, model or prompt lifecycle, or data readiness for AI use cases.
* Experience leading platform migrations, modernization, or vendor\-lock\-in reduction efforts.
* Experience supporting data products, semantic layers, data certification, and self\-service onboarding.
* Experience working in media, streaming, advertising, consumer product, or high\-scale digital platform environments.
**What Success Looks Like**

* Engineering teams deliver faster with clearer ownership, stronger execution discipline, and fewer escalations.
* Platform capabilities become easier for internal teams to adopt through self\-service workflows, automation, and clear standards.
* Production reliability improves through stronger monitoring, runbooks, launch readiness, and incident learning.
* Data assets become easier to discover, trust, govern, and operate.
* Platform costs become more visible, attributable, and actively optimized.
* Cross\-team launches have better readiness, rollback planning, and stakeholder alignment.
* Engineering managers and senior engineers grow into stronger leaders.
**What we offer**

* A Great Place to work
* Equal opportunity employer
* Fast track growth opportunities
**How We Get Things Done…**


This last bit is probably the most important! Here at WBD, our guiding principles are the core values by which we operate and are central to how we get things done. You can find them at www.wbd.com/guiding\-principles/ along with some insights from the team on what they mean and how they show up in their day to day. We hope they resonate with you and look forward to discussing them during your interview.

**Championing Inclusion at WBD**


Warner Bros. Discovery embraces the opportunity to build a workforce that reflects a wide array of perspectives, backgrounds and experiences. Being an equal opportunity employer means that we take seriously our responsibility to consider qualified candidates on the basis of merit, regardless of sex, gender identity, ethnicity, age, sexual orientation, religion or belief, marital status, pregnancy, parenthood, disability or any other category protected by law.
If you’re a qualified candidate with a disability and you require adjustments or accommodations during the job application and/or recruitment process, please visit our accessibility page for instructions to submit your request.

74221cdf.title: Director, Software Engineering - Data Platform, Hyderabad
74221cdf.description:
***Welcome to Warner Bros. Discovery… the stuff dreams are made of.***

**Who We Are…**

When we say, “the stuff dreams are made of,” we’re not just referring to the world of wizards, dragons and superheroes, or even to the wonders of Planet Earth. Behind WBD’s vast portfolio of iconic content and beloved brands, are the *storytellers* bringing our characters to life, the *creators* bringing them to your living rooms and the *dreamers* creating what’s next…


From brilliant creatives, to technology trailblazers, across the globe, WBD offers career defining opportunities, thoughtfully curated benefits, and the tools to explore and grow into your best selves. Here you are supported, here you are celebrated, here you can thrive.

**Director****, Software****Engineering \- Data Platform, Hyderabad**

**About Warner Bros. Discovery:**


Warner Bros. Discovery, a premier global media and entertainment company, offers audiences the world's most differentiated and complete portfolio of content, brands and franchises across television, film, streaming and gaming. The new company combines Warner Media’s premium entertainment, sports and news assets with Discovery's leading non\-fiction and international entertainment and sports businesses.


For more information, please visit www.wbd.com

**Meet our Team:**


The Data Platform team at Warner Bros. Discovery powers data\-driven experiences across global products like Max, Discovery\+, Sports, Studios, and News. The team builds and operates a scalable, multi\-tenant data ecosystem that enables analytics, real\-time insights, and machine learning use cases across the organization. Positioned at the core of the data journey, the team is responsible for ingesting, processing, and transforming large volumes of client and server\-side data into reliable and high\-quality datasets. Operating at the intersection of data and platform engineering, the team focuses on building robust pipelines, ensuring data quality and governance, and driving innovation in real\-time processing, observability, and modern data infrastructure. The team collaborates closely with product, analytics, and engineering stakeholders to enable data\-driven decision\-making at scale.

**Role Summary**

* Warner Bros. Discovery is looking for a Director of Engineering to lead critical Data Platform capabilities across data infrastructure, data processing, self\-service enablement, governance, metadata, access, reliability, and operational excellence.
* This is a senior engineering leadership role for a leader who can manage engineering managers and senior technical teams, drive platform strategy, improve execution discipline, and operate large\-scale systems with strong reliability and cost awareness.
* The role does not require deep expertise in one specific technology or deep machine learning specialization. However, the candidate must be well versed in modern data platform concepts, distributed systems, cloud platforms, engineering operations, and enterprise\-grade governance.
**Role Scope**

* Lead engineering teams responsible for foundational Data Platform capabilities used across analytics, data engineering, business intelligence, operational workflows, and AI/ML enablement.
* Own execution across platform infrastructure, data collection, batch and streaming data processing, metadata, access governance, FinOps, observability, and self\-service platform capabilities.
* Drive platform maturity with a focus on reliability, automation, governance, developer experience, security, cost efficiency, and operational readiness.
* Partner closely with engineering, product, program management, analytics, data science, operations engineering, security, and business stakeholders.
**Key Responsibilities**

**Engineering Leadership**

* Lead multiple engineering teams and managers responsible for critical Data Platform services.
* Build a strong engineering culture focused on ownership, customer impact, reliability, inclusion, and high standards.
* Coach managers and senior engineers to improve technical judgment, execution quality, stakeholder communication, and operational discipline.
* Create clear operating mechanisms for roadmap planning, prioritization, delivery tracking, risk management, and leadership updates.
* Hire, develop, and retain strong engineering managers, staff engineers, senior engineers, and emerging technical leaders.
**Platform Strategy and Delivery**

* Translate business and platform strategy into clear engineering roadmaps, milestones, and measurable outcomes.
* Drive modernization of data platform capabilities across storage, compute, orchestration, ingestion, access, metadata, governance, and self\-service workflows.
* Balance near\-term delivery needs with long\-term architecture quality, operational simplicity, and cost efficiency.
* Partner with peer leaders to align priorities across overlapping platform workstreams and reduce duplication of effort.
* Ensure platform investments improve developer productivity, data trust, business velocity, governance, and operational scale.
**Operational Excellence**

* Establish strong operational practices across owned systems, including SLIs/SLOs, dashboards, alerts, runbooks, incident response, RCAs/COEs, and post\-incident learning.
* Improve alert quality, reduce manual toil, and increase automation across platform operations.
* Ensure major launches have clear readiness criteria, monitoring, rollback strategy, ownership, support model, and communication plan.
* Drive a culture of proactive reliability engineering, cost\-aware design, and continuous improvement.
* Partner with operational tooling and platform teams to improve observability, cost transparency, anomaly detection, and self\-service support.
**Governance, Metadata, and Data Trust**

* Ensure platform systems support secure, compliant, and auditable access to data.
* Drive adoption of metadata, lineage, ownership, classification, data quality, access review, and lifecycle management practices.
* Improve the discoverability and trustworthiness of data assets through cataloging, documentation, schema management, and data product standards.
* Partner with governance, privacy, and security stakeholders to embed controls into platform workflows rather than treating them as manual afterthoughts.
**Self\-Service and Developer Experience**

* Lead initiatives that reduce manual engineering dependency through self\-service onboarding, automated access workflows, reusable templates, and standard platform patterns.
* Improve developer experience for teams building, deploying, operating, and governing data products.
* Create consistent platform standards that help teams move faster while staying within reliability, privacy, security, and cost guardrails.
**Cross\-Functional Collaboration**

* Work closely with product, TPM, analytics, data science, operations engineering, security, finance, and business teams.
* Drive alignment on roadmap priorities, launch readiness, ownership boundaries, operational support, and business impact.
* Represent Data Platform in architecture reviews, roadmap discussions, leadership forums, and executive updates.
* Communicate complex platform topics in a clear, practical, and outcome\-focused manner.
**Required Qualifications**

* 15\+ years of professional software engineering experience.
* 5\+ years of experience leading engineering managers and large engineering teams.
* Experience operating large\-scale distributed systems, data platforms, cloud platforms, or infrastructure platforms.
* Strong understanding of modern data platform concepts such as batch and stream processing, data lakehouse architecture, metadata, governance, access control, orchestration, observability, and cost management.
* Proven ability to lead platform programs across multiple teams and stakeholders.
* Strong operational excellence mindset, including incident management, monitoring, SLOs, runbooks, RCA/COE practices, and production readiness.
* Experience driving self\-service platforms, automation, developer productivity, and scalable engineering workflows.
* Ability to make sound technical trade\-offs without needing to be the deepest expert in every technology.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to simplify complex topics for senior leadership and cross\-functional partners.
* Proven track record of hiring, coaching, and developing managers and senior technical talent.
* Experience working in Agile or continuous delivery engineering environments.
**Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience with large\-scale data platforms using technologies such as Databricks, Snowflake, Apache Flink, Kafka, Airflow, Apache Iceberg, Spark, Kubernetes, AWS, or similar platforms.
* Experience with metadata, catalog, lineage, governance, and data quality platforms such as DataHub, Unity Catalog, Monte Carlo, or similar tools.
* Experience with FinOps, cloud cost optimization, and cost attribution for large\-scale data workloads.
* Exposure to AI/ML or GenAI platform enablement, including governance, observability, model or prompt lifecycle, or data readiness for AI use cases.
* Experience leading platform migrations, modernization, or vendor\-lock\-in reduction efforts.
* Experience supporting data products, semantic layers, data certification, and self\-service onboarding.
* Experience working in media, streaming, advertising, consumer product, or high\-scale digital platform environments.
**What Success Looks Like**

* Engineering teams deliver faster with clearer ownership, stronger execution discipline, and fewer escalations.
* Platform capabilities become easier for internal teams to adopt through self\-service workflows, automation, and clear standards.
* Production reliability improves through stronger monitoring, runbooks, launch readiness, and incident learning.
* Data assets become easier to discover, trust, govern, and operate.
* Platform costs become more visible, attributable, and actively optimized.
* Cross\-team launches have better readiness, rollback planning, and stakeholder alignment.
* Engineering managers and senior engineers grow into stronger leaders.
**What we offer**

* A Great Place to work
* Equal opportunity employer
* Fast track growth opportunities
**How We Get Things Done…**


This last bit is probably the most important! Here at WBD, our guiding principles are the core values by which we operate and are central to how we get things done. You can find them at www.wbd.com/guiding\-principles/ along with some insights from the team on what they mean and how they show up in their day to day. We hope they resonate with you and look forward to discussing them during your interview.

**Championing Inclusion at WBD**


Warner Bros. Discovery embraces the opportunity to build a workforce that reflects a wide array of perspectives, backgrounds and experiences. Being an equal opportunity employer means that we take seriously our responsibility to consider qualified candidates on the basis of merit, regardless of sex, gender identity, ethnicity, age, sexual orientation, religion or belief, marital status, pregnancy, parenthood, disability or any other category protected by law.
If you’re a qualified candidate with a disability and you require adjustments or accommodations during the job application and/or recruitment process, please visit our accessibility page for instructions to submit your request.

* Data assets become easier to discover, trust, govern, and operate.
* Platform costs become more visible, attributable, and actively optimized.
* Cross\-team launches have better readiness, rollback planning, and stakeholder alignment.
* Engineering managers and senior engineers grow into stronger leaders.
**What we offer**

* A Great Place to work
* Equal opportunity employer
* Fast track growth opportunities
**How We Get Things Done…**


This last bit is probably the most important! Here at WBD, our guiding principles are the core values by which we operate and are central to how we get things done. You can find them at www.wbd.com/guiding\-principles/ along with some insights from the team on what they mean and how they show up in their day to day. We hope they resonate with you and look forward to discussing them during your interview.

**Championing Inclusion at WBD**


Warner Bros. Discovery embraces the opportunity to build a workforce that reflects a wide array of perspectives, backgrounds and experiences. Being an equal opportunity employer means that we take seriously our responsibility to consider qualified candidates on the basis of merit, regardless of sex, gender identity, ethnicity, age, sexual orientation, religion or belief, marital status, pregnancy, parenthood, disability or any other category protected by law.
If you’re a qualified candidate with a disability and you require adjustments or accommodations during the job application and/or recruitment process, please visit our accessibility page for instructions to submit your request.

43be8ad3.title: Customer Program Manager- Husky (India)Chennai
43be8ad3.description:
At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.



Husky TechnologiesTM has a strong foundation built on innovation, close customer relationships and a unique culture and values. We are dedicated to offering our customers the highest quality products and services and are looking for people with the inspiration and talent to develop with us as we pursue our ambitious growth strategy. We are a leader in developing state\-of\-the\-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.



Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.



Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!

  

  



**Job Description**



As a member of the Customer Success Management (CSM) SAARC team, you will be responsible for managing Advantage \+ Elite Contracts from order intake to delivery as well as to achieve the key performance indicators of the product. In this role, you will be a key contact for customers to ensure customer satisfaction and contract renewal.


**Responsibilities:**


* Implements and leads the Contract planning process, its implementation and sustainment, responsible to achieve the stated KPI (availability, cycle time, energy consumption, quality, resin usage)


* Work with key cross\-functional teams throughout the Organization with the goal of maintaining the Contract commitments on a continuous basis


* Project Manages all activities and services provided within the Contract, ensuring they are done on time, based on a predefined timetable, in an efficient way


* Ensures all services included in the Contract are well defined, properly documented (in the proper Husky systems), and properly scheduled


* Manages customer expectations to ensure complete alignment with the Contract objectives and goals


* Plan and schedule Contract timelines and milestones using the appropriate tools. Responsible for the milestones and deliverables.


* Develop and deliver progress reports, presentations, and other Contract documentation, internally and to the customer.


* Coordinate all activities related to the Contract implementation and ongoing activities.


* Focus should be in the involvement and awareness of the daily activities and issues related to the Contract. Key contact, both internally and customer.


* Ensure customer is satisfied with contract


* Manage and lead weekly call with customer


* Escalate issues when required


* Builds relationship with customers


* Schedule upcoming work with Field Service teams


**Qualifications:**


* Familiar with preform or plastics manufacturing environment. Understands plants KPI.


* Project Management experience


* Mechanical or electrical engineering or equivalent experience
* A minimum of 5 years’ work experience gained in a similar work environment
* Knowledge of injection molding machinery and related mechanical, hydraulic, and electronic technologies considered an asset
* Customer\-focused attitude


* Fluent in English and Hindi language will be an advantage


* Excellent communication and coordination skills
* Strong organizational and project management skills
* Strong negotiation, facilitation, conflict management skills and the ability to professionally interact with team members
* Experience or knowledge of CRM, ERP, CPQ systems
* Sales attitude and capacity to judge business requirements
* Good knowledge of all MS Office applications

  


* Logical thinking capabilities and continuous improvement attitude

  

  



Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.

6c686099.title: Service Delivery Manager
6c686099.description:
**About Persistent**
 We are an AI\-led, platform\-driven Digital Engineering and Enterprise Modernization partner, combining deep technical expertise and industry experience to help our clients anticipate what?s next. Our offerings and proven solutions create a unique competitive advantage for our clients by giving them the power to see beyond and rise above. We work with many industry\-leading organizations across the world, including 20 Fortune 50 companies and 4 of the 5 top banks in both the US and India, and numerous innovators across the healthcare ecosystem.
   

  

 Our disruptor?s mindset, commitment to client success, and agility to thrive in the dynamic environment have enabled us to sustain our growth momentum. Persistent has been recognized across top industry platforms for innovation, leadership, and inclusion. We reported $1,654\.4M FY26 revenue with 17\.4% Y\-o\-Y growth. We have delivered 24 sequential quarters of growth with $436\.0M in Q4 FY26 revenue, up 3\.2% Q\-o\-Q and 16\.2% Y\-o\-Y growth. Our 27,500\+ global team members, located in 18 countries, have been instrumental in helping the market leaders transform their industries. We have been recognized as the Fastest Growing IT Services Brand Globally in the 2026 Brand Finance IT Services 25 Report. We named a Leader in the Everest Group Private Equity (PE) Services PEAK Matrix? Assessment 2026 and Software Product Engineering PEAK Matrix? Assessment 2026\.
   

  

**About Position**
 We are looking for a seasoned Service Delivery Manager to lead and manage global Service Desk operations with a strong focus on service excellence, stakeholder engagement, and operational efficiency. The role involves end\-to\-end ownership of service delivery, financial performance, governance, and continuous improvement while ensuring high customer satisfaction and business alignment.
   

  

* Role: Service Delivery Manager ? ServiceDesk Operations
* Location: Hyderabad
* Experience: 15\+ Years
* Job Type: Full Time Employment


**What You?ll Do:**
* Lead and manage end\-to\-end Service Desk operations in a global delivery model
* Plan, implement, review, and audit service delivery to meet customer business requirements
* Negotiate, implement, and monitor SLAs while ensuring consistent service performance
* Manage IT operations, resources, and assets in compliance with governance and regulatory standards
* Drive financial management including P\&L, revenue, margin, and cost optimization
* Build and maintain strong relationships with customer senior management and stakeholders
* Lead supplier/vendor engagements and ensure effective service partnerships
* Identify new business opportunities, support renewals, and drive account growth
* Drive continuous service improvement initiatives and operational excellence
* Manage delivery teams, including SDMs and specialists, ensuring performance and development
* Oversee incident, problem, and change management processes
* Review operational reports, metrics, and implement process improvements
* Ensure successful execution of audits, compliance, and quality initiatives
* Lead DR, BCP, and operational resilience activities
* Manage attrition, employee engagement, and team productivity
* Provide leadership, coaching, and performance feedback to teams


**Expertise You?ll Bring:**
* Extensive experience in managing large\-scale Service Desk and IT operations
* Strong expertise in stakeholder and account management
* Proven experience in managing SLAs, KPIs, and service governance frameworks
* Strong financial acumen including budgeting, forecasting, and cost management
* Experience in managing cross\-functional teams in a fast\-paced environment
* Knowledge of ITIL processes and managed services delivery models
* Strong communication, leadership, and interpersonal skills
* Ability to drive operational improvements and re\-engineer processes
* Experience handling audits, compliance, and regulatory requirements
* Strong focus on customer satisfaction and service excellence
* Ability to handle large teams and manage frontline leadership layers
* Understanding of organizational workflows, capacity planning, and utilization principles


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Culture focused on talent development with quarterly growth opportunities and company\-sponsored higher education and certifications
* Opportunity to work with cutting\-edge technologies
* Employee engagement initiatives such as project parties, flexible work hours, and Long Service awards
* Annual health check\-ups
* Insurance coverage: group term life, personal accident, and Mediclaim hospitalization for self, spouse, two children, and parents


**Values\-Driven, People\-Centric \& Inclusive Work Environment**
 Persistent is dedicated to fostering diversity and inclusion in the workplace. We invite applications from all qualified individuals, including those with disabilities, and regardless of gender or gender preference. We welcome diverse candidates from all backgrounds.
   

  

* We support hybrid work and flexible hours to fit diverse lifestyles.
* Our office is accessibility\-friendly, with ergonomic setups and assistive technologies to support employees with physical disabilities.
* If you are a person with disabilities and have specific requirements, please inform us during the application process or at any time during your employment


**Let?s unleash your full potential at Persistent \-** 
**persistent.com/careers**
* Persistent is an Equal Opportunity Employer and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any kind.? AI,Data Governance,ServiceNow

b69fe7f8.title: Team Lead , Last Mile ACES
b69fe7f8.description:
**Description**
 At Amazon, we're working to be the most customer\-centric company on earth. To get there, we need exceptionally talented, bright, and driven people. Amazon is seeking Team leads for our transportation team. Amazon is one of the most recognizable brand names in the world and we distribute millions of products each year to our loyal customers
   

  

 We're seeking a Team lead for our Delivery center. In this role you will be responsible for shift operations at our DCs and support the DC manager in performance management and driving the operational plan.
   

  

 Title:Team Lead
   

  

 Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka
   

  

**Essential Functions**
* Working with the Center manager to ensure smooth function of the Amazon transportation operations at Bangalore
* Executing the delivery process from delivery station to customer address
* Ensure enough bandwidth in delivery team to ensure peak time delivery management
* Continuously improve the delivery process and attain a sustained level of delivery performance improvement


**Essential Skills**
* Strong execution skills, Action oriented, go getter
* Resourceful to identify the way to get things done using limited resources
* Ability to work under pressure situations
* Ability to work and perform station operations independently.
* Ability to work in ambiguous situations and to come out with solutions as per the situations faced.


 Analytical Skills: Effectively analyses and interpret information, identifying \& validating the key facts, including reviewing alternatives to determine advantages and associated risks.
   

  

 A day in the life
   

  

 Interact with multiple stakeholders and get things done. Regular show of ownership and bias for action.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 1\+ years of customer\-facing environment, warehousing, logistics or manufacturing experience
* Bachelor's degree
* Speak, write, and read fluently in English
* Experience with Microsoft Office products and applications
* Experience with Excel


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Work any shift pattern within the 24/7/365 operation including days, nights, holidays, and weekends


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ASSPL \- Uttar Pradesh \- D37
