8b0dc39d.title: Senior Program Manager - Technical
8b0dc39d.description:
**About The Job**
 The Phased Gates Team (PGT) is the engineering heart of Red Hat's proactive support strategy. Our vision is to be the technical "Supportability Intelligence Center of Excellence" for the entire company. We are building the "Supportability Intelligence Platform"—the core service that provides our expert rules and AI\-driven insights to all of Red Hat's in\-product health and AI initiatives.
   

  

 This is a high\-impact, strategic leadership role. You will be the "Product Owner" for this new "Supportability Intelligence Platform." You will be responsible for defining its vision, managing its roadmap, and guiding the engineering team (our Phased Gates Architects) to build a scalable, reliable, and powerful service. You will be the primary link between our technical architects and the rest of the business, ensuring our intelligence is delivered in the most effective way possible.
   

  

**What Will You Do**
* Own the Platform Strategy \& Roadmap: Act as the strategic "product owner" for the "Supportability Intelligence Platform." You will define and manage the product roadmap, prioritize the backlog, and make the key decisions to guide its development and expansion.
* Lead Technical Program Execution: Manage the end\-to\-end execution of our technical initiatives, including the development of our AI\-driven models, the expansion of our proactive coverage to new products like RHEL, and the delivery of our intelligence via APIs, SDKs, or data models.
* Manage Stakeholder \& "Consumer" Integration: Serve as the primary point of contact for the "consumers" of our platform. You will manage the strategic integrations with other Red Hat AI platforms, in\-product health teams, and as\-a\-service offerings.
* Partner with the FQT Intelligence Hub: Manage the "Operational Loop" with the Field Quality Team (FQT). You will be responsible for the formal intake process, translating their validated insights into a prioritized backlog of features and rules for the PGT's architects.
* Drive an AI\-First Engineering Culture: Champion our AI\-first mission by working with your technical team to embed AI and automation into every part of the development lifecycle, accelerating our own execution.


**What Will You Bring**
* 5\+ Year experience in proven operating at a Senior level in a Technical Program Management or Technical Product Management role.
* A strong track record of managing a technical, "as\-a\-service" product or platform, especially one focused on data, APIs, or AI.
* Deep knowledge of the software development lifecycle and Agile methodologies, with experience managing a backlog for a senior engineering team.
* A genuine passion for AI and automation and a clear vision for how to build and scale AI\-driven products.
* Experience managing programs that involve the development and integration of AI/ML models.
* A commitment to data integrity and validation, applying critical judgment to all data and AI\-generated outputs.
* Communication \& Influence: Excellent communication skills, with the ability to build trust and foster transparency when translating complex technical roadmaps to non\-technical stakeholders and executive leadership.
* Problem Solving \& Critical Thinking: The ability to navigate high levels of ambiguity, make difficult prioritization decisions, and define a clear, strategic path for a technical product.
* Collaboration \& Relationship Building: A natural "bridge\-builder" who creates an inclusive environment for your engineering team and collaborates effectively with peer teams (like the FQT, BI, and other product teams).
* Adaptability \& Learning: The ability to thrive in ambiguity and a demonstrated commitment to continuous learning in the rapidly evolving field of AI and platform services. Stop.


 \# LI\-CS1
   

  

**About Red Hat**
 Red Hat is the world’s leading provider of enterprise open source software solutions, using a community\-powered approach to deliver high\-performing Linux, cloud, container, and Kubernetes technologies. Spread across 40\+ countries, our associates work flexibly across work environments, from in\-office, to office\-flex, to fully remote, depending on the requirements of their role. Red Hatters are encouraged to bring their best ideas, no matter their title or tenure. We're a leader in open source because of our open and inclusive environment. We hire creative, passionate people ready to contribute their ideas, help solve complex problems, and make an impact.
   

  

**Inclusion at Red Hat**
 Red Hat’s culture is built on the open source principles of transparency, collaboration, and inclusion, where the best ideas can come from anywhere and anyone. When this is realized, it empowers people from different backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences to come together to share ideas, challenge the status quo, and drive innovation. Our aspiration is that everyone experiences this culture with equal opportunity and access, and that all voices are not only heard but also celebrated. We hope you will join our celebration, and we welcome and encourage applicants from all the beautiful dimensions that compose our global village.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Policy (EEO)**
 Red Hat is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and an affirmative action employer. We review applications for employment without regard to their race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, ancestry, citizenship, age, veteran status, genetic information, physical or mental disability, medical condition, marital status, or any other basis prohibited by law.
   

  

 Red Hat does not seek or accept unsolicited resumes or CVs from recruitment agencies. We are not responsible for, and will not pay, any fees, commissions, or any other payment related to unsolicited resumes or CVs except as required in a written contract between Red Hat and the recruitment agency or party requesting payment of a fee.
   

  

 Red Hat supports individuals with disabilities and provides reasonable accommodations to job applicants. If you need assistance completing our online job application, email application\-assistance@redhat.com. General inquiries, such as those regarding the status of a job application, will not receive a reply.

27e65edb.title: Senior Technical Program Manager, ShipTech
27e65edb.description:
**Description**
 We're seeking a Technical Program Manager to lead complex logistics and transportation projects from conception to delivery. You'll coordinate cross\-functional teams, manage timelines and dependencies, track progress against key metrics, and remove obstacles to accelerate project completion. The ideal candidate combines technical understanding with strong program management skills, excellent communication abilities, and proven success delivering high\-impact initiatives on schedule and within scope.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 Work with Internal \& External Stakeholders to understand the business processes and workflows.
   

  

 Develop functional specifications/requirements documents.
   

  

 Deal with ambiguity to discover the true requirements underlying new feature requests; recommend alternative technical approaches and lead engineering efforts to meet constrained timelines.
   

  

 Work with software and operations teams to launch projects and provide ongoing technical support
   

  

 Track and review program updates with stakeholders and leaders
   

  

 Work within and outside Amazon to encourage a fast and smooth adoption of the available services.
   

  

 Be the primary conduit for gathering requirements for enhancements; develop demos, sample and technical collateral as required.
   

  

 Work as the product owner and define roadmap in association with the stakeholders
   

  

 Drive simplification and efficiencies in engineering and/or complex architectures to unblock innovation and/or speed of delivery within program area
   

  

 Manage multiple projects in program area or large challenging projects to meet business and/or organization goals
   

  

 Facilitate technical trade\-offs between short term team needs and long term business needs
   

  

**About The Team**
 Amazon delivers millions of packages to customers worldwide, while providing world class customer experience – from checkout to shipment tracking to delivery. Amazon businesses continue to experience a rapid expansion into new markets and geographies. Our Transportation Technology division builds platforms that manage the lifecycle of a package. We are at the heart of Amazon's worldwide transportation operations and systemically integrate with supply chain to improve customer experience and reduce operational costs.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 7\+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience
* 5\+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 3\+ years of software development experience
* 5\+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing projects across cross functional teams, building sustainable processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience defining KPI's/SLA's used to drive multi\-million dollar businesses and reporting to senior leadership


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ADCI HYD 13 SEZ
   

  

 Job ID: A10426839

a2e2852b.title: STAFF, TECHNICAL PROGRAM MANAGER
a2e2852b.description:
About Team:
   

  

 Building the right technology foundation for Infrastructure \& platforms is vital to success at the scale of Walmart. Our team builds and maintains the foundational technologies that support the tech organization. Included in this are data platforms, enterprise architecture, DevOps, cloud computing, and infrastructure. All of these products and services are supported by scalable and powerful infrastructure, ensuring a secure and seamless employee and customer experience across stores, digital channels, and distribution centers.
   

  

 What you'll doExecute and improve the Problem Management Correction of Error (COE) process in alignment with global and local standards.
   

  

 Identify opportunities to automate and optimize problem management workflows using Agentic AI.
   

  

 Coordinate problem resolution across internal teams, vendors, and external partners.
   

  

 Drive Correction of Error (COE), postmortem facilitation, and closure of critical action items.
   

  

 Ensure timely and high\-quality delivery of COE reports, Post Implementation Reviews, and known error documentation.
   

  

 Mentor junior Problem Mangers and engineers, fostering a culture of operational excellence.
   

  

 What you'll bring:
   

  

 Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
   

  

 10\+ years of experience in IT operations, technical program management, or service reliability.
   

  

 Minimum 5 years of experience in Change/Incident/Problem Management or Project Management.
   

  

 Proficiency in Python or similar programming languages, including building scalable backend services and data pipelines.
   

  

 Hands\-on experience with LLM APIs (e.g., OpenAI, Claude, Sonnet) for prompt engineering, inference, and orchestration.
   

  

 Familiarity with Model Context Protocol (MCP) for agent orchestration and workflow integration.
   

  

 Ability to implement retrieval\-augmented generation (RAG) or similar techniques to deliver explainable, context\-aware AI insights.
   

  

 Technical knowledge in system architecture, networking, and cloud platforms.
   

  

 Strong understanding of ITIL
   

  

 Experience with tools like ServiceNow, JIRA, Confluence and Tableau
   

  

**About Walmart Global Tech**
 Imagine working in an environment where one line of code can make life easier for hundreds of millions of people. That’s what we do at Walmart Global Tech. We’re a team of software engineers, data scientists, cybersecurity expert's and service professionals within the world’s leading retailer who make an epic impact and are at the forefront of the next retail disruption. People are why we innovate, and people power our innovations. We are people\-led and tech\-empowered.
   

  

 We train our team in the skillsets of the future and bring in experts like you to help us grow. We have roles for those chasing their first opportunity as well as those looking for the opportunity that will define their career. Here, you can kickstart a great career in tech, gain new skills and experience for virtually every industry, or leverage your expertise to innovate at scale, impact millions and reimagine the future of retail.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Beyond our great compensation package, you can receive incentive awards for your performance. Other great perks include a host of best\-in\-class benefits maternity and parental leave, PTO, health benefits, and much more.
   

  

 Belonging
   

  

 We aim to create a culture where every associate feels valued for who they are, rooted in respect for the individual. Our goal is to foster a sense of belonging, to create opportunities for all our associates, customers and suppliers, and to be a Walmart for everyone.
   

  

 At Walmart, our vision is "everyone included." By fostering a workplace culture where everyone is—and feels—included, everyone wins. Our associates and customers reflect the makeup of all 19 countries where we operate. By making Walmart a welcoming place where all people feel like they belong, we’re able to engage associates, strengthen our business, improve our ability to serve customers, and support the communities where we operate.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity Employer
   

  

 Walmart, Inc., is an Equal Opportunities Employer – By Choice. We believe we are best equipped to help our associates, customers and the communities we serve live better when we really know them. That means understanding, respecting and valuing unique styles, experiences, identities, ideas and opinions – while being inclusive of all people.
   

  

 Minimum Qualifications...Outlined below are the required minimum qualifications for this position. If none are listed, there are no minimum qualifications.
   

  

 Minimum Qualifications:Option 1: Bachelor's degree in computer science, information technology, engineering, or related area and 5 years' experience in engineering, engineering program management, technical program management, product management, or related area. Option 2: 7 years' experience in engineering, engineering program management, technical program management, product management, or related area.
   

  

 Preferred Qualifications...Outlined below are the optional preferred qualifications for this position. If none are listed, there are no preferred qualifications.
   

  

 Primary Location...Building 10 (sez), Cessna Business Park, Kadubeesanahalli Village, Varthur Hobli , India

6ed14e65.title: Senior Engineering Program Manager
6ed14e65.description:
**Job Description**
 Adobe InDesign is the industry\-leading page design software and layout app that lets you create, preflight and publish beautiful documents for print and digital media. InDesign has everything you need to make posters, books, digital magazines, eBooks, interactive PDFs and more.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Knowledge \& Skills
   

  

* Exhibits a high degree of autonomy and is determined. Should be a go\-getter who can multitask and manage multiple initiatives at once.
* Excellent verbal, presentation, and written communication skills.
* Have a good understanding of Gen AI tech stack.
* Ability to build dashboards using AI tools that can automate status reporting, progress tracking and tracking risks.
* Leads by example. Sets high standards \& communicates expectations of high achievement to others.
* Establishes credibility with peers and senior managers and is a driving force for change across the organization.
* Ability to tie team objectives back to the broader organizational objectives and goals.
* Proven track record of influencing without authority while being adept at team member management and conflict management.
* Should have good knowledge of a software product development lifecycle.
* Recommend and champion process improvement with an intent to drive efficiency and optimisation.
* Knowledge of agile development techniques and project management tools.
* Strong conflict resolution and negotiation skills.
* Executive presentation skills are required
* Bias to action and willingness to question established processes in favour of optimisation and incorporation of industry\-wide standard processes
* Ability to communicate in a geographically distributed environment with diverse collaborators such as Product marketing, Legal, Finance \& Operations and function in ambiguous situations while bringing clarity.


 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Coordinate all aspects of the business for development and release of technologies, products, features \& functions in the InDesign organization.
* Build the project schedule, including putting together the framework and identifying dependencies—negotiating with 3rd parties/internal teams.
* Balance the current tasks with future asks such that we are simultaneously working on a release while preparing for the next
* Understand and assess critical paths and dependencies for delivering and shipping products/services and facilitate discussions between product/client teams, product management, and engineering.
* Effectively negotiate, persuade and motivate extended project teams \& senior management across BUs, provide justifiable proposals and recommendations, and clearly outline courses of action to follow.
* Assess future challenges on projects and initiatives and mobilize immediate and extended team members to take action, proactively addressing issues.
* Initiate, champion, develop and effectively complete plans for change (new process, tool, etc) and drive adoption across multiple teams.
* Identify, track, monitor and communicate project\-related issues, scope changes, variances and contingencies arising during project implementation.
* Implement process improvements, including identifying the problem areas and process improvements – some cross\-product or cross\-BU focus.
* Bring up and resolve issues timely, including problems that impact multiple projects. Propose workable solutions to complex problems while considering the needs of all teams that are impacted.
* Manage multiple competing projects or tasks independently, effectively balancing work between critical short\-term issues with longer\-term strategic goals.
* Leverage data to drive key decisions and changes in the team.
* Leverage automation for recurring tasks.
* Drive repeatable and quantifiable processes that can help team function autonomously
* Evaluate existing processes and procedures. Make recommendations and drive process improvement and adoption of guidelines (processes, tools, etc) to improve team efficiency and effectiveness.

d052daab.title: Lead, Program Management (Systems)
d052daab.company: D. E. Shaw India Private Limited
d052daab.description:
The D. E. Shaw group is a global investment and technology development firm with more than $90 billion in investment capital as of March 1, 2026, and offices in North America, Europe, and Asia. Since our founding in 1988, our firm has earned an international reputation for successful investing based on innovation, careful risk management, and the quality and depth of our staff. We have a significant presence in the world’s capital markets, investing in a wide range of companies and financial instruments in both developed and developing economies.
   

  

 Systems is a global team that designs, builds, and manages the firm’s technical infrastructure, including desktops, software applications, communications platforms, conferencing tools, network connections, and internal platforms that power developer productivity and user efficiency. We are seeking an experienced Product/Program Manager to join our Systems Program team based in the firm’s office in Hyderabad to partner with engineering teams across multiple focus areas, including firmwide applications, internal automation, platform infrastructure, and emerging AI\-driven capabilities. This role will operate at the intersection of engineering, product, and business stakeholders to drive execution, shape product direction, and deliver scalable, high\-impact solutions.
   

  

**WHAT YOU'LL DO DAY\-TO\-DAY:**
 As a member of Systems Program, you will define and drive product and program strategy across engineering initiatives, translating business needs into technical roadmaps, scoping open\-ended projects, and conceptualizing effective solutions. You will work closely with engineering teams across internal platforms, developer tooling, infrastructure services, firmwide applications, automation, and AI\-driven capabilities to deliver scalable solutions that improve reliability, developer experience, and operational efficiency. You will own the product/program lifecycle from discovery, requirements gathering, and user research to delivery, testing, rollout, and adoption, ensuring alignment with organizational goals and user needs. You will collaborate with engineering, infrastructure, security, and operations teams to manage dependencies, resolve risks, and drive seamless execution across interconnected systems. You will apply product management practices such as design thinking, experimentation, user interviews, and A/B testing, while leading Agile processes including sprint planning, backlog prioritization, feature grooming, and release coordination. You will track progress, risks, and impact for stakeholders and leadership, maintain robust documentation and governance, and identify opportunities to reduce operational overhead through automation, self\-service capabilities, and the integration of emerging technologies such as generative AI.
   

  

**WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:**
 The ideal candidate should hold–
   

  

 Basic qualifications:
   

  

* A bachelor’s degree or higher in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related technical discipline, and either an MBA degree from a top college/university or relevant product/program management experience
* Up to 8 years of total experience with at least 3\-6 years in product/program management
* Solid understanding of the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC), including experience working closely with engineering teams on design, development, testing, and release processes
* Familiarity with modern application architectures, APIs, and platform\-based systems, along with a working knowledge of programming concepts
* Experience with Agile methodologies and tools, with the ability to drive structured execution in dynamic environments
* Robust analytical, organizational, and problem\-solving abilities, with the ability to make data\-informed decisions and manage trade\-offs effectively


 Preferred qualifications:
   

  

* Experience working on internal platforms, developer tooling, or infrastructure services that support scalable application development
* Familiarity with cloud\-native technologies, containerized environments, and self\-service infrastructure models
* Experience in applying design thinking methodologies to improve user experience and drive product adoption
* Experience with Kubernetes, databases, SaaS, and Gen AI, as well as familiarity with programming languages
* PMP, PRINCE2, Scrum Master, or equivalent project management certification
* Robust technical foundation, product mindset, and program execution expertise, with the ability to navigate complex systems environments and drive alignment across globally distributed teams


 Interested candidates can apply through our website:
   

  

 https://www.deshawindia.com/recruit/jobs/Ads/Link/LeadPMSysJune26
   

  

 We encourage candidates with relevant experience looking to restart their careers after a break to apply for this position. Learn about Recommence, our gender\-neutral return\-to\-work initiative.
   

  

 The Firm offers excellent benefits, a casual, collegial working environment, and an attractive compensation package. For further information about our recruitment process, including how applicant data will be processed, please visit https://www.deshawindia.com/careers
   

  

 Members of the D. E. Shaw group do not discriminate in employment matters on the basis of sex, race, colour, caste, creed, religion, pregnancy, national origin, age, military service eligibility, veteran status, sexual orientation, marital status, disability, or any other protected class.

462bccee.title: Sr. Technical Program Manager, IES SSD
462bccee.description:
**Description**
 The International Emerging Stores (IES) Sub\-Same Day (SSD) business aims to become the place of choice for customers across all Emerging Marketplaces for their time\-sensitive needs. We make a large, curated speed\-sensitive selection available to customers — delivered within hours, same day, or overnight by improving delivery speeds and promises, enhancing product discovery, and building trust through timely, contextually relevant delivery updates. Our efforts drive customers to shop more frequently at Amazon for urgent non\-grocery needs and ultimately convert to Prime.
   

  

 You will have the opportunity to work with a cross\-functional team of engineers, product managers, operations leaders, supply chain partners, and business stakeholders to drive some of IES SSD's highest\-impact programs. You will be a highly visible leader who owns the communication, coordination, and execution of a multi\-year program vision — from expanding curated selection coverage and improving delivery promise accuracy to scaling speed across marketplaces and driving Prime conversion.
   

  

 You will work with senior product and engineering leaders to define strategy and requirements for systems that power sub\-same\-day fulfillment at scale. You will design, coordinate, and execute technical solutions that optimize speed, selection breadth, promise reliability, and cost to serve across fulfillment networks, last\-mile transportation, and customer\-facing delivery experiences. Managing complex dependencies across inventory systems, fulfillment operations, transportation platforms, and promise\-surfacing integrations, you will be expected to make appropriate trade\-offs between business velocity and technical constraints, clearly communicate goals, roles, and responsibilities, and drive alignment across teams.
   

  

 Working cross\-functionally, you will identify and secure commitment from tech teams across the company for new initiatives — whether it's integrating with new marketplace platforms, improving delivery speed tiers, enhancing product discovery for speed\-sensitive selection, or building automation into fulfillment workflows — driving consensus on the technical approach. You will also identify opportunities to converge overlapping technical efforts, reduce operational toil, and drive the long\-term strategy and manage the roadmap and change management process for IES SSD's growth in Emerging Marketplaces.
   

  

 The ideal candidate will have a well\-rounded technical background with experience in large\-scale distributed systems, and a history of leading large, ambiguous programs end\-to\-end. You thrive in fast\-paced environments where speed is the product and customer satisfaction is the measure. Maturity, high\-level judgment, negotiation skills, ability to influence, analytical talent, and leadership are essential to success in this role.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Define and drive the overall strategy for this large\-scale program, aligning teams towards coherent technology strategies and effective engineering processes.
* Partner with engineering leads to secure resources, scope efforts, set priorities, and drive delivery to meet program goals and timelines.
* Proactively identify and mitigate risks, manage cross\-functional communication, and drive executive\-level escalations when necessary.
* Balance technical requirements against business needs, making smart trade\-offs between time, effort, and features.
* Streamline processes, improve efficiency, and create mechanisms to ensure long\-term program success.
* Mentor and develop team members, fostering a culture of technical excellence and customer obsession.


**Basic Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 7\+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience
* 3\+ years of software development experience
* 5\+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing projects across cross functional teams, building sustainable processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience defining KPI's/SLA's used to drive multi\-million dollar businesses and reporting to senior leadership


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. 59df9b2d.title: Linux Program Manager
59df9b2d.description:
**Company**
 Qualcomm India Private Limited
   

  

**Job Area**
 Engineering Services Group, Engineering Services Group \> Program Management
   

  

**General Summary**
 The Linux Program Manager will own the end‑to‑end program execution for Qualcomm Linux platform activities, with a focus on upstreaming, open‑sourcing, kernel/mainline alignment, distro enablement, and branch lifecycle management. The role requires strong cross‑functional leadership, deep familiarity with Linux development models, and the ability to drive multi‑team execution across kernel, Yocto, Debian/Ubuntu, user‑space frameworks, CI, and product teams.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Upstreaming Program Management \-**
**Mainline \& Branch Lifecycle Management**
**Open‑Source Compliance \& Release Coordination**
**Linux Distribution Enablement \& Ecosystem Alignment**
* Coordinate Yocto, Debian, Ubuntu, and other distro enablement workstreams (graphics, multimedia, AI/ML, connectivity, robotics, etc.).


**Cross‑Functional Program Leadership**
* Manage execution across kernel, multimedia, Android, and other participating orgs. Own program schedules, risk tracking, dependency management, reviews, and executive reporting.
* Ensure teams follow developer‑first, Linux‑first best practices, including frequent mainline/Yocto upgrades.


**Quality, Testing \& Automation Oversight**
* Ensure pre‑merge testing, LBT automation, and continuous validation across mainline and LTS branches. Track quality issues across feature requests and ensure cross‑team closure.


**Qualifications \& Experience**
* 10\-15\+ years of experience in Linux/Kernel/Yocto/OSS ecosystems, with program or technical leadership roles.
* Strong technical understanding of:
+ Upstream Linux development model (maintainers, reviewers, linux‑next, stable trees).

* Kernel branching policies, mainline alignment, LTS workflows. Yocto/OpenEmbedded, Debian/Ubuntu, and other Linux distros. Open‑source contribution processes, submitting patches, Gerrit/Git workflows. Experience working across large cross‑functional engineering organizations.
* Excellent communication, risk management, and stakeholder management skills.


**Minimum Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or related field.
* 2\+ years of Program Management or related work experience.

4a75a376.title: Tech Infrastructure Program Manager, AWS Data Center Planning & Delivery
4a75a376.description:
**Description**
 AWS Infrastructure Services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all AWS global infrastructure. In other words, we’re the people who keep the cloud running. We support all AWS data centers and all of the servers, storage, networking, power, and cooling equipment that ensure our customers have continual access to the innovation they rely on. We work on the most challenging problems, with thousands of variables impacting the supply chain — and we’re looking for talented people who want to help.
   

  

 You’ll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, operations managers, and other vital roles. You’ll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers. And you’ll experience an inclusive culture that welcomes bold ideas and empowers you to own them to completion.
   

  

 Amazon Web Service (AWS) is a comprehensive, evolving, and growing business unit within Amazon.com. Since early 2006, AWS has provided a highly reliable, scalable, low\-cost cloud infrastructure platform that empowers hundreds of thousands of businesses in 190 countries to innovate and invent.
   

  

 Do you have the business background, complex cross functional program management experience, financial expertise, legal/regulatory comprehension and technical understanding? Can you communicate effectively, find clarity in ambiguity, and simplicity in complexity ?
   

  

 If yes, then come and explore this exciting role. This role in Amazon Data Services India Private Limited (ADSIPL) Telangana builds infrastructure that hosts AWS cloud services. It delivers AWS cloud infrastructure in a challenging, high growth, fast paced and customer focused work environment. In this role, you will lead cross functional teams to deliver usable data center capacity. You will partner with senior stakeholders to develop, document, manage and deliver infrastructure designs, implementation schedules and budgets. You will earn trust of your partners in your ability to solve complex issues and steer teams in right direction to deliver results, on\-time and at\-cost.
   

  

 You must be an exceptionally strong communicator (both written and verbal), and possess relevant experience in managing technical and strategic programs. If you bring past experience in data center deployment programs, great. If not, then having a background in program and project management, architecture/design, mechanical/electrical engineering, software/hardware engineering with strong urge to learn will be essential.
   

  

 Come Join us, have fun, and create history!!
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 Infrastructure TPM owns delivery of new DC across one or more availability zones in India. They manage 5\+ projects at any time. They bridge internal customers, business functions, (Planning, Finance, Procurement, Legal, Policy, Operations), and functional delivery teams (Construction, Commissioning, Controls, Fiber and Network) to enable on\-time and right sized delivery of new DC capacity.
   

  

 The scope begins with early expansion planning, which includes a feasibility analysis to approve expansion plans and associated build timelines. They evaluate multiple factors prior to approving a new plan of record, including owned/leased/collocated DC supply, utility delivery (power, water, and fiber), and long lead equipment (LLE) availability. It requires region\-wide knowledge and monitoring of in\-flight projects, major risks, and remediation efforts to ensure DC delivery is not only on track to meet supply commitments but also to meet customer demand, which is constantly changing.
   

  

 A successful TPM must be capable of managing a combination of metrics, tools, and mechanisms to remain aware of ongoing risks or issues that require their action, decision, mitigations, or effort to identify alternative solutions communicating up, down, and across the organization to align direction, gain support and drive remediation efforts
   

  

**About The Team**
 Diverse Experiences:
   

  

 Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS?
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

**Work/Life Balance**
 We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve.
   

  

**Inclusive Team Culture**
 AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee\-led and company\-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.
   

  

**Mentorship And Career Growth**
 We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 3\+ years of technical infrastructure management experience
* Knowledge of best practices and emerging technologies, related to infrastructure (i.e. network, data center, hardware, software)
* Experience leading the design, automation, deployment, and support of large\-scale infrastructure
* Knowledge of software development practices and data center/infrastructure/networking technologies


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with varying scenarios of infrastructure builds
* Experience in construction of data center delivery (design, commissioning and construction), mission critical facilities, or equivalent industrial/manufacturing facility builds
* Experience organizing, prioritizing and scheduling work assignments


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ADSIPL \- Telangana

7c037cd7.title: Solution Architect (Upto 25 LPA)
7c037cd7.description:
**Solution Architect**
**Location:** 
 Hybrid (Surat, Gujarat)
   

  

**Salary Range:** 
 ₹20,00,000 \- ₹25,00,000 per annum
   

  

**Experience:** 
 6\+ Years
   

  

**Job Overview**
 We are seeking a skilled and experienced
 **Solution Architect** 
 to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will design end\-to\-end scalable technology solutions, align technical strategies with business objectives, and guide engineering teams in implementing robust system architectures. This position requires a strong combination of technical expertise, solution design capabilities, and stakeholder collaboration skills to drive successful project execution across enterprise and product\-based environments.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Architecture Design: Define and design scalable, secure, and high\-performing system architectures that meet business requirements.
* Technical Strategy Alignment: Collaborate with stakeholders to align technical strategies with business objectives and ensure successful project execution.
* Team Guidance: Lead and guide engineering teams in the implementation of architectural standards and best practices.
* Technology Evaluation: Evaluate and recommend technology stacks that are future\-ready and aligned with industry trends.
* Documentation: Create and maintain comprehensive architecture documentation and standards.
* Stakeholder Collaboration: Work closely with product managers, developers, and other stakeholders to ensure alignment and understanding of architectural decisions.


**Required Skills \& ExperienceCore Technical Skills**
* Experience: 8\+ years of software engineering experience with at least 2\+ years in an Architecture role.
* Architecture Expertise: Strong experience in Solution Architecture, System Design, and Enterprise Architecture.
* System Understanding: Strong understanding of system architecture, solution design, and enterprise application integration.
* Cloud Platforms: Experience working with cloud platforms such as AWS or Azure cloud architecture.
* Caching Technologies: Experience with caching technologies such as Redis.
* Queue Systems: Experience with queue systems such as RabbitMQ, Kafka, SQS, or Service Bus.
* Microservices Knowledge: Strong knowledge of microservices architecture, REST APIs, and distributed systems.
* Database Familiarity: Familiarity with SQL and NoSQL databases and modern backend/application frameworks.
* Optimization Principles: Understanding scalability, security, reliability, and performance optimization principles.


 Functional Strengths
   

  

* Analytical Skills: Ability to analyze business problems and design practical, scalable technical solutions.
* Problem\-Solving: Strong problem\-solving and decision\-making capabilities.
* Security Knowledge: Strong understanding of security architecture, authentication, authorization, and OWASP best practices.
* Agile Experience: Experience working in Agile and cross\-functional development environments.
* Project Management: Ability to manage multiple projects and architecture initiatives simultaneously.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Certifications such as TOGAF, AWS, Azure, or Solution Architecture.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.


 What We Offer
   

  

* Competitive salary and benefits package.
* Opportunity to work in a hybrid environment.
* A collaborative and innovative work culture.
* Opportunities for professional growth and development.


 If you are passionate about technology and have a proven track record in solution architecture, we encourage you to apply and join our team in shaping the future of technology solutions.
   

  

 Skills: togaf,aws,service bus,sqs,architecture,azure cloud architecture,solution architect,rest apis,rabbitmq

6f21a9d0.title: Enterprise Technology Architect
6f21a9d0.description:
**Project Role :** Enterprise Technology Architect  

**Project Role Description :** Architect complex end\-to\-end IT solutions across the enterprise. Apply the latest technology and industry expertise to create better products and experiences.
  

**Must have skills :** Boomi Atomsphere Integration  

**Good to have skills :** NA  

Minimum **5** year(s) of experience is required  

**Educational Qualification :** 15 years full time education  

  

Summary:
  

As an Enterprise Technology Architect, a typical day involves designing and overseeing the implementation of comprehensive IT solutions that span across the entire organization. This role requires envisioning how various technology components integrate to enhance business processes and user experiences. The position demands continuous engagement with evolving technologies and industry trends to ensure that the enterprise s technology landscape remains innovative and efficient. Collaboration with diverse teams to align technology strategies with organizational goals is a key aspect of daily activities, fostering an environment of continuous improvement and forward\-thinking solutions.  

  

Roles \& Responsibilities:
  

* Expected to be an SME, collaborate and manage the team to perform.
* Responsible for team decisions.
* Engage with multiple teams and contribute on key decisions.
* Provide solutions to problems for their immediate team and across multiple teams.
* Lead the development and implementation of architectural frameworks that support business objectives.
* Facilitate communication between technical teams and business stakeholders to ensure alignment and clarity.
* Mentor junior team members to support their professional growth and enhance team capabilities.


  

Professional \& Technical Skills:
  

* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in Boomi Atomsphere Integration.
* Strong knowledge of integration patterns and best practices for enterprise application connectivity.
* Experience in designing scalable and secure integration solutions within complex IT environments.
* Ability to analyze and troubleshoot integration issues to maintain system reliability and performance.
* Familiarity with cloud\-based integration platforms and their deployment within hybrid infrastructures.
* Skilled in collaborating with cross\-functional teams to deliver cohesive technology solutions.


  

Additional Information:
  

* The candidate should have minimum 5 years of experience in Boomi Atomsphere Integration.
* This position is based at our Mumbai office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.

  

15 years full time education

0638e787.title: Cloud Solution Architecture - Entry Level
0638e787.description:
**Overview**  

**Job Location:** Pune, India**Contract Type:** Full\-Time Employee
With more than 45,000 employees and partners worldwide, the Customer Experience and Success (CE\&S) organization is on a mission to empower customers to accelerate business value through differentiated customer experiences that leverage Microsoft’s products and services, ignited by our people and culture. We drive cross\-company alignment and execution, ensuring that we consistently exceed customers’ expectations in every interaction, whether in\-product, digital, or human\-centered. CE\&S is responsible for all up services across the company, including consulting, customer success, and support across Microsoft’s portfolio of solutions and products. Join CE\&S and help us accelerate AI transformation for our customers and the world.


The Global Customer Success (GCS) organization, an organization within CE\&S, is leading the effort to enable customer success on the Microsoft Cloud by harnessing leading, AI\-powered capabilities and human expertise to deliver innovation solutions that accelerate business value, drive operational excellence and nurture long term loyalty.


We are looking for a Cloud Solution Architect (CSA) to help design \& build AI and Agentic solutions that enhance applications, streamline business processes \& deliver real value for customers. You will deliver repeatable AI and Agentic solutions. In this role, you’ll work with others on technical engagements across design, build, and operations, removing blockers and accelerating adoption of Microsoft AI solutions built on Copilot, Copilot Studio, Foundry, Fabric, Azure AI, App Services, GitHub and data platforms. You will deliver engagements leveraging existing Repeatable IP and execution engines with accountability for delivery excellence, consumption growth, and successful deployment for the customer. You’ll be certified in priority workloads like Azure AI and Data Platform services, cloud native app services, GitHub and related developer tools, and collaborate with customer developers, and engineers to turn innovation into real\-world outcomes. You will be a fast learner, strong problem solver, naturally curious and have great active listening and communication skills.


This opportunity will allow you to rapidly accelerate your technical skills, build consultative and communication capabilities, and gain hands on experience developing AI driven and agentic systems within customer environments \- all while learning how to deliver with excellence and consistency.


Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.

 **Responsibilities**  

Engage with customer developers \& engineers to understand their application, data, and AI priorities, and build secure AI \& Agentic solutions that drive business value and customer satisfaction.  

* Work on technical engagements across architecture design, Proof of Concepts (POCs), and Minimum Viable Products (MVPs) to accelerate adoption of Copilot, Copilot Studio, Foundry, Fabric, Azure AI, App Services, GitHub, and data platforms.


• Leverage AI to automate and deliver repeatable processes that help customers achieve faster outcomes and deliver repeatable IP aligned with AI and Agentic Solutions• Engage in relevant communities to share expertise, contribute to IP creation, prioritize IP re\-use, and learn from others to help accelerate your customer’s AI transformation journey.  

* Act as the Voice of the Customer by sharing insights and feedback with account teams to identify opportunities and remove adoption blockers.
* Maintain deep technical expertise and stay current with AI trends and technologies such as Copilot, Copilot Studio, Foundry, Fabric, Azure, AI, GitHub, Security solutions , while contributing to internal and external technical communities.
* Actively participate in onboarding, technical training, and ongoing skill development programs.
* Incorporate coaching feedback to improve technical accuracy, efficiency, and customer interaction quality
* Demonstrate a growth mindset by continuously aligning your skills to current and future customer needs
 **Qualifications** **Required Qualifications:**

* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, Business, Liberal Arts, or related field OR equivalent experience
* Strong written and verbal communication skills.


• Ability to follow structured processes and work effectively in a defined support environment • Willingness to work in an in‑office setting • Support a positive, inclusive, and customer‑focused team culture.**Language requirements:**


This role requires proficiency in written, reading, and conversational English as all business operations as well as customer communications are conducted in English

**Preferred Qualifications:**

* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, Business, Liberal Arts, or related field AND 1\+ years experience in AI/cloud technologies, information technology (IT) consulting/support, systems administration, network operations, software development/support, technology solutions, practice development, architecture, and/or consulting


o OR Master's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, Business, Liberal Arts, or related field  

o OR equivalent experience• Technical Certification in Cloud (e.g., Azure, Amazon Web Services, Google, security certifications)• Hands on experience in AI technologies
Ability to meet Microsoft, customer and / or government security screening requirements are required for this role. These requirements include, but are not limited to the following specialized security screenings: Microsoft Cloud Background Check: This position will be required to pass the Microsoft Cloud Background Check upon hire / transfer and every two years thereafter.

  

  

This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.

  

Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process**.**

ce014993.title: Cloud Technical Architect
ce014993.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Cloud Technical Architect
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Develop and deliver agile and cost effective hosting solutions. Implement scalable, high performance hosting solutions that meet the need of todays corporate and digital applications using both private and public cloud technologies. Plan and deliver legacy infrastructure transformation and migration to drive next\-generation business outcomes.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 SAP BTP Application Development
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 5 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As a Cloud Technical Architect, a typical day involves designing and delivering agile hosting solutions that are both cost\-effective and scalable. The role requires implementing high\-performance hosting environments tailored to support modern corporate and digital applications. This includes planning and executing the transformation and migration of legacy infrastructure to cloud platforms, ensuring seamless integration and driving innovative business outcomes. Collaboration with various stakeholders to align technology strategies with organizational goals is a key aspect of the daily workflow, fostering continuous improvement and operational excellence.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities:
   

  

* Expected to be an SME, collaborate and manage the team to perform.
* Responsible for team decisions.
* Engage with multiple teams and contribute on key decisions.
* Provide solutions to problems for their immediate team and across multiple teams.
* Lead the design and implementation of cloud architecture strategies to support business objectives.
* Facilitate knowledge sharing and mentorship within the team to enhance technical capabilities.
* Coordinate cross\-functional efforts to ensure alignment of cloud solutions with enterprise standards.


 Professional \& Technical Skills:
   

  

* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in SAP BTP Application Development.
* Experience in designing and deploying scalable cloud solutions using both private and public cloud technologies.
* Strong understanding of cloud infrastructure transformation and migration processes.
* Ability to architect high\-performance hosting environments that support digital applications.
* Familiarity with agile methodologies and cost optimization strategies in cloud environments.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 5 years of experience in SAP BTP Application Development.
* This position is based at our Kolkata office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.

The position demands continuous engagement with evolving technologies and industry trends to ensure that the enterprise s technology landscape remains innovative and efficient. Collaboration with diverse teams to align technology strategies with organizational goals is a key aspect of daily activities, fostering an environment of continuous improvement and forward\-thinking solutions.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities:
   

  

* Expected to be an SME, collaborate and manage the team to perform.
* Responsible for team decisions.
* Engage with multiple teams and contribute on key decisions.

* Experience in designing scalable and secure integration solutions within complex IT environments.
* Ability to analyze and troubleshoot integration issues to maintain system reliability and performance.
* Familiarity with cloud\-based integration platforms and their deployment within hybrid infrastructures.

e0621e81.title: R&D Digital Solution Architect - Power Consulting - IDC
e0621e81.description:
**The opportunity**
 We are looking for a highly motivated
 **Digital Solution Architect** 
 to help shape, design, and deliver end‑to‑end digital solutions that support a stronger, greener power grid and contribute to a more sustainable future. You will be responsible for defining robust, secure, and scalable architectures, translating business and operational needs into technical solutions that deliver measurable value. The role focuses on
 **cutting‑edge software applications operating at the intersection of IT and OT** 
 , enabling seamless integration between enterprise systems, operational technologies, and field assets.
   

  

**How You’ll Make An Impact**
* Collaborate with business stakeholders, product owners, and development teams to determine functional and non‑functional requirements for new applications and platform capabilities. Define and own end‑to‑end solution and application architectures across the full software development lifecycle. Use appropriate tools and methodologies to create architecture approaches, reference architectures, and implementation proposals, mapping business and operational needs to technical solutions.
* Guide development teams throughout the software development lifecycle, ensuring architectural intent, design principles, and standards are consistently applied. Successfully communicate architectural concepts, design decisions, and trade‑offs to technical and non‑technical stakeholders. Ensure software solutions meet quality, security, performance, scalability, availability, and modularity requirements.
* Promote platform‑oriented and reuse‑driven architectures, reducing duplication and enabling faster time‑to‑market. Design and govern cloud‑native and microservices‑based architectures, supporting SaaS, on‑premise, and hybrid deployment models.
* Embed secure software development lifecycle principles and ensure security‑by‑design across applications and integrations. Assume a leadership role in adopting new technologies, executing proof‑of‑concept activities and guiding their evaluation and production readiness.
* Drive and support AI‑enabled capabilities, such as intelligent recommendations, analytics, and AI‑assisted quality and automation solutions, ensuring enterprise‑grade adoption. Ensure architecture documentation is comprehensive, accurate, versioned, and maintained across releases.
* Responsible for ensuring compliance with applicable external and internal regulations, procedures, and guidelines.
* Living Hitachi Energy’s core values safety and integrity, which means taking responsibility for your own actions while caring for your colleagues and the business.


**Your background**
* Required bachelor’s or master’s degree in engineering (Computer Science, IT, Electrical, or related field) with minimum 8\+ years of proven experience in solution or application architecture, software development, and enterprise systems. Strong knowledge of software and application design principles, object‑oriented programming, and architectural patterns.
* Strong understanding of software development lifecycle (SDLC) and engineering best practices. Knowledge of software quality assurance principles and secure software development lifecycle practices.
* Familiarity with UML and architecture modeling techniques, with a proven track record in producing high‑quality architectural documentation. Hands‑on experience in software development and coding, using technologies such as C\#/.NET, Java, Angular/React; experience with NodeJS or Python is a plus.
* Excellent understanding of web‑based and cloud technologies. Hands‑on experience with microservices and REST APIs, containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes). Experience with data management systems, including SQL and NoSQL databases, and messaging/event‑driven architectures.
* Familiarity with authentication, authorization, and SSO concepts (e.g., OAuth, OpenID Connect) and cross‑cutting concerns such as logging and monitoring. Strong knowledge of Linux operating systems, scripting, networking fundamentals, VPNs, and firewall concepts. Experience with cloud computing platforms (e.g., Microsoft Azure, AWS, Google Cloud).
* Experience with agile development methodologies, testing frameworks, unit testing, and test automation. Exposure to DevOps practices, tools, CI/CD pipelines (e.g., Git, infrastructure as code, automation tools). Strong organizational and leadership skills, with a technical mindset and attention to detail. Big‑picture, customer‑focused problem‑solving abilities. Technical mindset and great attention to details.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills. Proficiency in English, both written and spoken. Ability to work in an agile and collaborative team environment. Strong problem\-solving and analytical skills.
* Good communication skills with the ability to interact with global stakeholders. Proven ability to take ownership and deliver tasks independently.


**More About Us**
 Excited about a new opportunity? If this sounds like you, we’d like to see your application! Our selection process is ongoing, so don’t wait—apply today!
   

  

 Publication date : 2026\-05\-20

f2fb686e.title: Tech S and T-DA -SM Architect-MENA-GDSF04
f2fb686e.description:
At EY, you’ll have the chance to build a career as unique as you are, with the global scale, support, inclusive culture and technology to become the best version of you. And we’re counting on your unique voice and perspective to help EY become even better, too. Join us and build an exceptional experience for yourself, and a better working world for all.
   

  

**Job Description: Digital Technology Architect – MENA**
 We are seeking an experienced Digital Technology Architect to define and shape end\-to\-end technology solutions for complex business opportunities and client engagements. This role is responsible for translating business requirements into scalable, secure, and practical architectures, while supporting proposal development and solution responses. The ideal candidate brings deep hands\-on experience across application development, database design, user interface design, and programming, along with strong expertise in at least one major cloud platform.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design and develop end\-to\-end digital technology solutions aligned with business goals, client requirements, and enterprise architecture standards.
* Lead solution shaping and architecture definition for strategic opportunities, ensuring technical feasibility, scalability, performance, security, and maintainability.
* Craft high\-quality proposal responses, solution write\-ups, technical estimations, and architecture narratives for client bids and pursuits.
* Work closely with business, delivery, engineering, and sales teams to convert requirements into compelling and practical solution approaches.
* Provide architecture leadership across application development, including service design, system integration, APIs, and modern development patterns.
* Define and review database designs, data models, and information flows to support application and business needs.
* Guide user interface and user experience considerations to ensure intuitive, scalable, and effective digital solutions.
* Apply strong programming and development knowledge to evaluate implementation approaches, engineering trade\-offs, and delivery risks.
* Drive architecture best practices, reusable patterns, standards, and governance across the solution lifecycle.
* Serve as a subject matter expert in at least one major cloud provider such as Microsoft Azure, Amazon Web Services, or Google Cloud Platform.
* Collaborate with delivery teams during implementation to ensure architectural integrity and successful execution.
* Support technology evaluations, proof of concepts, and innovation initiatives to strengthen solution quality and competitiveness.


**Required Qualifications**
* 15–18 years of overall experience in technology architecture, software engineering, or related digital technology roles.
* Proven experience in designing enterprise\-grade solutions across applications, data, and integration layers.
* Strong experience in solutioning and responding to proposals, RFPs, RFIs, or client pursuits.
* Deep expertise in at least one major cloud platform, with the ability to architect cloud\-native or hybrid solutions.
* Significant hands\-on exposure to application development, database design, user interfaces, and programming.
* Strong understanding of software architecture principles, design patterns, integration patterns, and non\-functional requirements.
* Ability to communicate complex technical ideas clearly to both technical and business stakeholders.
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Relevant cloud certifications in the chosen cloud platform.
* Experience in digital transformation, modernization, and enterprise solution architecture.
* Exposure to agile delivery, DevSecOps, API\-led integration, and modern engineering practices.
* Experience engaging with senior stakeholders and participating in pre\-sales or consulting discussions.
* Architecture certifications such as TOGAF or equivalent are an advantage.


**Core Competencies**
* Solution architecture and design
* Proposal response and technical solutioning
* Cloud architecture
* Application development and engineering leadership
* Database and data design
* User interface and experience awareness
* Programming and technical problem\-solving
* Stakeholder communication and collaboration


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY exists to build a better working world, helping to create long\-term value for clients, people and society and build trust in the capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data and technology, diverse EY teams in over 150 countries provide trust through assurance and help clients grow, transform and operate.
   

  

 Working across assurance, consulting, law, strategy, tax and transactions, EY teams ask better questions to find new answers for the complex issues facing our world today.

de5fd5d9.title: SOLUTION ARCHITECT (CLOUD & APPLICATIONS) - VOIS
de5fd5d9.description:
**Who We Are**
 VOIS (Vodafone Intelligent Solutions) is a strategic arm of Vodafone Group Plc, creating value for customers by delivering intelligent solutions through Talent, Technology \& Transformation.
   

  

 As the largest shared services organisation in the global telco industry with 30,000 FTE, our portfolio of next\-generation solutions and services are designed in partnership with customers across Vodafone Group, local markets, and partner markets to simplify and drive growth. With our strategic partner Accenture, we work alongside our Vodafone customers, other Telco and tech companies to drive transformation, meet the challenges of our industry and ensure we stay relevant and resilient. This partnership is a unique, industry\-first model which brings together the best of in\-house and 3rd party capability.
   

  

 We work with customers across 28 countries from 10 VOIS locations: Albania, Egypt, Hungary, India, Romania, Spain, Turkey, UK, Germany, Ireland, and with a network of teams in Czech Republic, Italy, Greece, and Portugal.
   

  

 \#VOIS \#BeUnrivalled \#CreateTheFuture
   

  

**About This Role**
 We are seeking a Solution Architect to design and deliver cloud\-native applications using Microsoft Azure and Google Cloud, with a strong focus on .NET, React, and Node.js technologies. The role serves as the technical authority within the VOIS Centre, ensuring high standards of functionality, performance, security, and resilience. The individual will collaborate closely with product owners, service teams, and development teams across locations to shape the technical roadmap, drive solution excellence, and continuously enhance application and service delivery for Vodafone stakeholders.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
 Define, implement, deploy, and maintain development, staging, and production environments for projects
   

  

 Act as a trusted advisor by demonstrating deep expertise in cloud platforms, architecture, and application development
   

  

 Analyse requirements and design scalable, reliable, and decentralised cloud solutions from concept to deployment
   

  

 Identify, assess, and mitigate technical risks while ensuring timely resolution of issues in collaboration with build and operations teams
   

  

 Partner with management and cross\-functional teams to ensure solutions deliver value and quality outcomes
   

  

 Drive continuous improvement in development practices and architectural standards
   

  

 Support development and deployment activities across the VOIS Centre cloud landscape
   

  

**Who You Are**
 Holds a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science or a related field, or equivalent experience
   

  

 Brings 12\+ years of experience in cloud technologies, with recent expertise (4–5 years) in Microsoft Azure
   

  

 Possesses strong knowledge of cloud security, infrastructure hardening, and application security standards
   

  

 Demonstrates programming expertise in C\#, .NET technologies, and front\-end frameworks such as Angular or React
   

  

 Has experience working with SharePoint Online, SharePoint Framework (SPFx), and Graph API
   

  

 Is proficient in designing, building, and managing cloud systems across PaaS, SaaS, and IaaS models
   

  

 Has hands\-on experience with Azure DevOps and CI/CD pipeline design and implementation
   

  

**Shows Strong Problem\-solving Capabilities And Adaptability To New Technologies**
 Communicates effectively across diverse engineering teams and stakeholders, including external delivery partners
   

  

 Holds (or is working towards) Microsoft Azure Solution Architect certification (preferred)
   

  

**Not a perfect fit?**
 Concerned you may not meet every requirement? Vodafone is committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive. If you are excited about this role but your experience does not align exactly with every aspect of the job description, you are encouraged to apply. You may be the right candidate for this or another opportunity, and the recruitment team will support you in exploring where your skills fit best.
   

  

**What's In It For You**
 Opportunity to shape and lead cloud architecture within large\-scale, global telecom programmes
   

  

 Exposure to cutting\-edge technologies across Azure, Google Cloud, and modern application frameworks
   

  

 Collaboration with cross\-functional global teams including product, engineering, and operations
   

  

 A role with high impact, influencing solution design, delivery quality, and technical strategy
   

  

 Continuous learning environment with opportunities for certifications and professional growth
   

  

**What Skills You Will Learn**
 Advanced cloud architecture design across multi\-cloud environments
   

  

 Enterprise\-grade security, scalability, and resilience practices
   

  

 Modern DevOps methodologies including CI/CD pipeline optimisation
   

  

 Stakeholder management and influencing technical decision\-making at scale
   

  

 Best practices in distributed systems and cloud\-native application development
   

  

**VOIS Equal Opportunity Employer Commitment**
 Vodafone recognises and celebrates the value of diversity in building a workforce that reflects the customers and communities it serves. No form of discrimination is tolerated. This includes, but is not limited to, discrimination based on race, colour, age, veteran status, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, pregnancy, maternity or parental status, ethnicity, disability, religion or belief, political affiliation, trade union membership, nationality, citizenship, indigenous status, medical condition, HIV status, neurodiversity, social origin, cultural background, marital or civil partnership status, or socio\-economic background.
   

  

**Join Us**
 At Vodafone, we’re working hard to build a better future. A more connected, inclusive and sustainable world. As a dynamic global community, it's our human spirit, together with technology, that empowers us to achieve this.
   

  

 We challenge and innovate in order to connect people, businesses, and communities across the world. Delighting our customers and earning their loyalty drive us, and we experiment, learn fast and get it done, together.
   

  

 With us, you can truly be yourself and belong, share inspiration, embrace new opportunities, thrive, and make a real difference.
   

  

**Alert**
 Apply for Vodafone jobs only through the official Vodafone Careers website to avoid job scams and fraud.
   

  

 \#JDEnhancedByTARA
   

  

**Follow us on social media and \#StayConnected**
 LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/vois/
   

  

 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/voisglobal
   

  

 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/voisglobal/

0e77e8b0.title: Senior Solutions Architect, GPU Cloud GenAI – Infrastructure
0e77e8b0.description:
NVIDIA is seeking an experienced Solutions Architect \& Engineer (SAE) with deep expertise in large\-scale GPU cluster infrastructure and generative AI enablement. As a pivotal member of our Infrastructure and Platform Engineering team, you will architect and build the GPU cloud platforms (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS) that power the world's most demanding AI workloads. This position sits at the intersection of large\-scale infrastructure engineering and applied AI, requiring both technical depth in platform development and the ability to guide enterprise customers through complex GPU infrastructure deployments.
   

  

 The work location for this role is in Mumbai.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Design and architect scalable IaaS, PaaS, and SaaS layers for large\-scale GPU cluster environments (32\+ HGX/DGX nodes), spanning compute, networking, and storage orchestration.
* Build multi\-tenant GPU cloud platforms with production\-grade APIs, control planes, and platform services that abstract infrastructure complexity for end users and application teams.
* Develop cluster orchestration pipelines using Kubernetes (GPU operators, device plugins, multi\-tenancy) and Slurm, optimizing for performance, reliability, and resource efficiency at scale.
* Define and implement best practices for GPU resource scheduling, isolation, quota management, and observability, ensuring secure multi\-tenant isolation and compliance.
* Advise customers on deploying and scaling generative AI workloads (LLMs, MLLMs, RAG pipelines) on your infrastructure platforms, translating AI requirements into infrastructure specifications.
* Engage with C\-level executives and infrastructure teams to understand requirements, deploy GPU clusters across on\-premises and hybrid cloud environments, and drive platform adoption.
* Collaborate with NVIDIA engineering teams to resolve deep infrastructure bugs, provide feedback on platform capabilities, and influence product roadmap decisions.
* Partner with customer infrastructure teams to tune, scale, and optimize GPU clusters for cost efficiency, throughput, and AI workload performance.


**What We Need To See**
* 5\+ years of hands\-on infrastructure or platform engineering experience, with demonstrated expertise designing and operating large\-scale GPU clusters (100\+ nodes).
* Deep expertise building IaaS, PaaS, and SaaS platform layers—architecting and developing infrastructure foundations, not consuming cloud services.
* Proficiency in Kubernetes (GPU operator, device plugins, multi\-tenancy) and Slurm for HPC and AI workloads.
* Hands\-on experience with infrastructure\-as\-code (Terraform, Helm, Ansible), CI/CD pipelines, and observability stacks (Prometheus, Grafana, DCGC).
* Strong coding ability in Python and/or Go/C\+\+, building platform tooling and automation from scratch.
* Experience with cloud\-native networking (InfiniBand, RoCE, RDMA) and distributed storage solutions for GPU environments.
* Excellent communication skills, credibly engaging both infrastructure engineers and C\-level stakeholders on complex technical and strategic topics.
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or equivalent experience.


**Ways To Stand Out From The Crowd**
* Working knowledge of LLM, MLLM, and RAG frameworks and how they map to infrastructure requirements.
* Hands\-on experience with model serving frameworks (Triton Inference Server, vLLM, TensorRT\-LLM) and inference optimization techniques.
* Proven track record optimizing infrastructure for cost efficiency, throughput, and resource utilization in multi\-tenant production environments.
* Deep understanding of distributed training concepts (data parallelism, model parallelism, pipeline parallelism) from an infrastructure perspective.
* Experience deploying and managing GPU clusters in cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP) and on\-premises infrastructure at enterprise scale


 With competitive salaries and a generous benefits package, we are widely considered to be one of the technology world’s most desirable employers. We have some of the most forward\-thinking and hardworking people in the world working for us and, due to unprecedented growth, our exclusive engineering teams are rapidly growing. If you're a creative and autonomous engineer with a real passion for technology, we want to hear from you! NVIDIA is committed to fostering a diverse work environment and proud to be an equal opportunity employer. As we highly value diversity in our current and future employees, we do not discriminate (including in our hiring and promotion practices) on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability status or any other characteristic protected by law.
