1e2cc86d.title: AI Solution Architect (FROM SAAS/ ECOMMERCE/ FINTECH)
1e2cc86d.description:
**About The Opportunity**
 A fast\-scaling tech consultancy operating at the intersection of SaaS, Fintech, and E\-commerce, we help global brands architect, deploy, and scale intelligent AI\-driven platforms that power personalization, automation, and real\-time decision\-making. Our clients span Fortune 500s to high\-growth startups—we translate complex business needs into scalable, secure, and intelligent AI architectures leveraging cloud\-native stacks, GenAI frameworks, and enterprise\-grade data ecosystems.
   

  

**Role \& Responsibilities**
* Design end\-to\-end AI solution blueprints for SaaS, Fintech, and E\-commerce clients—covering data pipelines, model orchestration, API gateways, and observability layers.
* Lead AI architecture reviews, aligning technical design with compliance (GDPR, PCI\-DSS), scalability targets, and cost\-optimization goals.
* Integrate LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral) and vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate) into client platforms for RAG, agent\-based workflows, and real\-time recommendation engines.
* Partner with data science and engineering teams to productionize ML models using MLOps tooling (MLflow, SageMaker, DVC) and Kubernetes\-based inference services.
* Define cloud architecture on AWS/Azure/GCP—leveraging serverless, event\-driven, and containerized patterns to support low\-latency AI services.
* Advise on AI governance, model drift detection, bias mitigation, and ethical AI frameworks tailored to regulated verticals (Fintech, Healthcare, E\-commerce).


**Skills \& Qualifications**
**Must\-Have**
* AWS
* Azure
* GCP
* Python
* LangChain
* TensorFlow
* PyTorch
* MLflow
* Kubernetes
* Apache Airflow
* OpenAI API
* LangGraph
* FAISS
* Pinecone
* GenAI
* LLM
* RAG
* LLMOps
* MLOps
* PCI\-DSS
* GDPR


**Preferred**
* Experience with fintech compliance frameworks (e.g., PSD2, KYC/AML architecture)
* Published AI solutions or case studies in e\-commerce personalization or SaaS automation
* Certifications: AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty, Azure AI Engineer Associate


**Benefits \& Culture Highlights**
* Work with global clients building next\-gen AI products—no internal legacy systems to refactor
* Hybrid flexibility \+ travel opportunities to client sites across APAC, MEA, and North America
* Access to cutting\-edge AI tools, training budgets, and speaking opportunities at major tech conferences


 Skills: e\-commerce,azure,automation,data,api,fintech,commerce,architecture,aws,saas

546e64cc.title: Program Manager
546e64cc.description:
**Program Manager**
===================


Aga Khan Agency for Habitat
**The position**


**Job Scope and Main Responsibilities:*** Provide overall project management by being responsible for the implementation, coordination, and documentation of the Urban risk resilience programme focusing on urban flooding, urban heat and other climate change issues.
* Lead the team of development professionals i.e., Programme coordinators / officers to ensure timely and quality programme deliverables.
* Responsible for design development, project coordination, monitoring, and evaluation of the program.
* Regularly review and monitor the project and ensure that the teams follow the project guidelines.
* Maintain good relationship with relevant government authorities, Non\-Government Organizations, and other relevant stakeholders.
* Conduct regular field visits to monitor the project implementation process and prepare periodic progress reports as required.
* Ensure that project documents are complete, current, and maintained appropriately.
* Produce relevant presentations and documentation to key group and relevant stakeholders.
* Coordinate with internal and external for procurement of services for implementation
* Development of new proposals for urban habitat risk resilience.
**The requirements**


**Qualification and Experience:*** Postgraduate preferable, minimum requirement graduation in Urban Planning/ Urban design/ Urban Policy.
* Experience in development sector is desirable. Minimum 5 years of professional experience.
* Coordination with relevant stakeholders for effective implementation and delivery of projects within agreed timelines and budgets. Ability to work professionally and independently with minimal daily supervision.
* Strong communication and documentation skills.
* Desire to work dedicatedly to achieve results in the field of climate change.
* Knowledge of software's – MS office, Google earth pro, Adobe, GIS. Language skills – English, Hindi and Marathi are preferred.

**Sector**


Social Development
**About the Agency**


A new agency, the Aga Khan Agency for the Habitat (AKAH), works to ensure that people live in physical settings that are as safe as possible from the effects of natural disasters, that residents who do live in such high risk areas are able to cope with disasters in terms of preparedness and response, and that these settings provide access to social and financial services that lead to greater opportunities and a better quality of life.
**Region**


South Asia
**Location**


India
**Job Expires**


15\-Jul\-2026

d9df5c69.title: Technical Program Manager
d9df5c69.description:
**Overview**  

Microsoft is a company where passionate innovators come to collaborate, envision what can be and take their careers further. This is a world of more possibilities, more innovation, more openness, and the sky is the limit thinking in a cloud\-enabled world.


Microsoft’s Azure Data engineering team is leading the transformation of analytics in the world of data with products like databases, data integration, big data analytics, messaging \& real\-time analytics, and business intelligence. The products our portfolio include Microsoft Fabric, Azure SQL DB, Azure Cosmos DB, Azure PostgreSQL, Azure Data Factory, Azure Synapse Analytics, Azure Service Bus, Azure Event Grid, and Power BI. Our mission is to build the data platform for the age of AI, powering a new class of data\-first applications and driving a data culture.

  

Within Azure Data, the Azure Data Analytics team builds the core analytics experiences in Microsoft Fabric. We own the Data Warehouse, Data Engineering, Data Science, AI, and Power BI workloads, enabling customers to ingest, transform, analyze, and derive insights from structured, semi\-structured, and unstructured data at enterprise scale. Our team is at the center of Microsoft's strategy to deliver a seamless, end\-to\-end analytics experience in Fabric.


We are Azure Data, a Microsoft team driving the future of data processing in the Microsoft Cloud. Our engineering and product teams build some of the most advanced, large\-scale data processing services in the world used daily by millions of developers and the world’s largest enterprises.  

Cosmos is Microsoft’s big data analytics SaaS service providing compute and storage capabilities to power mission critical workloads for businesses at Microsoft. It is the central repository where Microsoft teams ingest, store, process, query, and share structured and unstructured data at scale. Cosmos is only available to 1P customers and is run as a shared, multi\-tenant service optimized for big data analytics. Cosmos is not just a big data platform but a complete ecosystem of tools and solutions that have been developed by the customer community.  

Our team actively uses AI tools including Copilots, internal platforms, and data driven insights \- to accelerate product discovery, design, validation, and execution. We expect candidates to be comfortable using AI as a core part of how they work. As part of the product development cycle, you will collaborate with stakeholders, design new platform capabilities, validate them with customers iteratively, and help bring them to the world  

 We do not just value differences or different perspectives. We seek them out and invite them in so we can tap into the collective power of everyone in the company. As a result, our customers are better served.

 **Responsibilities**  

•Own end‑to‑end delivery of platform features for the Cosmos service, from problem definition through design, implementation and rollout.  

* Drive the product strategy and roadmap for key areas of the Cosmos platform you own by leveraging AI.
* Translate customer business needs into well‑scoped program plans and engineering requirements.
* Drive capacity planning and Supply chain management for the Cosmos platform.
* Lead cross‑team execution by coordinating dependencies across engineering, operations, security, and other platform teams.
* Partner with engineering and live‑site teams to support operational readiness, reliability goals, and service health improvements.
* Manage the Incident and change management process for the Cosmos environment along with the DRI activities and define and monitor success metrics (e.g., reliability, performance, adoption, cost efficiency) for owned features.
* Communicate clearly with stakeholders on status, risks, decisions, and trade‑offs and contribute to a strong PM culture through documentation, design reviews, and knowledge sharing.


 Embody our culture and values **Qualifications**  

Required/Minimum Qualifications


•Good experience in the software industry, with a degree in computer science or a related technical field OR equivalent experience 2\+ years of technical experience in product management role.  

* Hands\-on experience with LLM APIs (e.g. OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure OpenAI) and tool use.

Job Requirements: Other \& Additional


Ability to meet Microsoft, customer and/or government security screening requirements are required for this role. These requirements include, but are not limited to the following specialized security screenings: Microsoft Cloud Background Check:

* This position will be required to pass the Microsoft Cloud background check upon hire/transfer and every two years thereafter.
* Preferred/Additional Qualifications


•Proven experience to drive complex initiatives from concept to delivery.  


	+ Strong communication skills, but also technical skills, including the ability to explain complex technical concepts clearly and to be able to discuss complex technical issues with engineering for resolutions.
	+ Good knowledge of Supply chain management and capacity planning.
	+ Good understanding of SQL, Kusto, Power BI.
	+ Experience with cloud technologies (Paas, Saas, Analytics \& AI, DevOps and Networking).Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws, regulations, and ordinances. If you


need assistance and/or reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application or the recruiting process, please send a request via the Accommodation request form (Accessibility \| Microsoft Careers).


Benefits/perks listed below may vary depending on the nature of your employment with Microsoft and the country where you work.


\#azdat


\#azuredata


\#Cosmos , \#BigData \#Hyperscale
  

This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.

  

Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process**.**

928b7489.title: Business Program Manager - Customer Lifecycle Operations
928b7489.description:
**Overview**  

Customer Lifecycle Operations (CLO) is part of Microsoft Business Operations and is responsible for the design, delivery, and optimisation of global outsourced digital sales and customer engagement programs. CLO manages a large\-scale ecosystem of vendor partners to drive customer acquisition, retention, and revenue growth across Microsoft’s commercial businesses.


The CLO Program Manager is a strategic and operational leader responsible for managing end\-to\-end program delivery across a portfolio of global vendor\-led programs spanning Vendor Digital Sales (VDS), Digital Customer Acquisition (DCA), Solutions, and Renewals.


This role requires a strong combination of AI\-enabled program leadership, continuous improvement mindset, commercial acumen, and vendor management expertise, with the ability to operate effectively in complex, global, and highly matrixed environments.

 **Responsibilities**  

Program Leadership \& Execution

* Support the design, implementation, and continuous improvement of complex global programs across multiple CLO motions.
* Own end\-to\-end program delivery, including scope, timelines, governance, risk management, and execution.
* Drive Rhythm of Business (ROB), ensuring alignment, accountability, and delivery against objectives.
* Define and manage success criteria, including KPIs, SLAs, OKRs, and program performance metrics.

AI/CI Transformation

* Continuously re\-invent workflows by eliminating waste and simplifying processes before automation
* Integrate AI, automation, and Copilot capabilities into program delivery to improve efficiency and outcomes.
* Proactively identify and implement opportunities to automate workflows, enhance reporting, and drive data\-led insights.
* Champion adoption of AI\-enabled tools across internal teams and vendor partners
* Contribute to the evolution of AI\-first, digitally enabled sales, and operations models.

Commercial \& Sales Impact

* Align program execution with Microsoft’s commercial priorities, including pipeline generation, revenue growth, and customer retention.
* Partner with Sales, Customer Success, and Solution teams to deliver measurable business outcomes.
* Monitor and optimise sales performance indicators, including pipeline health, conversion, and renewal metrics.
* Translate business strategy into executable vendor\-led sales motions.

Vendor \& Partner Management

* Manage an ecosystem of outsourced vendors, ensuring delivery of contracted outcomes and compliance with Microsoft standards.
* Establish and lead vendor performance management processes, including scorecards, reviews, and audits.
* Drive continuous improvement through benchmarking, insights, and performance analytics.
* Manage vendor capacity, cost, and capability alignment with program requirements.

Data \& Insights

* Leverage data, analytics, and dashboards to evaluate program performance and inform decision\-making.
* Conduct cost\-benefit and ROI analysis to drive optimisation and value realisation.
* Translate complex data into actionable insights and executive\-level narratives.
* Identify risks and improvement opportunities through data\-led analysis.

Cross\-Functional Leadership

* Collaborate across a global network of stakeholders, including Sales, Finance, Engineering, and Operations
* Influence and align stakeholders in a matrixed environment to drive outcomes and adoption.
* Lead change management initiatives to ensure successful implementation of new programmes and capabilities.
* Communicate effectively with senior stakeholders, providing clarity and context in complex environments.
* Develop and maintain strong relationships with Microsoft stakeholders and global tele vendors, ensuring alignment with Microsoft's goals and objectives.
* Ensure that supplier (global vendor) performance consistently meets and exceeds the expectations of our stakeholders. The role demands significant executive stakeholder engagement and adept stakeholder management within a matrix organization.
 **Qualifications**  

Required Qualifications

* Bachelor’s degree in business, Operations, Finance, or a related field (or equivalent experience)
* Demonstrated experience in program management, operations, or a related discipline.
* Proven ability to manage complex, cross\-functional programs in a global environment.

Preferred Qualifications

* Experience in sales, sales operations, or commercial program management
* Experience managing outsourced vendors, partners, or supplier ecosystems.
* Ability to design, measure, and optimise workflows using structured CI frameworks.
* Experience applying AI, automation, or advanced analytics to business processes.
* Experience in technology, cloud, or digital sales environments
* Advanced degree (for example, MBA) preferred.

Required Skills \& Competencies


AI/CI Fluency

* Ability to streamline processes and eliminate redundancy.
* Ability to apply AI tools and automation to improve program delivery and efficiency.
* Curiosity and continuous learning mindset in emerging technologies and digital transformation

Commercial Acumen

* Understanding of sales drivers, customer lifecycle, and revenue\-based performance metrics
* Ability to connect program execution to measurable business outcomes.

Vendor \& Stakeholder Management

* Strong experience in managing vendor performance, governance, and relationships.
* Ability to influence without authority across internal and external stakeholders.

Core Programme Management Capabilities

* Problem solving and troubleshooting: ability to work through ambiguity and deliver structured solutions.
* Analytical thinking: data\-driven approach to decision making and performance management.
* Communication and storytelling: clear, concise communication tailored to varied audiences.
* Agility and adaptability: ability to respond effectively in fast\-paced, changing environments.
* Cross\-functional collaboration builds strong partnerships across teams.
  

  

This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.

  

Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process**.**

9f0fbcf9.title: Senior Creative Higher Education Engagement Manager
9f0fbcf9.description:
**Principal Creative Higher Education Engagement Manager, India**
 Based in Noida/Bangalore
   

  

**Our Company**
 Changing the world through digital experiences is what Adobe’s all about. We give everyone—from emerging artists to global brands—everything they need to design and deliver exceptional digital experiences! We’re passionate about empowering people to create beautiful and powerful images, videos, and apps, and transform how companies interact with customers across every screen.
   

  

 We’re on a mission to hire the very best and are committed to creating exceptional employee experiences where everyone is respected and has access to equal opportunity. We realize that new ideas can come from everywhere in the organization, and we know the next big idea could be yours!
   

  

**Role Overview**
 Adobe is seeking a strategic leader with deep experience in the creative industries to drive adoption and long\-term preference for Adobe creative and generative AI workflows across top design\-focused higher education programs through faculty partnerships, curriculum integration, and industry workflow alignment.
   

  

**What** 
**You’ll** 
**Do**
* Academic \& Executive Relationships: Build trusted relationships with design and film faculty, chairs, and deans and advise on curriculum modernization, generative AI adoption, and industry\-aligned creative workflows.
* Design Workflow \& Curriculum: Translate real\-world and forward\-facing workflows into course and assignment recommendations that you deliver to faculty.
* Generative AI Leadership: Guide responsible adoption of generative AI in design and film programs and educate faculty and students on use cases, authorship, and ethical considerations.
* Adoption Programs: Design and scale faculty programs, course pilots, portfolio initiatives, and industry\-connected capstones that drive product adoption.
* Training Programs: enable and lead a team of training partners on top creative and AI workflows
* Market \& Product Insight: Deliver structured insight on competitive tools, generative AI perception, and workflow gaps to influence Product, PMM, and GTM strategy.
* Community \& Evangelist Ecosystem: Develop advocates across faculty, industry practitioners, and creative technologists to scale reach and impact of our platform through trusted voices and peer\-led adoption.
* Cross\-Discipline Account Strategy: Partner with Film, Video, and Motion evangelists to align institutional strategy, executive messaging, and cross\-discipline creative workflow storytelling.


**Who You Are**
* Design Workflow Authority: Deep credibility in professional design workflows and creative production pipelines, with knowledge of the film industry as a plus.
* Executive Influence: Proven ability to influence academic leadership and complex institutions.
* AI Leader: Practical and informed perspective on generative AI in creative production.
* Workflow Translator: Skilled at turning complex creative workflows into teachable, scalable models.
* Academic Experience: Experience teaching, lecturing, or developing curriculum in design education.
* Community Building: Experience with pulling together a community of designs, faculty members in digital or physical forums.
* Cross\-Discipline Exposure: Experience working across design, motion, and video creative teams.
* Project Management: Lead complex, cross\-functional initiatives from strategy through execution—defining scope, aligning teams, managing timelines and resources, and delivering high\-impact outcomes in creative and academic environments.
* Credentials: 8\+ years leading creative initiatives in industry and/or higher ed. Degree or equivalent experience in a creative or design\-related field; background spanning design, motion, and film environments.


**About Adobe**
 Adobe empowers everyone to create through innovative platforms and tools that unleash creativity, productivity and personalized customer experiences. Adobe’s industry\-leading offerings including Adobe Acrobat Studio, Adobe Express, Adobe Firefly, Creative Cloud, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Manager, and GenStudio enable people and businesses to turn ideas into impact, powered by AI and driven by human ingenuity.
   

  

 Our 30,000\+ employees worldwide are creating the future and raising the bar as we drive the next decade of growth. We’re on a mission to hire the very best and believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. At Adobe, we believe that great ideas can come from anywhere in the organization. The next big idea could be yours.
   

  

**Let’s Adobe together**
 At Adobe, we believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. Learn more about Adobe life, including our values and culture, focus on people, purpose and community, Adobe for All, comprehensive benefits programs, the stories we tell, the customers we serve, and how you can help us advance our mission of empowering everyone to create.
   

  

 Adobe is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on gender, race or color, ethnicity or national origin, age, disability, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic. Learn more.
   

  

 Adobe aims to make our Careers website and recruiting process accessible to any and all users. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation to navigate our website or complete the application process, email accommodations@adobe.com or call \+1 408\-536\-3015\.
   

  

**AI Use Guidelines for Interviews:**
 Our interviews are designed to reflect your own skills and thinking. The use of AI or recording tools during live interviews is not permitted unless explicitly invited by the interviewer or approved in advance as part of a reasonable accommodation. If these tools are used inappropriately or in a way that misrepresents your work, your application may not move forward in the process.
   

  

 At Adobe, we empower employees to innovate with AI — and we look for candidates eager to do the same. As part of the hiring experience, we provide clear guidance on where AI is encouraged during the process and where it’s restricted during live interviews. See how we think about AI in the hiring experience.

06edff81.title: Senior Program Manager - Technical
06edff81.description:
**About the Job:**


The Phased Gates Team (PGT) is the engineering heart of Red Hat's proactive support strategy. Our vision is to be the technical "Supportability Intelligence Center of Excellence" for the entire company. We are building the "Supportability Intelligence Platform"—the core service that provides our expert rules and AI\-driven insights to all of Red Hat's in\-product health and AI initiatives.


This is a high\-impact, strategic leadership role. You will be the "Product Owner" for this new "Supportability Intelligence Platform." You will be responsible for defining its vision, managing its roadmap, and guiding the engineering team (our Phased Gates Architects) to build a scalable, reliable, and powerful service. You will be the primary link between our technical architects and the rest of the business, ensuring our intelligence is delivered in the most effective way possible.

**What will you do:**

* Own the Platform Strategy \& Roadmap: Act as the strategic "product owner" for the "Supportability Intelligence Platform." You will define and manage the product roadmap, prioritize the backlog, and make the key decisions to guide its development and expansion.
* Lead Technical Program Execution: Manage the end\-to\-end execution of our technical initiatives, including the development of our AI\-driven models, the expansion of our proactive coverage to new products like RHEL, and the delivery of our intelligence via APIs, SDKs, or data models.
* Manage Stakeholder \& "Consumer" Integration: Serve as the primary point of contact for the "consumers" of our platform. You will manage the strategic integrations with other Red Hat AI platforms, in\-product health teams, and as\-a\-service offerings.
* Partner with the FQT Intelligence Hub: Manage the "Operational Loop" with the Field Quality Team (FQT). You will be responsible for the formal intake process, translating their validated insights into a prioritized backlog of features and rules for the PGT's architects.
* Drive an AI\-First Engineering Culture: Champion our AI\-first mission by working with your technical team to embed AI and automation into every part of the development lifecycle, accelerating our own execution.

**What will you bring:**

* 5\+ Year experience in proven operating at a Senior level in a Technical Program Management or Technical Product Management role.
* A strong track record of managing a technical, "as\-a\-service" product or platform, especially one focused on data, APIs, or AI.
* Deep knowledge of the software development lifecycle and Agile methodologies, with experience managing a backlog for a senior engineering team.
* A genuine passion for AI and automation and a clear vision for how to build and scale AI\-driven products.
* Experience managing programs that involve the development and integration of AI/ML models.
* A commitment to data integrity and validation, applying critical judgment to all data and AI\-generated outputs.
* Communication \& Influence: Excellent communication skills, with the ability to build trust and foster transparency when translating complex technical roadmaps to non\-technical stakeholders and executive leadership.
* Problem Solving \& Critical Thinking: The ability to navigate high levels of ambiguity, make difficult prioritization decisions, and define a clear, strategic path for a technical product.
* Collaboration \& Relationship Building: A natural "bridge\-builder" who creates an inclusive environment for your engineering team and collaborates effectively with peer teams (like the FQT, BI, and other product teams).
* Adaptability \& Learning: The ability to thrive in ambiguity and a demonstrated commitment to continuous learning in the rapidly evolving field of AI and platform services. Stop.


\# LI\-CS1

**About Red Hat**


Red Hat is the world’s leading provider of enterprise open source software solutions, using a community\-powered approach to deliver high\-performing Linux, cloud, container, and Kubernetes technologies. Spread across 40\+ countries, our associates work flexibly across work environments, from in\-office, to office\-flex, to fully remote, depending on the requirements of their role. Red Hatters are encouraged to bring their best ideas, no matter their title or tenure. We're a leader in open source because of our open and inclusive environment. We hire creative, passionate people ready to contribute their ideas, help solve complex problems, and make an impact.

**Inclusion at Red Hat**  

Red Hat’s culture is built on the open source principles of transparency, collaboration, and inclusion, where the best ideas can come from anywhere and anyone. When this is realized, it empowers people from different backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences to come together to share ideas, challenge the status quo, and drive innovation. Our aspiration is that everyone experiences this culture with equal opportunity and access, and that all voices are not only heard but also celebrated. We hope you will join our celebration, and we welcome and encourage applicants from all the beautiful dimensions that compose our global village.

**Equal Opportunity Policy (EEO)**  

Red Hat is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and an affirmative action employer. We review applications for employment without regard to their race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, ancestry, citizenship, age, veteran status, genetic information, physical or mental disability, medical condition, marital status, or any other basis prohibited by law.

### **Red Hat does not seek or accept unsolicited resumes or CVs from recruitment agencies. We are not responsible for, and will not pay, any fees, commissions, or any other payment related to unsolicited resumes or CVs except as required in a written contract between Red Hat and the recruitment agency or party requesting payment of a fee.**

### **Red Hat supports individuals with disabilities and provides reasonable accommodations to job applicants. If you need assistance completing our online job application, email** **application\-assistance@redhat.com****. General inquiries, such as those regarding the status of a job application, will not receive a reply.**

e352252e.title: Tech Infrastructure Program Manager, AWS Data Center Planning & Delivery
e352252e.description:
**Description**
 AWS Infrastructure Services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all AWS global infrastructure. In other words, we’re the people who keep the cloud running. We support all AWS data centers and all of the servers, storage, networking, power, and cooling equipment that ensure our customers have continual access to the innovation they rely on. We work on the most challenging problems, with thousands of variables impacting the supply chain — and we’re looking for talented people who want to help.
   

  

 You’ll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, operations managers, and other vital roles. You’ll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers. And you’ll experience an inclusive culture that welcomes bold ideas and empowers you to own them to completion.
   

  

 Amazon Web Service (AWS) is a comprehensive, evolving, and growing business unit within Amazon.com. Since early 2006, AWS has provided a highly reliable, scalable, low\-cost cloud infrastructure platform that empowers hundreds of thousands of businesses in 190 countries to innovate and invent.
   

  

 Do you have the business background, complex cross functional program management experience, financial expertise, legal/regulatory comprehension and technical understanding? Can you communicate effectively, find clarity in ambiguity, and simplicity in complexity ?
   

  

 If yes, then come and explore this exciting role. This role in Amazon Data Services India Private Limited (ADSIPL) Telengana builds infrastructure that hosts AWS cloud services. It delivers AWS cloud infrastructure in a challenging, high growth, fast paced and customer focused work environment. In this role, you will lead cross functional teams to deliver usable data center capacity. You will partner with senior stakeholders to develop, document, manage and deliver infrastructure designs, implementation schedules and budgets. You will earn trust of your partners in your ability to solve complex issues and steer teams in right direction to deliver results, on\-time and at\-cost.
   

  

 You must be an exceptionally strong communicator (both written and verbal), and possess relevant experience in managing technical and strategic programs. If you bring past experience in data center deployment programs, great. If not, then having a background in program and project management, architecture/design, mechanical/electrical engineering, software/hardware engineering with strong urge to learn will be essential.
   

  

 Come Join us, have fun, and create history!!
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 Infrastructure TPM owns delivery of new DC across one or more availability zones in India. They manage 10\+ projects at any time. They bridge internal customers, business functions, (Planning, Finance, Procurement, Legal, Policy, Operations), and functional delivery teams (Construction, Commissioning, Controls, Fiber and Network) to enable on\-time and right sized delivery of new DC capacity.
   

  

 The scope begins with early expansion planning, which includes a feasibility analysis to approve expansion plans and associated build timelines. They evaluate multiple factors prior to approving a new plan of record, including owned/leased/collocated DC supply, utility delivery (power, water, and fiber), and long lead equipment (LLE) availability. It requires region\-wide knowledge and monitoring of in\-flight projects, major risks, and remediation efforts to ensure DC delivery is not only on track to meet supply commitments but also to meet customer demand, which is constantly changing.
   

  

 A successful TPM must be capable of managing a combination of metrics, tools, and mechanisms to remain aware of ongoing risks or issues that require their action, decision, mitigations, or effort to identify alternative solutions communicating up, down, and across the organization to align direction, gain support and drive remediation efforts
   

  

**About The Team**
 Diverse Experiences:
   

  

 Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS?
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

**Work/Life Balance**
 We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve.
   

  

**Inclusive Team Culture**
 AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee\-led and company\-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.
   

  

**Mentorship And Career Growth**
 We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 3\+ years of technical infrastructure management experience
* Knowledge of best practices and emerging technologies, related to infrastructure (i.e. network, data center, hardware, software)
* Experience with varying scenarios of infrastructure builds


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 4\+ years of data center design, construction, operations, or facility maintenance experience


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ADSIPL \- Maharashtra
   

  

 Job ID: A3191236

d8a7a2e4.title: Program Manager
d8a7a2e4.description:
**IT Program Manager**
 Department: IT Infrastructure
   

  

 Location: Hyderabad, India
   

  

 Employment Type: Full\-time
   

  

**About NationsBenefits:**
 NationsBenefits is the leading provider of supplemental benefits, flex cards, and member engagement solutions that partners with managed care organizations to provide innovative healthcare solutions designed to drive growth, improve outcomes, reduce costs, and delight members. Our comprehensive suite of innovative supplemental benefits, payments platform, and member engagement solutions help health plans deliver high\-quality benefits to their members, addressing social determinants of health and improving member health outcomes and satisfaction. With a compliance\-focused infrastructure, proprietary technology systems, and premier service delivery model, we enable our health plan partners to deliver high quality, value\-based care to millions of members.
   

  

 We are a fulfilling work environment that attracts top talent and encourages all associates to do their part in delivering premier service to internal and external customers alike. It’s how we’re transforming the healthcare industry for the better. We provide career advancement opportunities within the organization with multiple locations in Florida, California, Pennsylvania, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, and India.
   

  

 You might also like to know that NationsBenefits is also recognized as one of the fastest growing companies in America. We’re proud of how far we’ve come, and a career with us also gives you growth opportunities.
   

  

 We are looking for an Infrastructure Program Manager responsible for planning, governing, and delivering complex infrastructure programs consisting of multiple interdependent projects and workstreams. This role ensures alignment across stakeholders, manages risks and dependencies, and drives timely delivery of scalable, secure, and operationally efficient infrastructure solutions that support business operations and strategic initiatives.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
*Program Leadership \& Execution*
* Manage comprehensive infrastructure and IT\-related programs, ensuring effective planning, governance, coordination, and delivery across complex, interdependent initiatives.
* Define and maintain program roadmaps, strategic priorities, timelines, budgets, and resource allocations across multiple workstreams.
* Coordinate across site leads, engineering teams, security, and global delivery teams for successful execution.
* Ensure program\-level alignment on timelines, budgets, dependencies, and scope across all projects.
* Drive executive\-level visibility and stakeholder satisfaction throughout the program lifecycle.
* Leverage AI\-driven insights to forecast program\-level risks, dependencies, delivery trends, and financial impact.
* Manage cross\-project dependencies, ensuring alignment across infrastructure, security, and business initiatives.


*AI\-Enabled Program Management*
* Utilize AI\-powered program management tools to improve planning accuracy, timeline forecasting, and workload optimization.
* Apply predictive analytics to identify schedule slippage, resource constraints, and delivery risks early.
* Use AI to generate status reports, executive summaries, and dashboards with data backed insights.
* Leverage AI for scenario modeling (what\-if analysis) to support decision\-making on scope, timelines, and resources.
* Promote responsible and compliant use of AI in program workflows, ensuring transparency and data security.
* Partner with engineering, security, and PMO teams to continuously enhance AI adoption in program delivery processes.


*Technical Oversight*
* Provide program\-level oversight for infrastructure initiatives involving Zero Trust technologies, firewalls, Microsoft Azure, endpoint security, and telecom infrastructure.
* Lead enterprise initiatives such as cloud migrations, Zero Trust rollouts, device posture enforcement, secure access transformation, and telecom transformations.
* Oversee cloud and hybrid infrastructure initiatives with a security\-first mindset.
* Conduct risk assessments and ensure compliance with IT security and privacy policies.
* Ensure AI\-assisted tools and automation comply with enterprise governance standards.


*Stakeholder Management*
* Serve as the primary point of contact for internal stakeholders, vendors, and cross\-functional teams.
* Negotiate goals, priorities, and expectations across departments.
* Lead regular program updates using AI\-enhanced reporting to clearly communicate progress, risks, and deliverables. Program Governance, Process Optimization \& Automation
* Establish and manage program governance frameworks including RAID (Risks, Assumptions, Issues, Dependencies), change control, and financial tracking.
* Define and track program\-level KPIs, milestones, risks, dependencies, and success metrics to measure delivery health and business impact.
* Drive automation and documentation improvements using tools like JIRA and AIenabled workflows.
* Implement AI\-supported task tracking, backlog prioritization, and dependency management.
* Lead onboarding and transitions for new sites or systems with minimal disruption.
* Create and maintain SOPs, playbooks, and checklists for consistent execution.
* Continuously improve delivery efficiency through AI\-based insights and process optimization.


*Compliance \& Governance*
* Embed privacy, security, and compliance objectives into all program phases.
* Maintain accurate documentation for audits, disaster recovery, and business continuity.
* Ensure ethical and compliant use of AI technologies in project execution.


*Collaboration \& Communication*
* Lead cross\-functional collaboration across IT, Security, Compliance, Operations, and Business teams.
* Translate strategic objectives into actionable execution plans and deliverables across multiple projects.
* Communicate effectively with leadership, providing concise, outcome\-driven updates and decision support.
* Act as a change leader driving adoption of program governance and AI\-enabled delivery practices.
* Support global teams across regions, including the US and India, ensuring seamless coordination.


**Required Skills \& Experience**
* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in IT, Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.
* 8\+ years of experience in IT infrastructure project management, including 3\+ years in program management.
* Strong expertise in risk management, dependency tracking, and resource allocation.
* Solid understanding of AI\-assisted project management concepts (predictive planning, automation, analytics).
* Strong knowledge of ITIL 4 and PMP standards.
* Excellent communication, leadership, and stakeholder management skills.
* Proven experience leading cross\-functional teams in matrixed organizations.
* Hands\-on experience with cloud migrations and hybrid infrastructure environments.


**Preferred Skills**
* Experience with tools such as JIRA, Service Management platforms, JAMF, Zero Trust solutions, FortiGate, and Microsoft 365\.
* Exposure to AI\-enabled PM tools (e.g., Jira AI, Copilot, Smartsheet AI, Monday AI, Power BI with predictive analytics).
* Knowledge of hybrid and remote infrastructure support models.
* Ability to manage multiple complex projects simultaneously in a fast\-paced environment.
* Certifications: ITIL 4, PMP, Scrum Master (AI or Agile certifications are a plus).

3aeb7253.title: ai solutions architect
3aeb7253.description:
**Company Description** 
 Bizz designs and builds AI\-enabled custom software solutions across web, mobile, backend, and data platforms. The company focuses on scalable product engineering, cloud, quality assurance, and enterprise\-grade implementations for a wide range of clients. Founded in 2022, Bizz helps organizations assess, modernize, and expand existing systems to meet evolving business needs. The team emphasizes practical, phased delivery approaches aligned with client goals, timelines, and technical constraints. Bizz offers opportunities to work on modern technologies and complex, real\-world transformation initiatives.
   

**Role Description** 
 The AI Solutions Architect is a full\-time, on\-site role based in Ahmedabad. This role is responsible for designing end\-to\-end AI\-driven solutions, including system architecture, integration patterns, and data flows that meet client business and technical requirements. Day\-to\-day work includes collaborating with stakeholders to understand needs, creating architectural blueprints, guiding software development teams, and ensuring solution scalability, security, and performance. The AI Solutions Architect conducts technical assessments of existing systems, recommends modernization strategies, and defines implementation roadmaps. The role also involves supporting pre\-sales and consulting activities, reviewing code and designs, and mentoring engineers on best practices in AI, cloud, and enterprise architecture.
   

**Qualifications**
* Strong Solution Architecture and Integration skills, with experience designing distributed, cloud\-based, and AI\-enabled systems.
* Consulting and Business Process skills to translate complex requirements into practical technical solutions and implementation plans.
* Hands\-on Software Development experience in modern languages and frameworks, with the ability to guide engineering teams.
* Proficiency in AI/ML concepts, data engineering, and model deployment (e.g., REST APIs, microservices, MLOps) is highly beneficial.
* Experience with major cloud platforms (such as AWS, Azure, or GCP) and related services for scalable and secure architectures.
* Strong communication and documentation skills, including ability to present architectural decisions to technical and non\-technical audiences.
* Bachelor’s degree or higher in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* Background in enterprise solution design, performance optimization, and security best practices is an advantage.

78c2ce35.title: Presales - Cybersecurity
78c2ce35.description:
**Key Responsibilities**
 Create detailed proposals, RFP/RFI responses, and presentations for cybersecurity solutions (SOC, SIEM, EDR, IAM, cloud security, risk \& compliance).
   

  

 Customize proposals for different geographies and industries.
   

  

 Collaborate with sales teams to understand client requirements and pain points.
   

  

 Ensure proposals meet regional compliance standards (DPDP Act, GDPR, ISO 27001, KSA regulations).
   

  

 Maintain a repository of proposal templates, case studies, and technical collateral.
   

  

 Research cybersecurity trends, competitor offerings, and compliance requirements globally.
   

  

 Work closely with technical teams, product managers, and legal for accurate solution details.
   

  

**Requirements**
****Required Skills \& Qualifications****
**4–8 years in pre\-sales \& proposal writing in IT/cybersecurity domain.**
**Familiarity with cybersecurity solutions (SOC, SIEM, EDR, IAM, cloud security, risk \& compliance).**
**Understanding of DPDP Act, GDPR, ISO 27001, and KSA data laws.**
**Strong Written And Verbal Communication Skills.**
**Proficiency in MS Office, proposal automation tools \& GeM platform.**
**Benefits**
**Good to have:** 
 Experience creating proposals for cybersecurity\-focused sectors such as BFSI (Banking \& Financial Services), Telecom, Government, Critical Infrastructure, and Global Enterprises.

53a0358b.title: Solutions Engineer
53a0358b.description:
**Introduction**
 At IBM Global Sales, we bring together innovation, collaboration, and expertise to help clients solve their most complex business challenges. Working across industries and geographies, you’ll partner with colleagues, clients, and partners to co\-create solutions that drive digital transformation and lasting impact.Success in Global Sales is built on curiosity, empathy, and collaboration. You’ll connect technical understanding with strong people skills, building trusted relationships and shaping solutions that improve business and society. With world\-class onboarding, continuous learning, and a supportive culture, IBM offers the tools and opportunities to grow your career. Join us and be part of a global team that’s passionate about driving innovation and making a difference.
   

  

**Your Role And Responsibilities**
* Technical Acumen:: Develop a strong technical understanding of the Confluent technologies and use this effectively to discover new customer use cases and build compelling solutions
* Technical Discovery and POC/Pilot Solutions: Gather customer requirements, identify use cases, and facilitate the development of Proof of Concept (POC)/Pilot solutions. Partner with Confluent stakeholders to aid customers in overcoming technical challenges during initial blueprinting and use case deployment.
* Value Selling: Clear articulation of Confluent’s technical and product positioning to a wide variety of business and technical stakeholders, and for forging strong relationships with them throughout the sales cycle and beyond.
* Prospect Demos and Evangelization: Collaborate with Confluent's Account Executives (AEs) and Sales Development Representatives (SDRs) to bring our offerings to new prospects. Craft and deliver tailored demos that go beyond the standard, showcasing the unique value proposition Confluent has to offer.
* Customer Engagement: Offer technical expertise in driving customer consumption through monthly customer health reports, Quarterly Business Reviews, and Quarterly Technical Reviews.
* Knowledge Sharing, Workshops, and Training: Support cross\-functional teams, including Field Marketing, Partner Solutions by conducting training sessions and workshops/webinars for customers, partners, prospects, and internal teams to educate them on Confluent's platform/cloud, features, and best practices.
* RFP/Vendor risk assessment Support: Contribute to vendor risk assessments to ensure a comprehensive understanding of potential risks and opportunities associated with proposed solutions. Assist in answering Requests for Proposals (RFPs) and Requests for Quotations (RFQs).
* Technical Artifact Creation and Maintenance: Architect, build, and maintain reusable artifacts, including tools, prototypes, demos, workshops, and architecture blueprints.
* Global Presence through Rotational Coverage: Efficiently cover diverse time zones with rotational cycles: 8 AM \- 5 PM for APAC, 2 PM \- 11 PM for EMEA, and 6 PM \- 3 AM for the Americas. This approach ensures optimal availability across the globe, emphasizing our commitment to exceptional service and customer satisfaction


**Required Technical And Professional Expertise**
 Technical degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or equivalent.
   

  

* Experience in Solutions Engineering, Presales or any technical selling roles with software Development, Data Engineering background
* Knowledge about building solutions with Apache Kafka Knowledge about distributed systems, infrastructure software like databases, message queues, Kubernetes, serverless, API gateways, cloud networking constructs, and/or Big Data products
* Understanding of systems operations concepts (disk, network, operating systems, etc.).
* Knowledge of working with Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS), Platform as a Service (PaaS), and/or Software as a Service (SaaS)
* Development language agnostic, good to have experience with Java, Python, SQL
* Working knowledge of software development tools and methodologies.
* Experience with configuration management, infrastructure automation, and CI/CD tooling(e.g., Terraform, Ansible) is a plus.
* Exceptional presentation and communications capabilities.
* High level of comfort communicating effectively across internal and external organizations


**Preferred Technical And Professional Experience**
 Knowledge about building ETL applications.
   

  

* Knowledge about building and operating large\-scale massively parallel systems.
* Development or operations experience in a cloud\-based environment.
* Experience with DevOps culture and Agile software development.
* AWS Solutions Architect Associate or equivalent in other cloud providers, Confluent Certifications.
* Prior customer\-facing roles

f9c0580c.title: Cloud ERP - Finance Solution Advisor Specialist
f9c0580c.description:
**We help the world run better**
 At SAP, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. We're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. The work is challenging – but it matters. You'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. What's in it for you? Constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
 A Digital Solution Advisor is a customer\-facing role mapping product capabilities to requirements of prospects to support the selling of solutions and services. Specializing in SAP’s Cloud ERP – Finance portfolio (e.g., SAP S/4HANA Cloud Finance, SAP Public Cloud ERP, Group Reporting, Central Finance), this role serves as domain expert and spokesperson for designated Finance solutions or product segments. They are primarily responsible for pipeline growth, deal support, market development, development of content for solution\-based training as well as references for additional market penetration.
   

  

**Deal Support**
 The Digital Solution Advisor Specialist is instrumental in elevating SAP's presence and impact in potential customer engagements. Their primary responsibility lies in not only executing presales presentations but also crafting them, ensuring they communicate the distinct advantages of SAP solutions, especially to high\-level executives. By seamlessly collaborating with VAT teams, they will be fundamental in weaving customer pain points into innovative narratives, highlighting SAP's Cloud ERP – Finance solutions. They will maintain and curate an asset library for efficient, low\-touch transaction processes. Beyond the initial presentations, they will be leading discovery sessions with potential clients, ensuring that SAP's offerings align with their unique requirements. Their intermediate knowledge of SAP Cloud ERP – Finance solutions, backed by relevant customer success stories, will cement your credibility in the field. With expertise in virtual tools like the SAP Virtual Studio and OBS technology, they will ensure impactful remote presentations. As a specialist, they will have a hand in shaping customer roadmaps for their transition to Cloud environments and provide vital support in RFx completion. Their involvement will persist post\-sale, ensuring clients transition smoothly, and they will take charge in crafting holistic narratives for pivotal events and key presentations
   

  

**Demand Generation**
 A Digital Solution Advisor Specialist will play a role in our demand generation efforts. With an intermediate grasp of solution knowledge, they are trusted to enhance and refine content that speaks directly to our prospective clients. Collaborating closely with our DG \& marketing teams, their insights will help craft targeted content on SAP's Cloud ERP – Finance capabilities that resonates with the needs and aspirations of our audience. Their proficiency ensures that our outreach is both relevant and compelling.
   

  

**Digital Content for customer facing Situations**
 They will actively contribute to the development and refinement of digital content tailored for customer\-facing scenarios. By incorporating intermediate\-level insights and Cloud ERP – Finance product nuances, they will enhance the depth and relevance of the content for our audience.
   

  

**Sales Enablement**
 A Digital Solution Advisor Specialist delves deeper into sales enablement, actively participating in the creation and refinement of training materials. Their understanding of SAP Cloud ERP – Finance products allows them to help sales teams navigate through complex features, ensuring they're well\-prepared to address customer inquiries.
   

  

**What You Bring**
* Bachelor's degree (or equivalent) in computer science, finance, accounting, or a related field is required.
* Prior experience and professional expertise in SAP Cloud ERP – Finance solutions (e.g., SAP S/4HANA Cloud Finance, Central Finance, Group Reporting) and/or core financial and accounting business processes.
* Minimum 2 years of experience in consulting and/or presales with SAP Cloud ERP – Finance solutions (e.g., S/4HANA Cloud Finance) OR minimum of 4 years professional experience in similar finance/ERP technology stacks.
* Deeper knowledge of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Finance modules (e.g., Financial Accounting, Controlling, Treasury, Group Reporting) and their integration with SAP Business Technology Platform is a PLUS.
* Confident with Cloud ERP topics such as SaaS Finance deployments, cloud\-based accounting and business networks, and finance process automation in a B2B environment
* Conversational fluency in English and Arabic. French is a plus.


**Meet you team**
 SAP Digital is one of the leading and most innovative teams in the company, aimed at delivering exceptional customer experiences in a scalable, speedy, and personalized fashion. The purpose of the organization is to support the Customer Success board area with a broad range of services and methodologies across the customer journey to guarantee the acquisition of net\-new customers and the successful adoption and expansion of our products. Most importantly, helping more customers run better ultimately translates into a safer, cleaner, more connected, better enabled, and more equal world.
   

  

 SAP Digital team prides itself not only on the outcomes, but on exemplifying our company values: Build bridges not silos, embrace differences, keep the promise, stay curious, tell it like it is, and live the leadership credo.
   

  

**Bring out your best**
 SAP innovations help more than four hundred thousand customers worldwide work together more efficiently and use business insight more effectively. Originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, SAP has evolved to become a market leader in end\-to\-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose\-driven and future\-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. Whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. At SAP, you can bring out your best.
   

  

**We win with inclusion**
 SAP’s culture of inclusion, focus on health and well\-being, and flexible working models help ensure that everyone – regardless of background – feels included and can run at their best. At SAP, we believe we are made stronger by the unique capabilities and qualities that each person brings to our company, and we invest in our employees to inspire confidence and help everyone realize their full potential. We ultimately believe in unleashing all talent and creating a better world.
   

  

 SAP is committed to the values of Equal Employment Opportunity and provides accessibility accommodations to applicants with physical and/or mental disabilities. If you are interested in applying for employment with SAP and are in need of accommodation or special assistance to navigate our website or to complete your application, please send an e\-mail with your request to Recruiting Operations Team: Careers@sap.com.
   

  

 For SAP employees: Only permanent roles are eligible for the SAP Employee Referral Program, according to the eligibility rules set in the SAP Referral Policy. Specific conditions may apply for roles in Vocational Training.
   

  

 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to their age, race, religion, national origin, ethnicity, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, et al), sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, protected veteran status, or disability, in compliance with applicable federal, state, and local legal requirements.
   

  

 Successful candidates might be required to undergo a background verification with an external vendor.
   

  

**AI Usage in the Recruitment Process**
 For information on the responsible use of AI in our recruitment process, please refer to our Guidelines for Ethical Usage of AI in the Recruiting Process.
   

  

 Please note that any violation of these guidelines may result in disqualification from the hiring process.

265b6e0b.title: Tech Lead – Automation Solutions (Power Platform, K2) - Husky (Guindy, Chennai)
265b6e0b.description:
At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.



Husky TechnologiesTM has a strong foundation built on innovation, close customer relationships and a unique culture and values. We are dedicated to offering our customers the highest quality products and services and are looking for people with the inspiration and talent to develop with us as we pursue our ambitious growth strategy. We are a leader in developing state\-of\-the\-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.



Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.



Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!

  


**Job Description**



Are you ready to shape the next generation of enterprise automation while keeping mission\-critical workflows running smoothly?



As Tech Lead for the Automation Team, you will play a pivotal role in Husky’s transition from legacy workflow platforms to a modern, scalable automation landscape centered on the Microsoft Power Platform. You’ll lead by example—guiding your team in designing, governing, and delivering Power Apps and Power Automate solutions—while also ensuring the reliability, continuity, and evolution of existing automation solutions such as K2\.



This role sits at the intersection of innovation and responsibility: driving modernization, setting technical standards, and mentoring engineers, while safeguarding the automation backbone that supports our global business operations.



If you enjoy combining hands\-on technical leadership, platform thinking, and pragmatic enterprise automation, this is your opportunity to make a lasting impact.


**Responsibilities**


**Technical Leadership**


* Understand the E2E high level architecture (big picture)
* Translate the HLD (high level design) into the LLD (low level design) in collaboration with architects and own the LLD
* Technical direction for the product area
* Contribute to coordinating cross\-team dependencies and integration points


**Delivery \& Execution Excellence**


* Contribute to the feature definition and review
* Generate concepts and facilitate the concept selection
* Breaking down complex features into actionable tasks
* Helping with estimation and sprint planning
* Addressing technical impediments
* Own production readiness (incl. non\-functional requirements)


**Quality, Governance \& Security**


* Ensuring quality
* Conducting meaningful reviews and ensuring adherence to DoR (Definition of Ready) / DoD (Definition of Done) criteria
* Ensure adherence to applicable standards, policies, and practices (e.g. DevSecOps)


**Incident Response**


* Leading incident response, root cause analysis (RCA), and post\-mortems


**Mentorship \& Team Growth**


* Mentoring team members
* Documenting key design decisions
* Participate in interviews and hiring decisions
* Promoting engineering best practices and driving continuous improvement


**Collaboration \& Communication**


* Act as the primary technical point of contact across Product, Architecture, and Platform teams
* Clearly communicate technical decisions and trade\-offs to non\-technical stakeholders


**Qualifications**


* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT, or related field.
* 10\+ years professional experience in software development, 5\+ years’ experience with Power Platform
* **Power Platform Expertise**
* Deep, hands\-on experience with Microsoft Power Platform, including: Power Apps (Canvas \& Model Driven)
* Power Automate (cloud flows, approvals, error handling)
* Dataverse (data modeling, security, performance)
* Proven ability to design enterprise\-scale Power Platform solutions
* Strong understanding of solution layering, Application Lifecycle Management, and environment strategies
* **Power Platform Governance**
* Hands\-on experience implementing Power Platform governance, including DLP policies, environment strategies, Center of Excellence (CoE) Starter Kit
* Strong understanding of: Role\-based security in Dataverse
* Tenant\-level Power Platform administration
* Experience working in regulated or enterprise environments (e.g., GDPR, ISO, SOC)

**Why Husky?**

**Visible Impact:** Experience the satisfaction of seeing the direct outcomes of your work, as you contribute to projects that visibly enhance our company's technological capabilities and efficiency.

**Empowered Involvement:** Take an active role in decision\-making processes and architectural reviews, where your expertise helps shape the future of our cloud solutions and overall business strategy.


**Valued Contributions:** Be more than just a number in a large organization; at our company, every individual's input is valued and can lead to significant, tangible improvements in our operations and services.


**Impactful Role:** Play a crucial part in both developing new applications and maintaining existing systems, ensuring their optimal performance and reliability.


**Cutting\-Edge Projects:** Work on innovative cloud solutions that are transforming our and our customer’s business, giving you the opportunity to be at the forefront of technological advancements.


**Supportive Community:** Work in an environment that recognizes and celebrates individual achievements, fostering a sense of community and mutual respect among team members.


**Collaborative Environment:** Join a global team of skilled professionals around the globe where your ideas are valued, and collaboration is encouraged to solve complex challenges and drive success.

ee11eddd.title: Senior Solutions Architect, Automotive & Manufacturing
ee11eddd.description:
**Description**
 Amazon Web Services (AWS) Automotive and Manufacturing team is looking for an experienced and motivated technologist who possesses a unique balance of technical depth and strong interpersonal skills. As a Senior Solutions Architect, you will partner with some of the world's largest automotive and manufacturing firms, AWS Sales and other AWS teams to craft highly scalable, flexible and resilient cloud architectures that address customer business problems and accelerate the adoption of AWS services.
   

  

 This role will drive AWS technology adoption and revenue growth across assigned automotive and manufacturing customers. As a trusted customer advocate, the Senior Solutions Architect will work directly with leading industrial manufacturers as they reimagine how things are designed, built, and operated. You will serve as a trusted technical advisor, helping customers navigate architectural decisions across connected vehicle platforms, digital twins, smart factory/Industry 4\.0 initiatives, supply chain optimization, and software\-defined vehicle (SDV) strategies.
   

  

 As a key member of the Account Team, you will guide customers' architectural choices across use cases involving IoT, edge computing, high\-performance computing (HPC), security, data lakes and analytics, AI/ML, simulation, and robotics — as well as foundational services spanning compute, storage, and networking. You will provide technical design guidance and thought leadership, contribute to best\-practice knowledge sharing within the broader AWS Solutions Architecture community, and help develop reusable industry reference architectures.
   

  

 The ideal candidate must be self\-motivated with a proven track record in software/technology architecture or consulting. The ability to connect technology with measurable business value is critical to a solutions architect. You should also have a demonstrated ability to think strategically about business, products, and technical challenges.
   

  

 What We Are Looking For
   

  

* Enjoy working with large, global customers. You will have a passion for connecting with, educating, training, designing, and building cloud solutions for automotive and manufacturing customers.
* Have a strong understanding of large\-scale, mission\-critical solutions in the automotive and manufacturing industry. The ideal candidate will have past experience working as a systems engineer/architect in the automotive or manufacturing sector. You will enjoy keeping your existing technical skills honed and developing new ones, so you can make strong contributions to deep architecture discussions. You will regularly take part in deep\-dive education and design exercises to create solutions built on AWS.


 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Serve as the primary technical point of contact and trusted advisor for assigned Automotive and Manufacturing accounts, engaging Director\-level engineering leaders and senior technical stakeholders.
* Architect and design scalable, secure, and cost\-effective cloud solutions for industry\-specific workloads including connected vehicle data platforms, digital twin environments, MES/SCADA cloud integration, and smart factory deployments.
* Bridge IT and OT — connect traditional enterprise IT architectures with operational technology (OT) environments on the shop floor and at the edge, leveraging AWS IoT, edge, and hybrid services.
* Develop and execute technical account plans aligned with customers' business objectives and digital transformation roadmaps.
* Lead proof\-of\-concept engagements and architectural reviews to accelerate customer adoption and de\-risk production deployments.
* Provide customer feedback to AWS service teams and advocate for industry\-relevant feature development.
* Contribute to industry thought leadership — create reference architectures, blog posts, and reusable technical assets for the vertical.
* Present at AWS events (re:Invent, Summits, industry conferences) and participate in customer technical workshops.
* Share knowledge and best practices with peers in the Solutions Architecture community, contributing to technical community development.
* Stay current with industry megatrends (electrification, SDV, Industry 4\.0, sustainability) and connect them with AWS capabilities to drive customer outcomes.


**About The Team**
 The Automotive and Manufacturing Solutions Architecture team is a specialized group of technologists passionate about helping the world's leading vehicle manufacturers, industrial companies, and mobility innovators transform through cloud. We work at the intersection of current technology and physical\-world engineering — from the factory floor to the connected car to the autonomous future. Our team values deep industry expertise, intellectual curiosity, and a builder mentality.
   

  

 Our team is dedicated to supporting new members. We have a broad mix of experience levels and tenures, and we're building an environment that celebrates knowledge sharing and mentorship.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 8\+ years of specific technology domain areas (e.g. software development, cloud computing, systems engineering, infrastructure, security, networking, data \& analytics) experience
* 3\+ years of design, implementation, or consulting in applications and infrastructures experience
* Experience communicating across technical and non\-technical audiences, including executive level stakeholders or clients
* Bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, mathematics or equivalent, or experience architecting or deploying Cloud/Virtualization solutions in enterprise customers
* Experience within specific technology domain areas (e.g. software development, cloud computing, systems engineering, infrastructure, security, networking, data \& analytics).
* Working knowledge of at least two of the following domains: IoT/edge computing, data analytics/data lakes, AI/ML, HPC, DevOps/CI\-CD, or application modernization.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with automation and any version control tools, or experience with web\-based applications and HTTP and experience in any Bigdata architecture
* Familiarity with Industry 4\.0 concepts: digital twins, predictive maintenance, computer vision for quality inspection, and manufacturing execution systems.


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
