c951cdff.title: Solutions Engineer - North India
c951cdff.description:
Come join the organization that is redefining security for the AI era. As one of the fastest\-growing startups ever, we enable teams to secure cloud and AI applications by connecting code, cloud, and runtime into a single shared context. Trusted by security teams all over the world, we have a proven track record of success and a culture that values world\-class talent. Not to mention, we're now powered by Google, meaning we offer our customers an AI\-powered platform that harnesses Google’s Threat Intelligence and Security Operations to better detect, prevent, and respond to threats across all environments, allowing for further innovation.
 


  


 Our Wizards from all over the globe work together to protect the infrastructure of our customers, including over 50% of the Fortune 100, who trust us to scan and secure over 230 billion files daily. We’re honored to be a leading player in a massive and growing market, and we continue to look for exceptional Wizards who are eager to make a significant impact on our team. At Wiz, you’ll have the freedom to think creatively, dream big, and use your full range of skills to contribute to our momentous growth. Come join our team and help us create secure cloud environments that allow even the best companies to move faster, all while having some fun!
 



**SUMMARY** 



  


 As a 
 **Solutions Engineer** 
 , you will be responsible for supporting our enterprise customers, reporting to the regional
 **Manager,** 
**Solutions Engineering** 
 . You will partner directly with regional account executives to help change our customers view and how they approach cloud security. You will be their trusted advisor for all matters related to cloud security across AWS, Azure, and GCP. We are passionate about technical sales and helping our customers achieve the maximum value from our solution. 
 


  


**WHAT YOU’LL DO** 



  

  
* Partner with the sales team to provide technical leadership to our customers and prospective customers in conjunction with helping our team meet their quarterly sales targets.
  
* Provide presentations to our customers and prospective customers such as whiteboards,  product demonstrations, slides, and proof of value outcomes.
  
* Help our customers and prospective customers plan in\-depth test plans for showing the value of the Wiz platform in their environment (proof of value).
  
* Invest time in learning new product features, industry related developments, and broadening your overall technical skillset.
  
* Represent Wiz in technical forums such as trade shows, technical meet\-ups, and industry events.
  


  


**WHAT YOU’LL BRING** 



  

  
* Ability to deliver world class demonstrations and training experience to our channel customers
  
* Mastered the technical sales process
  
* Thrive in a creative technical role assisting partners to build a technical business delivery model
  
* Experience in a sales engineering role delivering solutions to C\-level executives at enterprise customers
  
* Ability to travel
  
* Cloud security experience
  
* AWS/Azure/GCP hands on experience
  
* Network engineering experience
  
* Strong operating system, virtual machine, and container knowledge
  
* Knowledge of risk\-based security assessments and frameworks
  
* Understanding of cloud identity, access, certificates, and keys
  


  


**BONUS POINTS:** 



  

  
* Experience with traditional CSPM tools
  
* SaaS experience
  
* Awareness of the CI/CD process
  
* Familiarity with Infrastructure as Code
  



*Applicants must have the legal right to work in the country where the position is based, 
 

 without the need for
 

 visa
 

 sponsorship.
 

 This
 

 role does not offer
 

 visa
 



 sponsorship
 

 .*



  


 Wiz is an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, reproductive health decisions, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, genetic information, political views or activity, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. 
 


  


 By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Wiz will process your personal data in accordance with Wiz's Privacy Policy.

 Excellent customer\-facing skills with experience presenting to and achieving consensus from senior

* Architect suppression logic, frequency caps, and contact policies.


**About Adobe**
 Adobe empowers everyone to create through innovative platforms and tools that unleash creativity, productivity and personalized customer experiences. Adobe’s industry\-leading offerings including Adobe Acrobat Studio, Adobe Express, Adobe Firefly, Creative Cloud, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Manager, and GenStudio enable people and businesses to turn ideas into impact, powered by AI and driven by human ingenuity.
   

  

 Our 30,000\+ employees worldwide are creating the future and raising the bar as we drive the next decade of growth. We’re on a mission to hire the very best and believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. At Adobe, we believe that great ideas can come from anywhere in the organization. The next big idea could be yours.
   

  

**Let’s Adobe together**
 At Adobe, we believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. Learn more about Adobe life, including our values and culture, focus on people, purpose and community, Adobe for All, comprehensive benefits programs, the stories we tell, the customers we serve, and how you can help us advance our mission of empowering everyone to create.
   

  

 Adobe is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on gender, race or color, ethnicity or national origin, age, disability, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic. Learn more.
   

  

 Adobe aims to make our Careers website and recruiting process accessible to any and all users. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation to navigate our website or complete the application process, email accommodations@adobe.com or call \+1 408\-536\-3015\.
   

  

**AI Use Guidelines for Interviews:**
 Our interviews are designed to reflect your own skills and thinking. The use of AI or recording tools during live interviews is not permitted unless explicitly invited by the interviewer or approved in advance as part of a reasonable accommodation. If these tools are used inappropriately or in a way that misrepresents your work, your application may not move forward in the process.
   

  

 At Adobe, we empower employees to innovate with AI — and we look for candidates eager to do the same. As part of the hiring experience, we provide clear guidance on where AI is encouraged during the process and where it’s restricted during live interviews. See how we think about AI in the hiring experience.

9de1967b.title: Manager - HCM Solutions | Functional Pre-sales
9de1967b.description:
**About Darwinbox**
 Darwinbox is Asia's fastest\-growing HR technology platform, designing the future of work by building the world's best HR tech, driven by a fierce focus on employee experience and customer success, and continuous, iterative innovation. We are the preferred choice of 1000\+ global enterprises to manage their 4 million\+ employees across 130\+ countries.
   

  

 Darwinbox's new\-age HCM suite competes with local as well as global players in the enterprise technology space (such as SAP, Oracle, and Workday). The firm has acquired notable customers ranging from large conglomerates to unicorn start\-ups: Nivea, Starbucks, DLF, JSW, Adani Group, Crisil, CRED, Vedanta, Mahindra, Glenmark, Gokongwei Group, Mitra Adiperkasa, EFS Facilities Management, VNG Corporation, and many more.
   

  

 Our vision of building a world\-class product company from Asia is backed by marquee global investors like Microsoft, Salesforce, Sequoia Capital, TCV, KKR, and Partners Group.
   

  

**Why Join Us?**
 The rate at which our product and market presence are growing is unprecedented. We’re a Rocketship. We’re not planning on slowing down anytime soon. And, that’s why we need you! You’ll experience a culture of:
   

  

* Disproportionate Rewards for top performance
* Accelerated Growth in a hyper\-growth environment
* Continuous Learning and Professional Development
* Meaningful Relationships and a Collaborative Environment


**Location**
 Bangalore or Mumbai, India (Field / Hybrid)
   

  

**Experience**
 6 – 12 years
   

  

**Skills**
* HCM (Human Capital Management) solution consulting
* Functional pre\-sales / solution consulting
* Discovery workshops and business requirements documentation
* Process mapping and process flow design
* RFP (Request for Proposal) response development
* Product demonstrations to enterprise prospects
* Value\-based selling
* Solution design artefacts — context diagrams, functional/technical descriptions
* HR business processes and workforce management domain knowledge
* C\-level stakeholder engagement
* Cross\-industry enterprise solutioning


**Good to Have**
* Working knowledge of legacy ERP HR modules and competing SaaS HCM platforms (e.g., SAP SuccessFactors, Oracle HCM, Workday) for competitive positioning
* HRBP (HR Business Partner) experience


**Responsibilities**
* Conduct discovery workshops with enterprise prospects to formulate and document business requirements, HR processes, procedures, and work practices.
* Design value\-based HCM solutions to client problems and communicate them to customers, implementation partners, and internal stakeholders through process flows, context diagrams, and functional/technical descriptions.
* Lead RFP (Request for Proposal) responses and produce solution overviews that map customer business initiatives to the HCM solution.
* Prepare and deliver functional product demonstrations of the HCM solution tailored to customer evaluation criteria.
* Develop solution expertise across multiple industries and present the HCM value proposition to enterprise customers in each vertical.
* Build trusted\-advisor relationships with key customer stakeholders, influencers, and decision\-makers across the evaluation cycle.
* Produce competitive positioning content comparing the HCM platform against legacy ERP and competing SaaS HCM systems.
* Collaborate with the sales team to develop differentiated value propositions, themes, and customer messaging.


**Qualifications**
* Minimum: MBA / PGDM in Human Resources, or equivalent relevant work experience in HCM consulting.
* 6–12 years of experience in HCM consulting or HRBP roles.
* Demonstrated experience in value\-based selling within an HCM consulting environment.
* No HCM/HR certification required.


**What We Offer:**
* A dynamic and collaborative work environment that fosters innovation.
* Opportunities for professional growth and career advancement.
* Competitive compensation and benefits package.
* The chance to work on products that make a meaningful impact on businesses and their employees.

5dfd4559.title: Solution Architect - Networking and IT Security
5dfd4559.description:
We are scaling our Solution Architecture practice to support growing demand across South and West India. As a Solution Architect specialising in Networking and IT Security, you will own the technical solution lifecycle end\-to\-end from qualifying customer opportunities, through designing scalable network and security architectures, to defending your solutions in negotiations. You will be a customer\-facing trusted advisor, working closely with our sales and business teams to convert opportunities into wins.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Engage directly with customers to understand business objectives, assess existing network and security postures, and gather detailed technical requirements.
* Design robust, scalable, and right\-sized network architectures aligned with customer needs, budget realities, and industry best practices.
* Architect end\-to\-end security frameworks covering firewalls, VPNs, intrusion detection/prevention, identity, and zero\-trust principles.
* Create accurate Bills of Material (BoM) using OEM\-specific models (Cisco, Fortinet, Palo Alto, HP, etc. ), including licensing, accessories, transceivers, and regional components.
* Author solution documents, presentations, and proposals; defend technical positioning during customer evaluation and negotiation.
* Optimise solutions during the proposal phase, articulate must\-have vs good\-to\-have trade\-offs to customers transparently.
* Coordinate with implementation teams to ensure deployed solutions match architectural intent and SLAs.
* Stay current with emerging networking and security technologies and bring them into customer conversations proactively.
* Mentor junior engineers and share knowledge across the practice.


**Requirements**
* 8\+ years of total experience in networking and IT security, with at least 3\-4 years in a Solution Architect role at a System Integrator.
* Demonstrated track record of designing complex network and security solutions, end\-to\-end qualification through deployment.
* Hands\-on background in implementation (40% of career) followed by progression into solutioning (60%), strong fundamentals from real deployments.
* Deep working knowledge of routing, switching, firewalls, VPN, IDS/IPS, NAC, and network monitoring tools.
* Expertise across multiple OEM ecosystems, Cisco, Fortinet, Palo Alto, HP/Aruba, or equivalent.
* Accurate BoM construction skills, right\-sizing without over\-engineering or missing critical components.
* Excellent customer\-facing communication, whiteboarding ability, and consultative listening skills.
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, IT, Network Engineering, Cybersecurity, or related field.


**Good\-to\-Have**
* Industry certifications: CCNA, CCNP, CCIE, CISSP, Fortinet NSE, or Palo Alto PCNSE.
* Experience working at a mid\-to\-large System Integrator with multi\-vendor exposure.
* Exposure to NAC, SD\-WAN, SASE, or cloud networking (AWS/Azure).
* Experience presenting to CXO\-level customer stakeholders.
* Track record of growing into a leadership or regional architect role.


 This job was posted by Garima Walia from Intellicar.

2f5fd5a7.title: Solution Architect : VMware to Nutanix NC2 Migration (10+Years)
2f5fd5a7.description:
**Job ID: INFIT001**  

  

**Solution Architect : VMware to Nutanix NC2 Migration**  

Experience: 10\+ years (Minimum)
  

Work Timings: 1:30 pm to 10:30 pm IST
  

Duration: Long Term
  

Work Model: Remote (Contractual)
  

Expected Joining: Immediate
  

If you're interested, kindly share your profile with **recruiter@inforizonhr.com**


Job Description – Senior Data Engineer / Data Platform Consultant (AWS, SageMaker Unified Studio \& Life Sciences)
  

Position Overview


We are seeking a seasoned Solution Architect / Technical Program Lead to drive large\-scale VMware migration initiatives to Nutanix NC2 on AWS environments. This role will act as the primary technical lead throughout the engagement lifecycle, collaborating closely with customer stakeholders, architects, and delivery teams from initial assessment and solution design through implementation, transition, and post\-migration stabilization.


Key Requirements
  

Essential Skills \& Experience
  

Extensive hands\-on expertise with VMware technologies and Nutanix NC2 platforms.
  

Demonstrated success in managing enterprise migration programs, covering assessment, planning, execution, cutover, and stabilization phases.
  

Strong knowledge of migration methodologies, including application dependency mapping, wave planning, transition strategies, cutover management, and risk mitigation.
  

Experience architecting and deploying Nutanix NC2 solutions within AWS environments.
  

Solid understanding of virtualization technologies, networking concepts, storage architecture, security frameworks, disaster recovery strategies, and hybrid cloud ecosystems.
  

Ability to communicate effectively with customer architects, senior technical leaders, and executive stakeholders.
  

Excellent leadership, stakeholder engagement, and communication capabilities.
  

Proven track record of delivering comparable migration projects for large\-scale enterprise organizations, ideally within globally recognized companies.


  
**Benefits**
============


**Here are some of the perks of being a part of Inforizon**
-----------------------------------------------------------


### **Better Salary**

W offer competitive salaries to keep our employees motivated and keep a sense of unity within our company.


### **Flexibility**

Inforizon offer flexible work hours or remote work options, allowing employees to achieve a better work\-life balance.


### **Career Growth**

Inforizon invest in our employees' professional growth by providing training, education, and career opportunities.


### **Recognition**

We offer Performance bonuses and extra financial rewards based on individual and teams achievements.


### **Technology**

We help up\-to\-date tools and technology needed for the job. Equipment and software to facilitate remote work.

e7d48eb1.title: AI Solution Engineer
e7d48eb1.description:
At Cimba.ai, we're looking for an AI Solution Engineer to bridge the gap between business problems and AI\-powered solutions. If you enjoy working at the intersection of business, data, and AI, this role is for you.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Understand customer workflows and identify AI\-driven opportunities.
* Translate business needs into clear problem statements and success metrics.
* Collaborate with AI/engineering teams to design feasible solutions.
* Analyse data, validate hypotheses, and measure solution impact.
* Support pilots, POCs, and production deployments.
* Create solution docs, briefs, and stakeholder presentations.
* Act as the link between business teams and technical teams.


**Experience**
 The core requirements for the job include the following:
   

  

* Exposure to real\-world analytics/AI/data projects.
* Experience in B2B or client\-facing environments.


**Skills**
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving ability.
* Comfortable with SQL / Excel / Python (preferred).
* Basic understanding of AI/ML workflows.
* Ability to interpret model outputs into business insights.


**Foundations**
* Understanding of AI/ML lifecycle (build, deploy, evaluate).
* Familiarity with APIs, data pipelines, or integrations (plus).


**Mindset**
* Ownership\-driven and detail\-oriented.
* Ability to break down ambiguous problems.
* Strong communication and stakeholder management.


 This job was posted by Bhavani Shankar from Cimba.ai.

1a34a441.title: Solution Architect
1a34a441.description:
**Job Title:** Solution Architect (4–8\+ Years Experience)

**Company:** Airexon Global Technologies Private Limited

**Location:** Hyderabad, India (On\-site/Hybrid)

About the Role

Airexon Global Technologies Private Limited is seeking an experienced and client\-focused **Solution Architect** to design scalable technology solutions, engage with enterprise clients, and bridge business requirements with technical implementation. The ideal candidate should have strong technical expertise, excellent communication skills, and the ability to lead technical discussions with clients while collaborating closely with development teams.

Key Responsibilities

* Meet with clients to understand business objectives, challenges, and technical requirements.
* Design end\-to\-end software solution architectures for web, mobile, cloud, and enterprise applications.
* Conduct requirement discovery sessions, solution presentations, and technical workshops.
* Prepare solution proposals, architecture diagrams, Statements of Work (SOWs), and technical documentation.
* Collaborate with Business Development, Project Managers, UI/UX designers, and engineering teams.
* Recommend the most suitable technologies, frameworks, APIs, cloud services, and integration strategies.
* Ensure solutions are scalable, secure, cost\-effective, and aligned with industry best practices.
* Support pre\-sales activities, technical demonstrations, and client meetings.
* Provide technical guidance throughout the project lifecycle.
* Stay updated with emerging technologies, AI solutions, cloud platforms, and enterprise architecture trends.

Required Skills

* 3–5\+ years of experience as a Solution Architect, Technical Architect, or Senior Software Engineer.
* Strong knowledge of software architecture, system design, and microservices.
* Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud Platform.
* Hands\-on experience with REST APIs, databases, and third\-party integrations.
* Understanding of modern web and mobile technologies.
* Excellent client communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving abilities.
* Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments.

Preferred Skills

* Knowledge of AI/ML solutions and Generative AI integrations.
* Experience with DevOps, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines.
* Familiarity with enterprise integrations, SaaS platforms, and cloud\-native architectures.
* Experience with cybersecurity best practices and scalable enterprise systems.

Qualifications

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field.
* Relevant cloud or architecture certifications are an added advantage.

What We Offer

* Competitive salary package.
* Opportunity to work on innovative AI and enterprise technology projects.
* Career growth in a fast\-growing technology company.
* Collaborative and learning\-focused work environment.
* Exposure to international clients and cutting\-edge technologies.

Pay: ₹35,000\.00 \- ₹80,000\.00 per month

Work Location: In person

9cf8ac88.title: Principal Architect AI Data Engineer
9cf8ac88.description:
**Job Description: Key Responsibilities**

**Architecture \& Solution Leadership**

* Lead the design of **enterprise\-grade GenAI and agentic architectures** (single\-agent, multi\-agent, tool\-driven systems).
* Define **reference architectures, reusable frameworks, and best practices** for LLM applications across the organisation.
* Architect and oversee implementation of **end\-to\-end RAG pipelines** :
Data ingestion chunking embeddings vector search orchestration
	+ response synthesis.
* Drive **scalability, reliability, cost optimisation, and performance** across GenAI platforms.

**Agentic \& LLM Engineering (Hands\-on \+ Oversight)**

* Provide technical leadership in **prompt engineering, prompt orchestration, and agent workflows** (LangChain, LangGraph, etc.).
* Guide teams on **tool\-calling, function\-calling, memory handling, and multi\-agent system design** .
* Lead efforts in **hallucination reduction, guardrails, safety mechanisms, and output evaluation frameworks** .

**Platform \& Engineering Excellence**

* Architect **production\-grade APIs and services** (FastAPI/Flask/enterprise microservices) for LLM solutions.
* Define **MLOps / LLMOps pipelines** including CI/CD, monitoring, observability, and evaluation.
* Partner with Data Engineering teams to ensure:
	+ Data quality, lineage, governance, and compliance
	Seamless integration with enterprise data platforms  
	+

**Organisation\-Level Responsibilities (Critical)**

**Capability Building \& CoE Development**

* Build and scale **GenAI / Agentic AI Centre of Excellence (CoE)** .
* Define **standardised frameworks, accelerators, and reusable components** to improve delivery velocity.
* Drive organisation\-wide adoption of **GenAI best practices and tooling standards** .

**Strategic \& Stakeholder Leadership**

* Engage with **CXOs, business stakeholders, and clients** to translate business problems into AI\-led solutions.
* Lead **solutioning, pre\-sales, RFP responses, and client workshops** for GenAI opportunities.
* Influence **AI strategy, roadmap, and investment decisions** at organisational level.

**Governance, Risk \& Compliance**

* Establish **enterprise governance frameworks** for GenAI:
	+ Responsible AI, security, privacy, ethical usage, and compliance
* Define policies for:
	+ Data access, redaction, model usage, auditability, and explainability

**Mentorship \& Team Leadership**

* Mentor and guide **architects, engineers, and data scientists** .
* Drive **technical upskilling, hiring strategy, and capability maturity** .
* Review solution designs and enforce **architecture quality standards** .

**Experience \& Must\-Have Skills**

**Experience**

* **15\+ years of total experience** in Data Engineering / Data Science / AI
* **3\+ years of hands\-on experience in LLM / GenAI solutions at scale**
* Proven experience in **architecture, solution design, and enterprise delivery**

**LLM / GenAI \& Agentic Engineering**

* Strong hands\-on experience with:
	+ LLMs (Claude, OpenAI, etc.)
	+ RAG pipelines and retrieval optimisation
	+ GPT \+ Agentic AI implementation experience
* Experience with:
	+ LangChain, LangGraph, or similar frameworks

144be9d3.title: ETL and Cloud Testing - VOIS
144be9d3.description:
**Who we are**
--------------



VOIS (Vodafone Intelligent Solutions) is a strategic arm of Vodafone Group Plc, creating value for customers by delivering intelligent solutions through Talent, Technology \& Transformation.
  

As the largest shared services organisation in the global telco industry with 30,000 FTE, our portfolio of next\-generation solutions and services are designed in partnership with customers across Vodafone Group, local markets, and partner markets to simplify and drive growth. With our strategic partner Accenture, we work alongside our Vodafone customers, other Telco and tech companies to drive transformation, meet the challenges of our industry and ensure we stay relevant and resilient. This partnership is a unique, industry\-first model which brings together the best of in\-house and 3rd party capability.
  

We work with customers across 28 countries from 10 VOIS locations: Albania, Egypt, Hungary, India, Romania, Spain, Turkey, UK, Germany, Ireland, and with a network of teams in Czech Republic, Italy, Greece, and Portugal.
  

\#VOIS \#BeUnrivalled \#CreateTheFuture

**About this Role**
-------------------


We are seeking a Data Quality Engineer with 5–8 years of experience in ETL and data migration testing within GCP environments. The role focuses on validating data pipelines, ensuring data integrity during migrations from legacy platforms such as Teradata to cloud\-based architectures, and safeguarding sensitive information through robust testing of encryption and anonymisation solutions.**What you’ll do**
------------------


* Perform System Integration Testing (SIT), system regression, and performance testing (where applicable) for data migration solutions
* Validate ETL pipelines and perform data reconciliation between Teradata and GCP platforms
* Test and validate GCP services, including Dataflow, Cloud Run, Dataform, Eventarc, and Pub/Sub
* Ensure data integrity, completeness, and accuracy following migration activities
* Test PII data anonymisation, masking, and protection mechanisms
* Validate encryption and decryption processes using GPG and Format Preserving Encryption (FPE)
* Execute performance and volume testing for large\-scale datasets
* Apply strong data validation techniques using SQL and data warehousing concepts
**Who you are**
---------------


* An experienced professional with 5–8 years in data/ETL testing or data migration quality engineering
* Skilled in validating ETL processes and data pipelines in cloud environments, particularly GCP
* Knowledgeable in handling PII data, including anonymisation and encryption practices
* Familiar with cloud\-based data architectures and large\-scale data migration testing
* Proficient in SQL, data warehousing concepts, and data validation methodologies
* Comfortable validating complex distributed systems and ensuring data quality across platforms
**Not a perfect fit?**
----------------------



Concerned you may not meet every requirement? Vodafone is committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive. If you are excited about this role but your experience does not align exactly with every aspect of the job description, you are encouraged to apply. You may be the right candidate for this or another opportunity, and the recruitment team will support you in exploring where your skills fit best.

**What's in it for you**
------------------------


* Opportunity to work on large\-scale cloud data migration programmes using GCP technologies
* Exposure to modern data platforms, distributed systems, and advanced data security practices
* Collaborative work environment with cross\-functional teams across global markets
* Continuous learning through real\-world implementation of emerging cloud services
* Opportunity to contribute to critical data transformation initiatives within Vodafone
**What skills you will learn**
------------------------------


* Advanced ETL validation and cloud\-native data testing techniques
* Hands\-on expertise in GCP services such as Dataflow, Pub/Sub, and Cloud Run
* Data security practices including encryption, anonymisation, and masking strategies
* Scalable performance testing and big data validation approaches
* End\-to\-end data migration quality assurance methodologies
**VOIS Equal Opportunity Employer Commitment**
----------------------------------------------



Vodafone recognises and celebrates the value of diversity in building a workforce that reflects the customers and communities it serves. No form of discrimination is tolerated. This includes, but is not limited to, discrimination based on race, colour, age, veteran status, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, pregnancy, maternity or parental status, ethnicity, disability, religion or belief, political affiliation, trade union membership, nationality, citizenship, indigenous status, medical condition, HIV status, neurodiversity, social origin, cultural background, marital or civil partnership status, or socio\-economic background.

**Join Us**
-----------



At Vodafone, we’re working hard to build a better future. A more connected, inclusive and sustainable world. As a dynamic global community, it's our human spirit, together with technology, that empowers us to achieve this.
  

We challenge and innovate in order to connect people, businesses, and communities across the world. Delighting our customers and earning their loyalty drive us, and we experiment, learn fast and get it done, together.
  

With us, you can truly be yourself and belong, share inspiration, embrace new opportunities, thrive, and make a real difference.

**Alert**
---------

Apply for Vodafone jobs only through the official Vodafone Careers website to avoid job scams and fraud.
  

\#JDEnhancedByTARA

**Follow us on social media**
-----------------------------


* LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/vois/
* Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/voisglobal
* Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/voisglobal/
* You can also chat with our employees to learn more about our projects: https://lnkd.in/dpkrcvR2

8af471b0.title: Manager_Java/SpringBoot Developer & OSS Solution Engineer_Pune
8af471b0.description:
**Who we are**
--------------



VOIS (Vodafone Intelligent Solutions) is a strategic arm of Vodafone Group Plc, creating value for customers by delivering intelligent solutions through Talent, Technology \& Transformation.
  

As the largest shared services organisation in the global telco industry with 30,000 FTE, our portfolio of next\-generation solutions and services are designed in partnership with customers across Vodafone Group, local markets, and partner markets to simplify and drive growth. With our strategic partner Accenture, we work alongside our Vodafone customers, other Telco and tech companies to drive transformation, meet the challenges of our industry and ensure we stay relevant and resilient. This partnership is a unique, industry\-first model which brings together the best of in\-house and 3rd party capability.
  

We work with customers across 28 countries from 10 VOIS locations: Albania, Egypt, Hungary, India, Romania, Spain, Turkey, UK, Germany, Ireland, and with a network of teams in Czech Republic, Italy, Greece, and Portugal.
  

\#VOIS \#BeUnrivalled \#CreateTheFuture

**About this Role**
-------------------



We are seeking a skilled Java\-focused Software Engineer to contribute to the design, development, and support of Network Asset Inventory solutions within OSS Support \& Readiness. This role is suited to an individual experienced in building scalable, reliable systems aligned with enterprise and telecom standards, supporting automation objectives and operational readiness across fixed and mobile network environments.

**What you’ll do**
------------------


* Design, develop, enhance, and support OSS\-based Network Asset Inventory solutions.
* Build and maintain applications using Java, Spring Boot, microservices architecture, and REST APIs.
* Develop and manage interfaces and integrations with enterprise systems.
* Ensure high\-quality, maintainable code aligned with coding standards and best practices.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional stakeholders to translate business needs into technical deliverables.
* Contribute to CI/CD pipelines, version control practices, and deployment processes.
* Analyse requirements and propose practical, scalable technical solutions.
* Support operational readiness, reliability, and continuous improvement initiatives.
* Create technical documentation and ensure knowledge sharing within the team.
**Who you are**
---------------


* Experienced professional with a minimum of 5 years in software development, preferably within telecom OSS or enterprise integration environments.
* Proficient in Java, Spring Boot, microservices, REST APIs, SQL, and version control tools such as Git.
* Familiar with CI/CD concepts, development lifecycle practices, and agile delivery environments.
* Demonstrates strong analytical thinking, problem solving, and solution design capabilities.
* Confident communicator who can engage with both technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
* Collaborative team contributor with a focus on quality, ownership, and continuous improvement.
* Exposure to telecom OSS, Network Asset Inventory platforms (e.g. Amdocs Cramer), TM Forum APIs, or cloud technologies is advantageous.
**Not a perfect fit?**
----------------------



Concerned you may not meet every requirement? Vodafone is committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive. If you are excited about this role but your experience does not align exactly with every aspect of the job description, you are encouraged to apply. You may be the right candidate for this or another opportunity, and the recruitment team will support you in exploring where your skills fit best.

**What's in it for you**
------------------------


* Opportunity to work on cutting\-edge telecom OSS and network automation initiatives.
* Exposure to large\-scale, enterprise\-grade systems and global network environments.
* Collaborative work culture with cross\-functional and international teams.
* Continuous learning through hands\-on experience with modern technologies and tools.
* Ability to contribute to impactful solutions that enhance customer and operational outcomes.
**What skills you will learn**
------------------------------


* Advanced OSS and Network Asset Inventory solution development.
* Exposure to telecom domain standards such as TM Forum Open APIs.
* Microservices architecture and scalable system design practices.
* CI/CD, DevOps fundamentals, and cloud\-based development approaches.
* Stakeholder management and translating business requirements into technical solutions.
**VOIS Equal Opportunity Employer Commitment**
----------------------------------------------



Vodafone recognises and celebrates the value of diversity in building a workforce that reflects the customers and communities it serves. No form of discrimination is tolerated. This includes, but is not limited to, discrimination based on race, colour, age, veteran status, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, pregnancy, maternity or parental status, ethnicity, disability, religion or belief, political affiliation, trade union membership, nationality, citizenship, indigenous status, medical condition, HIV status, neurodiversity, social origin, cultural background, marital or civil partnership status, or socio\-economic background.

**Join Us**
-----------



At Vodafone, we’re working hard to build a better future. A more connected, inclusive and sustainable world. As a dynamic global community, it's our human spirit, together with technology, that empowers us to achieve this.
  

We challenge and innovate in order to connect people, businesses, and communities across the world. Delighting our customers and earning their loyalty drive us, and we experiment, learn fast and get it done, together.
  

With us, you can truly be yourself and belong, share inspiration, embrace new opportunities, thrive, and make a real difference.

**Alert**
---------

Apply for Vodafone jobs only through the official Vodafone Careers website to avoid job scams and fraud.
  

\#JDEnhancedByTARA

**Follow us on social media**
-----------------------------


* LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/vois/

5aaa336d.title: Solutions Engineer, India
5aaa336d.description:
Rhombus Power, Inc. delivers AI\-powered predictive intelligence in real time for defense and national security organizations worldwide. Our mission\-built products— Ambient AI and Guardian— are transforming strategic, operational, and tactical decision\-making. By empowering the shift from reactive analysis to proactive, predictive intelligence and decision support, Rhombus Power is providing foresight and freedom of action when it matters most.
   

  

 Come join our cross\-disciplinary and world\-class team that is delivering game\-changing solutions to transform global security.
   

  

 Learn more about Rhombus Power, Inc. and watch a demonstration of Guardian, our AI Platform here:
   

  

 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v\=3PxY6su1Q\-Q
   

  

 https://www.youtube.com/@rhombuspower8558/videos
   

  

 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v\=Iby5WVNfQiI
   

  

 See the following articles to learn more about what we do:
   

  

 https://www.rhombuspower.com/news\-and\-media
   

  

**The Role**
 As a Solutions Engineer at Rhombus Power, you are a hands\-on software generalist embedded directly with our national security partners. Much like the pioneering Forward Deployed roles in our industry, you will be the technical expert at the intersection of world\-changing problems and impactful AI technology. You will rapidly understand our customers' toughest operational challenges and architect, build, and deploy custom solutions that leverage the Rhombus Power platform. This role is a mix of development and customer support, requiring you to be comfortable writing code (DevOps, frontend, and backend) while acting as the primary technical consultant.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Work side\-by\-side with intelligence partners to deeply understand their missions, data workflows, and requirements for predictive insights.
* Design, develop, and deploy tailored software solutions and applications utilizing the Rhombus Power AI platform.
* Be a true software generalist, writing, testing, and maintaining production\-grade code across the full stack—including cloud/DevOps configuration, backend data services, and interactive frontend user interfaces.
* Provide technical consultation to partners, guiding them on the best use of our products to achieve their strategic business and mission goals.
* Serve as the technical liaison, ensuring seamless communication between customer teams and Rhombus Power's core product engineering teams to influence product direction.
* Troubleshoot complex issues in live operational environments, providing expert technical support and guidance to maintain mission continuity.
* Travel to customer sites for deployment, integration, and operational support.


**Qualifications**
* Professional\-level proficiency in English (reading, writing, and verbal communication) required.
* 2–3 years of professional experience in a relevant technical role (e.g., Software Engineering, Technical Consulting, or Data Engineering).
* Demonstrated experience as a software generalist, capable of contributing across the technology stack (DevOps, frontend, and backend).
* Proven experience in a customer\-facing capacity, including requirement gathering, solution presentations, or technical support.
* Proficiency in at least one modern programming language (e.g., Python, JavaScript, Go).
* Experience with Linux/Unix systems and system administration a plus
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.

d3a6ca69.title: Stone Solutions Architect
d3a6ca69.description:
About Us

Jabal Exim is a leading manufacturer and exporter of premium granite, marble, quartzite, and engineered stone, serving customers across the USA, Europe, the Middle East, and Asia. We are looking for an experienced architect with strong natural stone expertise to help us deliver world\-class stone solutions for residential, commercial, hospitality, and infrastructure projects.

Job Summary

We are seeking a highly motivated **Stone Solutions Architect** with experience in natural stone projects. The successful candidate will work closely with our international sales team, factory, architects, designers, developers, and contractors to develop practical, beautiful, and technically sound stone solutions.

Responsibilities

* Review architectural drawings and identify stone opportunities.
* Prepare shop drawings, stone layouts, elevations, and fabrication drawings.
* Create BOQs (Bill of Quantities) and quantity take\-offs.
* Recommend suitable stone materials, finishes, thicknesses, and fixing systems.
* Develop book\-matching and vein\-matching layouts for premium projects.
* Coordinate with production teams to ensure designs can be manufactured efficiently.
* Support the sales team during technical discussions with clients.
* Prepare presentations, design concepts, and 3D visualizations for international projects.
* Assist in product development and innovative stone applications.
* Visit project sites when required.

Required Qualifications

* Bachelor's or Master's Degree in Architecture.
* Minimum 5 years of experience in natural stone, marble, granite, or facade projects.
* Excellent knowledge of stone fabrication and installation techniques.
* Experience with luxury residential, hospitality, commercial, or mixed\-use developments.
* Strong communication and presentation skills.
* Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.

Software Skills

* AutoCAD (Required)
* SketchUp
* Revit (Preferred)
* Lumion / Enscape / Twinmotion
* Adobe Photoshop
* Microsoft Office

Preferred Experience

* Granite
* Marble
* Quartzite
* Engineered Stone
* Sintered Stone
* Dry Cladding Systems
* Shop Drawings
* BOQs
* Quantity Estimation
* Stone Facades
* Interior Stone Applications

What We Offer

* Competitive salary (based on experience)
* Career growth in an international company
* Opportunity to work on prestigious global projects
* Collaborative and innovative work environment

Pay: ₹15,000\.00 \- ₹35,000\.00 per month

Application Question(s):
